| Fellow Patriots, We asked you yesterday to help us close the gap, and I’ve got some great news to report: we’re nearly at our goal. **We’ve come so far, so we can’t give up now! But time is running out, and we’re still short. What can you give TODAY - $5, $10, $15?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=86fe9450a6&e=0be619cbaa) After all this time, you know who I am. You know my character and my commitment to our country. I tell the truth, think outside the box, and break down the political silos that are tearing this nation apart. I am willing to take on the toughest fights, and I’m unafraid of hard work. All of these things set me apart from the career politicians who have gotten us into the mess America is in. Our movement has defied the odds thus far. We know that the American people are hungry for our America First message. Everywhere we go on the campaign trail, Americans tell us that they’re ready for a new Golden Age for America. With the right leadership, it can and will be done! [**We’re nearly there. Please, will you donate ANY AMOUNT right now? If everyone reading this chips in just $5, we can close our fundraising gap and get back on track to protect Democratic Senate control.

The federal government – at the direction of Joe Biden – is seeking to impose a GAG ORDER to RESTRICT THE FREE SPEECH of its leading opponent, Donald J. Trump. At a court hearing on Monday, October 16 in our nation’s capital, we will learn whether or not President Trump will lose his First Amendment right and will be prohibited from publicly speaking out against the Biden Administration’s corruption. That’s why President Trump personally asked patriots like YOU to PLEDGE to be a voice against the Biden Administration’s corruption. Because if President Trump is subjected to a gag order, YOU will be the last remaining voice against tyranny. In 2016, President Trump proclaimed “I AM YOUR VOICE” as he accepted the Republican nomination for president. Now, the Deep State is trying to censor and silence that voice, which is why he needs YOU to pledge to speak up if he is indeed gagged by the Biden Administration next Monday. | | Thank you, Team Trump \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Mon, October 9, 2023Subject: A very important requestTo: dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | Patriot, Next week, our nation will find out whether the First Amendment has been effectively abolished. Crooked Joe Biden – with assistance from a “war crimes prosecutor” – has formally requested an October 16th hearing to impose a GAG ORDER on me to prevent me from being able to speak out against his corruption on the campaign trail. As I’ve said many times before, Joe Biden can try and GAG me, but he can NEVER GAG the American people. That’s why our country has an urgent mission for YOU right now. Whether or not the gag order against me goes into effect, I am asking my loyal supporters like YOU to PLEDGE to be a voice against tyranny and continue speaking out against Crooked Joe’s corruption. The time has come that the Silent Majority can no longer be silent. Because, if I am subjected to a gag order, YOU will be the last remaining voice against tyranny. The Silent Majority must peacefully speak out with one unified and powerful voice against the most corrupt and tyrannical regime in the history of our nation. I need your support to win this election and create greater opportunities for California’s 30th District.

There are many important challenges facing California and the country as a whole. We’re going to need fresh ideas and passion, but also _competent leadership_ that knows their way around the system. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi Peter, it’s Jirair Ratevosian, Congress is supposed to represent your interests, so why is it only serving the interests of those elected? The answer lies in our current leadership. I'm running for California’s 30th Congressional seat because I know how to make Congress work for you. But right now we are behind, and I need your support. = | = Representation matters. As the son of Armenian and Lebanese immigrants, I am living proof that laws passed in Congress help shape the opportunities that impact the lives of the next generation. I need your support to win this election and create greater opportunities for California’s 30th District. There are many important challenges facing California and the country as a whole. We’re going to need fresh ideas and passion, but also competent leadership that knows their way around the system. From economic uncertainty in our communities to conflict overseas, we need someone with a plan and the experience to carry out a vision that will put us back on the right track. = Rather than focus on bipartisanship in Congress to address urgent issues facing Americans, the Republican leadership is using their fundraising dollars to launch political attacks on their colleagues and opponents alike. They’re extremists, and a threat to our rights, our safety, and our future. **Here’s the solution** : Women and young people. Women and young people are leading the charge to fix our broken institutions and create a better, fairer country for us all. They’re running campaigns that prioritize people, not corporate PACs or special interests. Electing great candidates like Katie Porter, Elissa Slotkin, Lauren Underwood, and more are how we create real change. **Here’s how you can help:[Chip in $5 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71587149/432618972/1794220520?amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231014_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTRiZTYxZTUtZmI2YS1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=MElLb3GE0lgb41MoL-1-RXhxwv7--lx5huaXu1e1UBo=)** Elections aren’t won just by blood, sweat, and tears. **BREAKING: Calls mount for House GOP to recruit Liz Cheney for Speakership after Rep. Steve Scalise drops out** After Cheney stood up to Donald Trump and participated in the January 6th Committee, she earned the respect of a lot of Americans.

So we’re not surprised that there are voters calling for her to be the next Speaker of the House.

**But we must know what local Democrats think. So we’re conducting an urgent poll:** **[Do you think the House GOP should nominate Liz Cheney to be speaker?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-speaker?source=FFR_20231014_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=7&akid=20294%2E4449941%2EhPerSE)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-speaker?source=FFR_20231014_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=8&akid=20294%2E4449941%2EhPerSE) | **[YES, I DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-speaker?source=FFR_20231014_EMPOLL_E4_T0_AC&t=9&akid=20294%2E4449941%2EhPerSE)**

Dear Supporters, We're excited to announce the strategic change in Dom Jones' political race. After careful consideration, Dom Jones has dec

---
| |
# Switching Gears: Dom Jones for State Assembly in AD-72
---
| | Dear Supporters,We're excited to announce the strategic change in Dom Jones' political race. After careful consideration, Dom Jones has decided to switch from her campaign for Congress to the State Assembly race in AD-72 in which she is running as the sole democratic candidate. Please see press release below:
---
| |
---
| | DOM JONES EMERGES AS SOLE DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATE FOR ASSEMBLY DISTRICT AD-72, SHIFTING THE POLITICAL LANDSCAPE IN ORANGE COUNTY In a strategic move poised to reshape the political landscape of Orange County, Dom Jones, a distinguished Celebrity Public Figure, Community Leader, business owner, and ardent advocate for youth, civil rights, and global cooperation, has transitioned from her bid for Congress in CA-47 to become the exclusive Democratic contender for Assembly District 72. Jones' timely decision, made at the eleventh hour of the filing deadline, ensures a clear path through the primaries and solidifies her position as the Democratic torchbearer in the General Election alongside presidential candidates Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.With over ten months of tireless campaigning under her belt, Dom Jones now sets her sights on AD-72, an endeavor she champions with unprecedented zeal. Recognized for her unyielding tenacity and innate leadership acumen, Jones boasts an impressive track record as a United Nations Government Relations Ambassador for The O.C. Chapter, Orange County Democratic Party Central Committee Alternate, a non-profit leader, and a prominent advocate for the rights and well-being of young people. California State Controller, Malia M. Cohen, stands firmly in support of Jones' candidacy, emphasizing her unparalleled dedication and vision for Orange County. "Dom Jones is a force to be reckoned with. She embodies tenacity, a natural gift for leadership, and possesses the unique ability to unite diverse voices within Orange County. Her commitment to balanced legislation, economic equity, and unity is precisely what our community needs," stated Controller Cohen. Furthermore, Jones' campaign enjoys the robust endorsement of the National Letter Carriers Association (NALC) and receives unequivocal backing from distinguished figures like Kim Carr, former Mayor of Huntington Beach and City Council Member and Huntington Beach High School Board member and former President, Bonnie Castrey. Carr lauds Jones' candidacy as a pivotal step towards a more inclusive, balanced, and harmonious Orange County. Looking ahead, Dom Jones is poised to spearhead fundraising efforts and to engage the vital Gen Z, Millennial, and younger demographics, driving home the imperative for Democrats to exceed expectations in the 2024 General Election. As she emphatically asserts, "This is not a mere party battle, but a contest between right and wrong. It's time for Orange County to usher in a new era of leadership characterized by honesty, integrity, and a shared commitment to progress. Let us bridge the divides and foster understanding within our communities, ultimately transcending political dogma in favor of our shared humanity." Dom Jones' resolute campaign promises to galvanize Orange County, offering a fresh perspective and a steadfast dedication to the values that resonate with constituents across party lines. Her trajectory marks a pivotal moment in the political narrative, underscoring the urgency for dynamic leadership in the critical times that lie ahead. For media inquiries, please contact:Dom Jones for Assembly 2024[contact@domjones.org](https://www.domjones.org/so/bdOimuHAY/c?w=3KnR4XiFDSM_Y1NAp_HK9rL37NQOUiroZLG_PYl3m6Y.eyJ1IjoibWFpbHRvOmNvbnRhY3RAZG9tam9uZXMub3JnIiwiciI6IjEzNjQyMDEyLWQwMjItNDY4NS1iMGE4LTU0MGI0NmQ3ZjI2NCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjUxYmIxNzQ0LTJhOTMtNDMwYy04YzQ3LTA4MDY4MDZkZDFjMiJ9)
---
| | |
---
| |
# Get Involved
---

After careful consideration, Dom Jones has dec | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Switching Gears: Dom Jones for State Assembly in AD-72 | | Dear Supporters,We're excited to announce the strategic change in Dom Jones' political race. After careful consideration, Dom Jones has decided to switch from her campaign for Congress to the State Assembly race in AD-72 in which she is running as the sole democratic candidate. Please see press release below: | | | | DOM JONES EMERGES AS SOLE DEMOCRATIC CANDIDATE FOR ASSEMBLY DISTRICT AD-72, SHIFTING THE POLITICAL LANDSCAPE IN ORANGE COUNTY In a strategic move poised to reshape the political landscape of Orange County, Dom Jones, a distinguished Celebrity Public Figure, Community Leader, business owner, and ardent advocate for youth, civil rights, and global cooperation, has transitioned from her bid for Congress in CA-47 to become the exclusive Democratic contender for Assembly District 72. Jones' timely decision, made at the eleventh hour of the filing deadline, ensures a clear path through the primaries and solidifies her position as the Democratic torchbearer in the General Election alongside presidential candidates Joe Biden and Kamala Harris.With over ten months of tireless campaigning under her belt, Dom Jones now sets her sights on AD-72, an endeavor she champions with unprecedented zeal. Recognized for her unyielding tenacity and innate leadership acumen, Jones boasts an impressive track record as a United Nations Government Relations Ambassador for The O.C. Chapter, Orange County Democratic Party Central Committee Alternate, a non-profit leader, and a prominent advocate for the rights and well-being of young people. California State Controller, Malia M. Cohen, stands firmly in support of Jones' candidacy, emphasizing her unparalleled dedication and vision for Orange County. "Dom Jones is a force to be reckoned with. She embodies tenacity, a natural gift for leadership, and possesses the unique ability to unite diverse voices within Orange County. Her commitment to balanced legislation, economic equity, and unity is precisely what our community needs," stated Controller Cohen. Furthermore, Jones' campaign enjoys the robust endorsement of the National Letter Carriers Association (NALC) and receives unequivocal backing from distinguished figures like Kim Carr, former Mayor of Huntington Beach and City Council Member and Huntington Beach High School Board member and former President, Bonnie Castrey. Carr lauds Jones' candidacy as a pivotal step towards a more inclusive, balanced, and harmonious Orange County. Looking ahead, Dom Jones is poised to spearhead fundraising efforts and to engage the vital Gen Z, Millennial, and younger demographics, driving home the imperative for Democrats to exceed expectations in the 2024 General Election. As she emphatically asserts, "This is not a mere party battle, but a contest between right and wrong. It's time for Orange County to usher in a new era of leadership characterized by honesty, integrity, and a shared commitment to progress. Let us bridge the divides and foster understanding within our communities, ultimately transcending political dogma in favor of our shared humanity." Dom Jones' resolute campaign promises to galvanize Orange County, offering a fresh perspective and a steadfast dedication to the values that resonate with constituents across party lines. Her trajectory marks a pivotal moment in the political narrative, underscoring the urgency for dynamic leadership in the critical times that lie ahead. name: Your America
subject: Deepen your understanding of the Constitution
body:
Hillsdale College invites all Americans to take this FREE online course

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24195%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aeSIkMQ2FNHE7ao29do%2f%2bg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

As we witness increased efforts to strip America’s classrooms of civic education, rewrite our nation’s history, and stifle important debates, the need for informed citizens is urgent and obvious.

Our Founders understood this when they established our free nation. In his Farewell Address, George Washington stressed that “virtue or morality is the necessary spring of popular government” and that “it is essential that public opinion should be enlightened.”

Without a firm grasp of the Constitution and America’s founding principles, we cannot stand firm against the threats facing the nation today.

That’s why Hillsdale College invites all Americans to take this FREE online course: “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution.”

In this self-paced course, you’ll:

* Understand the meaning of equality, natural law, consent, representation, and sovereignty.
* Explore how our Founders shaped the freest government in human history.
* Examine the challenges our form of government has faced over the past century and the threats we confront today.

After completing this course, you’ll understand why our Founders built the greatest nation in human history and why we must preserve it.

Follow this secure link to start the first lecture with Dr. Larry P. Arnn within minutes:

[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/constitution-101](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24196%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4OVnuY2mp0758Pe8LleftA&sysid=1)

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College **
**

---
| |
---

Your America News
---

name: Anna, Team Haley
subject: The truth about our campaign
body:
It’s been a journey.

| |
---
| | Friend, do you have a couple minutes?

It's Anna with Team Haley. It's been a busy day at the campaign HQ, but I thought it was important to take a few minutes to tell you about our recent fundraising numbers.

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team came together and raised more than _**$11 MILLION**_ to fuel the third quarter of Nikki's campaign.

This fundraising number is beyond impressive and shows the strength of our movement - BUT what's more impressive is the team of grassroots supporters like you who made this possible!

**[As you know, it costs a lot of money to run a winning presidential campaign, which is why you need to see exactly how your donation has and will be used:](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi75nh25qkmm47fpsbakqd5kjmhcf0hjf0rcl2qo_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)**

->**TRAVELING:** From day one, Nikki has prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying her message everywhere she can. In order to do that, Nikki and our team are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely.

Being a part of this team, I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting Nikki to New Hampshire, Iowa, and wherever else she needs to go with the most affordable option we can find.
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4jpf0jvv9vmpil8845jle94cldng50ba2av6ep0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)
**-> EVENTS:** Nikki is running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time she holds a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity for her to share her vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters.

But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms.
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuhlfdlnclpm0lgo0i02oau9vmjpq70cj9c0nnn8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za5q72uuan2eoukf909i1jc9u9b8p2r8787ej158_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)
->**FILING FOR THE PRIMARY:** Most people probably don't realize how expensive it is to enter the primary election. On top of needing to gather signatures and find delegates for Nikki across the country, most states also have expensive filing fees to get on the ballot. Every state is different, so even just having staff to do the research on what needs to be done in each state, and then putting it into action requires a lot of time and resources.

Thanks to the generosity of grassroots support, Nikki will be filing for the New Hampshire primary on **FRIDAY.** More states will follow after, and we can't wait for everyone to have the opportunity to cast their vote for Nikki! [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs1b3rgniqkiqi2l2keb39qtvmg6f0eah64ag14g_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)
At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely.

But, just because we've seen a lot of success so far does NOT mean we can stop now.

We have to keep working, amplifying our message, traveling and hosting more events, and winning every vote.
Which is why I'm asking for your help today. **[Will you help fuel the upcoming days, weeks, and months of Nikki's campaign with just $5?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9guh059850me5vbvbq77t7qqcnnmjlgnre51tmg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)**

_We 're 27 days from the third debate._

_We 're 95 days from the first votes in Iowa taking place._

Momentum is on our side right now, but we have to keep it going and strengthen the momentum ahead of each of these upcoming campaign milestones!

**[Can Nikki count on your support today with a donation of just $5 or more?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi66ujdbpo5de0jc82pu49puk3016hkkfdh08eio_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)** | [FUEL NIKKI'S CAMPAIGN TODAY](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zivol7km60btpi77fpjsgoa3fm99euh0d62p48go_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)
---

**When you donate to Nikki 's campaign, you can rest assured that every single dollar you give is put to good use and stretched as far as it can go.**

Thank you for believing in Nikki and our team. You are an essential part of this journey, Friend.

-Anna, Team Haley

[DONATE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3fmrisnpmuu8upo7aeo8jbju1o2htbb73iaei7g_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o32cth2bs)
---

clean_body: It’s been a journey. | | | | Friend, do you have a couple minutes? It's Anna with Team Haley. It's been a busy day at the campaign HQ, but I thought it was important to take a few minutes to tell you about our recent fundraising numbers. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team came together and raised more than $11 MILLION to fuel the third quarter of Nikki's campaign. This fundraising number is beyond impressive and shows the strength of our movement - BUT what's more impressive is the team of grassroots supporters like you who made this possible! ->TRAVELING: From day one, Nikki has prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying her message everywhere she can. In order to do that, Nikki and our team are flying all over the country, and we're doing it while spending money wisely. Being a part of this team, I can tell you firsthand, we're not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We're flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We're getting Nikki to New Hampshire, Iowa, and wherever else she needs to go with the most affordable option we can find. -> EVENTS: Nikki is running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time she holds a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it's an opportunity for her to share her vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters. But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we're holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms. ->FILING FOR THE PRIMARY: Most people probably don't realize how expensive it is to enter the primary election. On top of needing to gather signatures and find delegates for Nikki across the country, most states also have expensive filing fees to get on the ballot. Every state is different, so even just having staff to do the research on what needs to be done in each state, and then putting it into action requires a lot of time and resources. Thanks to the generosity of grassroots support, Nikki will be filing for the New Hampshire primary on FRIDAY. More states will follow after, and we can't wait for everyone to have the opportunity to cast their vote for Nikki! At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely. But, just because we've seen a lot of success so far does NOT mean we can stop now. We have to keep working, amplifying our message, traveling and hosting more events, and winning every vote. Which is why I'm asking for your help today. We 're 27 days from the third debate. We 're 95 days from the first votes in Iowa taking place. name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: My hero son is facing life in prison
body:
Michael might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj0fkhhj3j345i09ja9rdnokk9duo45gve2bo5n0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsq0es0u1k6mvppcmbprk1ofiorvjkqudglrr8ho_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlhra8k97ja9djarevim1k3i7lq744ii7jku7sko_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znn198l2alghmbthipp20q78tt0urm8j1jn1p5m8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7jvh3rh5248f3pqk4va55v4ffi1daihv7edc978_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlkoo9v88lhs8gs23lrc1n5d4edsffqkls03iep8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztiesf28ana89cmst3qg3r8qjp5kg3ueu6otmql0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z204f2rg55cqcp2v5rkid07rapbcvj9ts1lrm6v0_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z07ne0b4ut6t2k8qr0uua7t23ddcrpn35ech7gmg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc9cqbo614iuu4korf63kr57agutirdova0cri2o_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7o2khh4stp0p9bchputl8arfvsrunk5bddbaqeo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p30s1h6eob246h22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgatfc68ckamfum5ogfjg2uk7gkhh930a605bfhg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphm2o35c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjfrt6mpcr1gcbdmqdddt2984b6qate5r810p5j8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4stj66ob0clh649fg)

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: American Action News
subject: Enroll in “Constitution 101” today
body:
In this free course, you’ll learn the meaning of equality, natural law, consent, representation, and sovereignty

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrj6naupnhnlc8e7ipevhgrrj50lefpkatn75488_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphmeor4c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

In his Farewell Address, George Washington argued that "virtue or morality is the necessary spring of popular government," and for this reason, "it is essential that public opinion should be enlightened."

Washington understood that the preservation of liberty not only depended upon Americans courageous enough to defend their rights against people who would take it, but also who were knowledgeable about their history, their rights, and their form of government.

The truth of this message is made apparent today by the increased efforts to strip America's classrooms of civic education, to rewrite the history of our nation, and to silence debate on the most important issues.

If you want the knowledge necessary to defend our freedom and help stop this movement to transform our nation, I urge you to enroll in our free online course, "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution."

In this free course, you'll learn the meaning of equality, natural law, consent, representation, and sovereignty; you'll discover how the American Founders developed the freest government in human history from this timeless understanding of politics and human nature; and you'll study how this form of government has been undermined for more than a century and the great threats we face today.

Most importantly, you'll be armed with the knowledge and confidence to defend liberty in the face of modern efforts to control and silence the American people.

You can start the first lecture with Dr. Larry P. Arnn by clicking the link below.

Washington understood that the preservation of liberty not only depended upon Americans courageous enough to defend their rights against people who would take it, but also who were knowledgeable about their history, their rights, and their form of government. The truth of this message is made apparent today by the increased efforts to strip America's classrooms of civic education, to rewrite the history of our nation, and to silence debate on the most important issues. If you want the knowledge necessary to defend our freedom and help stop this movement to transform our nation, I urge you to enroll in our free online course, "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution." name: 1600 Daily
subject: Enroll in “Constitution 101” today
body:
Hillsdale College invites all Americans to take this FREE online course

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z58totoiev8sh7nhe2t82clvf7lc04lsroqfquro_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphmeor4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

As we witness increased efforts to strip America's classrooms of civic education, rewrite our nation's history, and stifle important debates, the need for informed citizens is urgent and obvious.

Our Founders understood this when they established our free nation. In his Farewell Address, George Washington stressed that "virtue or morality is the necessary spring of popular government" and that "it is essential that public opinion should be enlightened."

Without a firm grasp of the Constitution and America's founding principles, we cannot stand firm against the threats facing the nation today.

That's why Hillsdale College invites all Americans to take this FREE online course: "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution."

In this self-paced course, you'll:

* Understand the meaning of equality, natural law, consent, representation, and sovereignty.
* Explore how our Founders shaped the freest government in human history.
* Examine the challenges our form of government has faced over the past century and the threats we confront today.

After completing this course, you'll understand why our Founders built the greatest nation in human history and why we must preserve it.

Follow this secure link to start the first lecture with Dr. Larry P. Arnn within minutes:

[https://online.hillsdale.edu/register/constitution-101](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4idjh9prk3ad1ka45vck4121peefel3tc4jdvvg_rp22sh2s8i66p77cphmeor4cjh2bs)

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College **

body:
"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."

| | The Great & Holy Reverend Franklin Graham just broke his silence on the arrest of President Trump.
_**"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."**_
The sad truth is Democrats want President Trump arrested & behind bars because he stood up for Christianity & the unborn more than any other President in American history.
They can't stand that President Trump defended Christianity against the Woke Mob.
They're enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.
And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.
**Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Christian conservatives will never show up to the polls again._Then they 'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties._ **

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
I have written a book

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670905%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JoMlmVCQFhJMP4o1U11ftw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670906%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bha16IGed7n9vQ63f7e8ew&sysid=1) But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670907%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O%2bkOFYwmzhf%2fqMF%2f0U333Q&sysid=1) Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670908%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Y8m6tnGL9vONSeKWWTaGw&sysid=1)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2642%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=1JiRsgbOPRcxqIuFJlmw%2bQ&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670909%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6dyl4EDIoRkFGcDCKreJ1A&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c670900%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4SUbUTqz9mBnKV%2fgh%2fTvGw&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2642%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=1JiRsgbOPRcxqIuFJlmw%2bQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

and put our country on a better economic trajectory.

Friend,
here are the fast facts about America's financial situation:

💰Our
national debt is climbing north of $33 TRILLION.

📈
Americans are suffering with devastating RECORD INFLATION.

💳
Credit card debt and car loan defaults are hitting a 10-YEAR
HIGH.

Bidenomics is destroying the economy and the American Dream. This
must be conservatives' line in the sand.

That's
why Heritage Action is energizing grassroots activists to contact
and demand Congress end the fiscal insanity.

If you
agree, please add your name to our petition to help us demand
Congress to put a stop to this spending trend.

Thank
you,
Digital
Team
Heritage
Action for America

Here at
Heritage Action, we saw the damage caused by the wokeness
infecting American business and culture, so last year, we
launched our ESG Hurts campaign to fight ESG wherever it rears
its ugly head.

🔔
Supported a bipartisan congressional resolution to overturn
Biden's Pro-ESG rules.

🔔Forced Biden to defend his ESG agenda with his FIRST-EVER
VETO.
🔔 And
many more to come.

name: Anna, Team Haley
subject: The truth about our campaign
body:
It’s been a journey.

| |
---
| | Friend, do you have a couple minutes?

It’s Anna with Team Haley. It’s been a busy day at the campaign HQ, but I thought it was important to take a few minutes to tell you about our recent fundraising numbers.

Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team came together and raised more than _**$11 MILLION**_ to fuel the third quarter of Nikki’s campaign.

This fundraising number is beyond impressive and shows the strength of our movement - BUT what’s more impressive is the team of grassroots supporters like you who made this possible!

**[As you know, it costs a lot of money to run a winning presidential campaign, which is why you need to see exactly how your donation has and will be used:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24109%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gQRFb8%2bkASbzqkOOKXjMDw&sysid=1)**

→**TRAVELING:** From day one, Nikki has prioritized meeting with voters, shaking every hand, and amplifying her message everywhere she can. In order to do that, Nikki and our team are flying all over the country, and we’re doing it while spending money wisely.

Being a part of this team, I can tell you firsthand, we’re not out here lighting money on fire with private planes and extravagant luxury hotels like some campaigns. We’re flying a lot of Spirit and JetBlue. We’re getting Nikki to New Hampshire, Iowa, and wherever else she needs to go with the most affordable option we can find.
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24100%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7l3OjMgTrYvVxL93CL15WA&sysid=1)
**→ EVENTS:** Nikki is running a true grassroots campaign, and that means being on the ground, holding as many grassroots events as possible. Every time she holds a town hall in Iowa, South Carolina, or New Hampshire, it’s an opportunity for her to share her vision, answer questions, and gain the confidence of voters.

But what you may not realize is that all of the costs can quickly add up to rent the event space, chairs, and sound equipment. In order to spend your money wisely, we’re holding these events at places like bakeries, local venues, and farms.
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24101%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k95LMTZMrc0LujiQOQN7dA&sysid=1)

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24101%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k95LMTZMrc0LujiQOQN7dA&sysid=1)
→**FILING FOR THE PRIMARY:** Most people probably don’t realize how expensive it is to enter the primary election. On top of needing to gather signatures and find delegates for Nikki across the country, most states also have expensive filing fees to get on the ballot. Every state is different, so even just having staff to do the research on what needs to be done in each state, and then putting it into action requires a lot of time and resources.

Thanks to the generosity of grassroots support, Nikki will be filing for the New Hampshire primary on **FRIDAY.** More states will follow after, and we can’t wait for everyone to have the opportunity to cast their vote for Nikki! [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24102%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0kT46Ame5flhnj069EaTxg&sysid=1)
At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we’re working every hour of the day and spending every dollar wisely.

But, just because we’ve seen a lot of success so far does NOT mean we can stop now.

We have to keep working, amplifying our message, traveling and hosting more events, and winning every vote.
Which is why I’m asking for your help today. **[Will you help fuel the upcoming days, weeks, and months of Nikki’s campaign with just $5?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24103%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yvqucyeRnu2B%2f7hiPkEexA&sysid=1)**

_We’re 27 days from the third debate._

_We’re 95 days from the first votes in Iowa taking place._

Momentum is on our side right now, but we have to keep it going and strengthen the momentum ahead of each of these upcoming campaign milestones!

**[Can Nikki count on your support today with a donation of just $5 or more?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24104%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7srK2fCXZbUujErFeQITZA&sysid=1)** | [FUEL NIKKI'S CAMPAIGN TODAY](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24115%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yw4hZj1iDxo%2fy4D%2bpysp9g&sysid=1)
---

**When you donate to Nikki’s campaign, you can rest assured that every single dollar you give is put to good use and stretched as far as it can go.**

Thank you for believing in Nikki and our team. You are an essential part of this journey, Friend.

-Anna, Team Haley

[DONATE](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24116%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DdeA3ydtd%2b3FZV5pk9GaIQ&sysid=1)
---
| Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24117%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rTOnkByMuKR8jyyjToLQgg&sysid=1)
---

**By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. [Terms and conditions](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24118%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7uZqCUGc7qnFNLR6mH%2fYFQ&sysid=1) and [Privacy Policy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24119%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jq0lYNA2BxmhhgM9N8bavw&sysid=1).apply. You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. [Privacy Policy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24119%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jq0lYNA2BxmhhgM9N8bavw&sysid=1). [Terms and conditions](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24118%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7uZqCUGc7qnFNLR6mH%2fYFQ&sysid=1).

Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals.

Our mailing address is:
186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401
Daniel Island, SC 29492

[Privacy Policy](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24110%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9G6iHIVnA%2bK7anCfUJvpJA&sysid=1)

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24111%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h0Zhq8tl0c%2fgEpusnyicAA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c24112%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yCA%2bwleaMgSIyQ8YV4u3sA&sysid=1)_

name: Ted Cruz
subject: This is a MUST-WIN Race:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
See my urgent update inside. Read more >>

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt6bgpb3qq53r1gacpm22u8in6buug87febjvs78_rp22sh2s8i66p77cpjm2o76cth2bs)
---
Fellow Conservative, I won’t sugarcoat it. **_National Democrats will spend $100 MILLION to flip Texas blue next year._** If they succeed, we’re finished. It’s just that simple. **Don’t bother staying up late to see what happens in Georgia or Arizona. If Texas goes blue, we’ll lose everything...** And that would be an unmitigated disaster for America, with at least two more years of high inflation, open borders, and the woke indoctrination of our kids. Make no mistake. Texas is the most crucial battleground state in America in 2024 – and it’s a **MUST-WIN** for Republicans. That’s why I am ramping up my campaign into full gear early. **[Please rush your best gift today to keep Texas red and save America next year.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqflfth2uimntbv5fa83f2vulj42jdud5nhtj6p8_rp22sh2s8i66p77cpjm2o76cth2bs)**
---
[**CHIP IN NOW**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh3r2s4k40d7pcrqr6rp8k7espg0hlncs6bmfv18_rp22sh2s8i66p77cpjm2o76cth2bs)
---
The truth is, the two candidates running for the Democrat nomination to take me on in the general election, Colin Allred, and Roland Gutierrez, aren’t moderate Democrats- they’re radical leftists and backed by liberal big wigs from Washington, DC. _**They’re radical leftists who support gun control, oppose our oil and gas industry, promote abortion on demand, want to increase our taxes, and back Biden’s open borders policies 100%. **_ Democrat Colin Allred even voted against federal funding for Operation Lone Star, a Texas state program that fights illegal immigration and keeps us all safe. **Losing this race isn’t an option –** there’s _**too much**_ at stake. And I need your support more than ever. Please pitch in to help us prepare for the do-or-die battle we’re facing in 2024! For Liberty,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjd13nlllkbb77ffs313bm4tfbfga9pfb8j74hug_rp22sh2s8i66p77cpjm2o76cth2bs)
---
Ted Cruz
---
[**RUSH IN DONATION TO KEEP TEXAS RED**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5sjccagmf0f64s8lrs46pr3gblshmtdnvreljlo_rp22sh2s8i66p77cpjm2o76cth2bs)
---
| | | **Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
---

---
| |

Friend,

Ron DeSantis has taken action as Governor to ensure that no Florida money is directed toward the terrorist-backing Iranian regime AND signed an
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed379aa2abbc3e7cf3922e883f68c71b7ef91b29cd203594b487d34bb5c73567702b008f47c2a8d451a031ffab4f4a04d32d6c7e028c7380c57
executive order for the State of Florida to carry out emergency evacuation efforts for the Floridians in Israel who wish to return home.

Ron DeSantis is not hesitating. There are over 20,000 Americans currently in harm's way.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade

Meanwhile, in the news, Ron DeSantis has continued to be outspoken about standing in strong support of the people of Israel and is not putting up terrorist sympathizers.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade

On CNN: "Let’s have unanimity between both parties all across this country that we’re going to stand with Israel, not just today, not just tomorrow, but in the weeks and months ahead... I would also ask the president to consider reversing his policies on the southern border. We are vulnerable when you have all these military age men coming in. Do you think that our enemies have not been looking at that weakness?" — Gov. Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade

On MSNBC: "I've always supported, from the time I was a congressman to now, the strongest possible turning of the screws on Iran and their energy. My view is anything that goes to that regime, they are not trying to make life better for the Iranian people. They are going to use that, and they are going to try to fund terrorism with it." — Gov. Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade

We'll continue to update you as the crisis ensues and make sure you know the action Ron DeSantis is taking to protect Americans, support our ally Israel, and stand up for what's right. Always.

Team DeSantis

Subject: Update on Ron DeSantis' Support of Israel
Friend,

As Israel faces the barbaric attacks of the Iran-backed Hamas terrorists, Ron DeSantis is taking executive action in the State of Florida to stand firm in support of Israel and its people.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade

As of now, Ron DeSantis has directed the flags of the United States and the State of Florida to be flown at half-staff as a mark of respect for the victims of the Hamas terrorist attacks in Israel.

In solidarity with our ally Israel, he has also directed the Florida Capitol to be lit in blue and white, symbolic of the Israeli flag.

In further support of Israel, Ron DeSantis has proposed legislation to strengthen sanctions on Iran and called on other states to follow Florida's lead and make it clear that they will not be complicit in Iranian-backed terrorism.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade

Governor DeSantis is TAKING ACTION to ensure that the Iranian regime will not be filling its coffers with money from Florida. And as President, he will ensure that we refuse to do business with countries of concern.

After serving in Iraq and witnessing the atrocities of terrorism firsthand, this mission is personal to Ron DeSantis.

We must focus on what matters and condemn the antisemitism that is mobilizing this appalling horror. Joe Biden isn’t getting the job done. We need a President who will be disciplined, focused, and put the mission first. Joe Biden is not that guy, but Ron DeSantis is.

If you’d like to support his campaign, please consider chipping in at the link below. But please don’t feel pressured. This is a difficult time, and we understand if you do not want to provide resources to a political campaign during this crisis. No matter what form it takes, please know that we will always appreciate your support.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade
Support Ron DeSantis for President

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3d79cf17d6f6e41f0f93210092d757cda4dfcb6b461aae5132aa6d7b4671227f9ebd3eb45c2dfe2e426f4c6f521fcbfb46659f39b163f6806

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3e73fd8e798279b0248ad70a7c5f9b8a204c50e05fbb0489c89eb3cd119fee5c53ca9990a1c9c662299ff00cb0a81ca30fd64b4b751666727
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3052a90e1028b3cc20fdd4f4323e760d0301050b3b8a41702ee6fd2856331b459acffdfc500899c4858a29383c7e67759ef1091d9d35311aa
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ec4b0d6eb885ed3627f17170a54542987e827c05772a392d1d1b379b3885de940070cf44e5e5780a76e8d982f5f551f12c371baee9cb0c83ff285b33d2ceade

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, Ron DeSantis has taken action as Governor to ensure that no Florida money is directed toward the terrorist-backing Iranian regime AND signed an executive order for the State of Florida to carry out emergency evacuation efforts for the Floridians in Israel who wish to return home. Ron DeSantis is not hesitating. There are over 20,000 Americans currently in harm's way. Meanwhile, in the news, Ron DeSantis has continued to be outspoken about standing in strong support of the people of Israel and is not putting up terrorist sympathizers. On CNN: "Let’s have unanimity between both parties all across this country that we’re going to stand with Israel, not just today, not just tomorrow, but in the weeks and months ahead... I would also ask the president to consider reversing his policies on the southern border. We are vulnerable when you have all these military age men coming in. Do you think that our enemies have not been looking at that weakness?" — Gov. Ron DeSantis On MSNBC: "I've always supported, from the time I was a congressman to now, the strongest possible turning of the screws on Iran and their energy. My view is anything that goes to that regime, they are not trying to make life better for the Iranian people. They are going to use that, and they are going to try to fund terrorism with it." — Gov. Ron DeSantis We'll continue to update you as the crisis ensues and make sure you know the action Ron DeSantis is taking to protect Americans, support our ally Israel, and stand up for what's right. Always. Chip in today to help Ron DeSantis bring this leadership to the White House: Support Ron DeSantis for President In Freedom, Team DeSantis --------Forwarded Message-------- From: Team DeSantis Subject: Update on Ron DeSantis' Support of Israel Friend, As Israel faces the barbaric attacks of the Iran-backed Hamas terrorists, Ron DeSantis is taking executive action in the State of Florida to stand firm in support of Israel and its people. As of now, Ron DeSantis has directed the flags of the United States and the State of Florida to be flown at half-staff as a mark of respect for the victims of the Hamas terrorist attacks in Israel. In solidarity with our ally Israel, he has also directed the Florida Capitol to be lit in blue and white, symbolic of the Israeli flag. In further support of Israel, Ron DeSantis has proposed legislation to strengthen sanctions on Iran and called on other states to follow Florida's lead and make it clear that they will not be complicit in Iranian-backed terrorism. Governor DeSantis is TAKING ACTION to ensure that the Iranian regime will not be filling its coffers with money from Florida. And as President, he will ensure that we refuse to do business with countries of concern. After serving in Iraq and witnessing the atrocities of terrorism firsthand, this mission is personal to Ron DeSantis. We must focus on what matters and condemn the antisemitism that is mobilizing this appalling horror. Joe Biden isn’t getting the job done. We need a President who will be disciplined, focused, and put the mission first. Joe Biden is not that guy, but Ron DeSantis is. If you’d like to support his campaign, please consider chipping in at the link below. But please don’t feel pressured. This is a difficult time, and we understand if you do not want to provide resources to a political campaign during this crisis. No matter what form it takes, please know that we will always appreciate your support. Support Ron DeSantis for President In Freedom, Team DeSantis 🚨 ATTENTION 🚨 Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click here. Volunteer! We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for. Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today! Sign up here! Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
I have written a book

|

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ca0f0fa70c14039a90af566fcb9f4fe&_e=TAO70RyvlMQvb25xV87TaK5YVqC6D37MrWUGZV2YwMF9eY-oNiy7JkZfHn7eAkChVWafLgtswR_L4Nr8xYbzCuwAew004Bwa4rtX8I-aRBczcPRphqMYmjPKgwLmOAQX1_YFkN4v8UT65pyjOnrgDIf4iaqIzjxG5qGcTLodmch3hfIs-P_0WTkalrDMrNumJH2PXWr5o8yzrfYPjRgkIvrrQeLdwGCb2gLsSp9yQxWMxo0iM5K9u_A3HfOsxbs5nd58wkTnW4o-CUEWUa3WZvu4EVHU9aO5KxpjVrRN4qBTY7FiCE0KG_q5n1O8YYrSPSUNBSZDPutmmaT6ffmqhDFhXtb3hhSCzye8h1g28CbBqKrObZePjXplZ3O0pfJfpCG0WIf4M72tRVrIkSwBkth36wiwKf7F5k9mY818ZZ4%3D)

| Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ca0f0fa70c14039a90af566fcb9f4fe&_e=TAO70RyvlMQvb25xV87TaK5YVqC6D37MrWUGZV2YwMF9eY-oNiy7JkZfHn7eAkChVWafLgtswR_L4Nr8xYbzCuwAew004Bwa4rtX8I-aRBczcPRphqMYmjPKgwLmOAQX1_YFkN4v8UT65pyjOnrgDIf4iaqIzjxG5qGcTLodmch3hfIs-P_0WTkalrDMrNumJH2PXWr5o8yzrfYPjRgkIvrrQeLdwGCb2gLsSp9yQxWMxo0iM5K9u_A3HfOsxbs5quCb25AnlhZcJ-OsHPKq8PG3quYKC44wPRwgn1zr9NDm9Au21d9eI9Va0QrYZndPFIK1JaereovYV8ANK-YqyQ7I3idtT3CzAQcI4VXoyyo3GbHMJcp8JJKfyjI720tLeCKIELl_nR7rql2dV2sx7E2Z0IOtKGrjP09lBF_r7Js%3D) But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge** , I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ca0f0fa70c14039a90af566fcb9f4fe&_e=TAO70RyvlMQvb25xV87TaK5YVqC6D37MrWUGZV2YwMF9eY-oNiy7JkZfHn7eAkChVWafLgtswR_L4Nr8xYbzCuwAew004Bwa4rtX8I-aRBczcPRphqMYmjPKgwLmOAQX1_YFkN4v8UT65pyjOnrgDIf4iaqIzjxG5qGcTLodmch3hfIs-P_0WTkalrDMrNumJH2PXWr5o8yzrfYPjRgkIvrrQeLdwGCb2gLsSp9yQxWMxo0iM5K9u_A3HfOsxbs5rEwCOnMMjPxrI3g3ILzVRQeR_084Yq2eylNtMkUhQeQ-Z9XsH3GvTZ9qt2-s7cGcR14pKAxUlngbvY50cjTJ8Q_tf15Ia1-OTDWBDT9m5jRXqQgg98suw4ix_Ue8SEdyx6XAiBmY32UufG6prhA09B8dnBMy0hbTAA_NlKkXzo8%3D) Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ca0f0fa70c14039a90af566fcb9f4fe&_e=TAO70RyvlMQvb25xV87TaK5YVqC6D37MrWUGZV2YwMF9eY-oNiy7JkZfHn7eAkChVWafLgtswR_L4Nr8xYbzCuwAew004Bwa4rtX8I-aRBczcPRphqMYmjPKgwLmOAQX1_YFkN4v8UT65pyjOnrgDIf4iaqIzjxG5qGcTLodmch3hfIs-P_0WTkalrDMrNumJH2PXWr5o8yzrfYPjRgkIvrrQeLdwGCb2gLsSp9yQxWMxo0iM5K9u_A3HfOsxbs59b5fFnIp2F15c3rbwDukfb8QjZvGpq5QkgNTQKDrUg7dh9r-cfnekU0ghPPwI0XyA0FAcxlL9-dsqSx6BVhR0qsYqBlHnXT7MZsPdMlH9oCybP5B_Dxj2M25F1lkFvdqph9LC-zc9sMNPi-7e_XVKJ824pALVYIJ1D8sUtQHmU4%3D)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

They're enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.

| | Friend, the pandemic created many challenges for families and students, revealing gaps in our one-size-fits-all government-run school system.
---
**Many parents witnessed firsthand ...**
* Politicians and teachers unions pushing to keep schools closed
* Inadequate remote or distance learning

body:
"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."

| | The Great & Holy Reverend Franklin Graham just broke his silence on the arrest of President Trump.
_**"The left is scared to death of Donald Trump. We need to pray for this nation, because we're about to lose it. God is the only one who can fix these problems."**_
The sad truth is Democrats want President Trump arrested & behind bars because he stood up for Christianity & the unborn more than any other President in American history.
They can't stand that President Trump defended Christianity against the Woke Mob.
They're enraged that his Supreme Court Justices ended Roe v Wade.
And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.
**Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Christian conservatives will never show up to the polls again._Then they 'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties._ **
[**So today we 're PLEADING for every conservative reading this message to add their name and stand with us against the WORST political Witch Hunt in American history.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7dd7356c0d6c4510a1600cca061c401e&_e=ejfHfp-HhTq58jxs2h0MOCnlUVtxMV5XHuGx6YPjZcBmbp59QD2NYpwrZfJ84CLkWotWaMsBEbjrlGsdM3KzCMBsCfl3q0POGaG7yt5xA17CQfgRAYz6biEUhFGsH4aQ0CqjzDcpbIzzyxcMP7ZS3h-7-Op3xPf73vJsGghF_MvaA0KtvsB9AwBN6gBuUB2akCrrU_COitqLoqw_ApQGFti1-YXQnv1VtXWw1FYOEF82Qrn9YANysuSjvnOnnqr7M8Kg7JRva_NSms0aXfcgTxxUddwlxeHPmFQTizPKQEMWKjz74wE-U-kgDVt1NU9ZbYuDj4zV22gZNS-RQ8oTPQD6g7_RkvocXXuogthFC56R9y5j_H2ejXp23jlC9riGS23a-FTcQmprwssFSQRqbPpg9cll19C8cEKkRwSif1I8sMxskIPq7NVFMnsWSfYbxeXOIQOosZDU60qd4o70quc15EqcPGo42HjRT6PdIOg%3D)

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Make THIS Bank Account ‘Switch’ to Protect Your Cash
body:
This past July, banks across America made a disturbing change.

| | | | | Dear Reader, This past July, banks across America made a disturbing change. It handed the Federal Reserve DIRECT control over how money comes into and out of your bank account. Very soon, you could wake up to discover your money has been frozen ... or even confiscated. It's happened to innocent people before, and I don't want you to be next. That's why I've put together [these three simple steps you can use to protect your money.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=165a55894bcf49e6a86d4dee3c9ffd49&_e=Kg9dna_jJDo_O_Y3FwT9tihIC17XsQdQH3RPD7gpUAsI-pnJ74N6Ffo3Ku9DQjrB4mfaK3mx3-Fta7lAulE4SPs_-b_Y4keWfdI_tagEG6AXOZ8160Z-WcLjmkCuMshbboWt2akCm8mM3G6c2p2b5XAmehomy6mElz4dhksailtw6SdTgVgrH4Dzt_droo9t9IYBiqZuHxyChWpVN1yX9bjFfXKKGGEitqutsH_Y_dSlNBQw1PEi6fQMtf_IMJQKPN_aDKB7rMX-PiRApJI3-z2Y6HmWuj__ZHQbFXHPNxZsQ-zM64BCUWLOBTJpbytU) Once you put them in place, you can rest easy at night. You won't be helpless to the Federal Reserve's power. And, because of an odd "quirk" to how this works, you could stand to actually make more money. [Click here to find out how.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=165a55894bcf49e6a86d4dee3c9ffd49&_e=Kg9dna_jJDo_O_Y3FwT9tihIC17XsQdQH3RPD7gpUAsI-pnJ74N6Ffo3Ku9DQjrB4mfaK3mx3-Fta7lAulE4SPs_-b_Y4keWfdI_tagEG6AXOZ8160Z-WcLjmkCuMshbboWt2akCm8mM3G6c2p2b5XAmehomy6mElz4dhksailuVmv5MKNwSjB-rfqDJj1EOaf4vGhKa1SmPBNm9ZRxMDNccoJ3CCXfUn1i_EoiD3ngiGqVlVzhRxs-7fZAww6YBSvg1bP5XgraYrJKu7BoKykrpTpAGLP6jyGnrORPomrXkpSjiYZPh8l0cVC0xUibY) Best, Eliza Lasky
