**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: David Horowitz
subject: the enemy within
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. _What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I'm asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75081fbf914245be8dc0f0af264c3c7a&_e=0f5RH2JkJrji6GGLbKbGEZZnALlJfNqzgs2tm68My6aBwyT8JAlmo0ZB-TdlWU_egFK9zXi3i58lSP15LDZJtxmamPv6nGQoNT_6iCHfs_9CBdR6pNH7dTs28ZfYBESlku-qZMpqjKqqRK-J1Kab78MzpauFMX2pRQXw228SFugq2qEs4bUnNeRz_vTykdCpqAqJHEN2nIg3W0rSnk2ndB8JDi55Di1OAatnvlJaqHht8p4iYjrAIXptqO4Cf8LYk10Mb0TCXG1qjpxTYbaRcTswVLJjp-tKyu8shdB_UNbd0dz45y-pOQxAo0_aIXKq7tmwPVn8uypQkMSSWVZruQZw0ilUq__bYwOBFh1D4ItRsfbxmU-TmUNcB1-E7WtNhDUkjMDxB5PMpZue_oMo0w%3D%3D)** When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. **That 's why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "_The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That's why I'll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left's evil agenda to every American patriot.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75081fbf914245be8dc0f0af264c3c7a&_e=0f5RH2JkJrji6GGLbKbGEZZnALlJfNqzgs2tm68My6aBwyT8JAlmo0ZB-TdlWU_egFK9zXi3i58lSP15LDZJtxmamPv6nGQoNT_6iCHfs_9CBdR6pNH7dTs28ZfYBESlku-qZMpqjKqqRK-J1Kab78MzpauFMX2pRQXw228SFugq2qEs4bUnNeRz_vTykdCpqAqJHEN2nIg3W0rSnk2ndB8JDi55Di1OAatnvlJaqHht8p4iYjrAIXptqO4Cf8LYblsT1VnWqJwt10zKbyIDEWWiuo-ctYy8lmMjxWkCIN2PFQyczrFJ0HV9WfVvySt7e6PqzNyPUwqe--0bZoG9Thfj2pdHD3SeUj0PvzSHDEa7bVpSZdDVilL56fu2hnbIkPV1BhQBPHscUSgL9GwyZw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. **And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz

clean_body: America is on the brink of destruction. | | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don't say this to shock or scare you - I say it because it's true. What we see today didn 't happen overnight. It's the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ... and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I'd know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts - radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my "comrades" made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan - then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I've dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That's why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America - and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of "the enemy within" you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn't be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we've seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making - but most of the American people have no clue what we're up against. That 's why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state - and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as "white supremacists" and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... "A Great Book" - Dinesh D'Souza "The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life." - Mark Levin "David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation." Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within -- and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We've reached the point in our history that will decide our future - and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don't simply disagree with us about how to make our country better - they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama's own words "radically transform" America. And they don 't care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it's up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. name: Shift WA
subject: Top News: State spending skyrocketing
body:
The Shift WA team has been working to shift the political debate
in Washington state since 2013. We've spent the last decade
providing people like you with the facts and perspectives needed
to make a difference in your community.

The team here at Shift WA has
been working to shift the political debate in Washington state
since 2013. We've spent the last decade providing people like you
with the facts and perspectives needed to hopefully make a
difference in your community. So, as always, we will help keep
you-up-to-date with an item or two of interest from your own
backyard. Read on...

This week's Newsmaker
Interview...
This week we talked with Andrea
Suarez, Founder and Executive Director of the non-profit
volunteer organization We Heart Seattle. In a very short time the
group has made a significant impact in cleaning up encampments
and helping people get off the streets. Created during the
height of the COVID pandemic in 2020 when homeless encampments
were filling Seattle's parks, sidewalks, and other public places,
We Heart Seattle challenged the status quo regarding how best to
help those struggling with drugs and homelessness. Along the
way, they have encountered protests by a small group of
extremists as volunteers have cleaned up encampments and
attempted to help those who were suffering. Read more...

This week's top story…
We assume part of Governor
Inslee's decision to take a carbon polluting flight to the U.N.
was to get away from the increasingly louder local noise over his
costly cap-and-tax scheme and the Washington Policy Center's case
that "Governor Inslee's office and others in his administration
are upset that we and others refer to the cost of the CO2
allowances in the law as a 'tax.' The governor's office and
others have resorted to some very convoluted language and logic
to avoid using that politically powerful word." Read more...

In case you missed it…
Leave it to the local paper to
put the finishing touches on the Democrat plan to let the courts
do their re-districting dirty work. That's the take from the
Yakima Herald editorial page, which writes that "(W)hatever
happens with the District 15 boundaries from here, somebody won't
be happy, so more suits or appeals could be in the works soon. We
wouldn't be surprised if the courts were still haggling over this
one when the next census comes around." However, the local paper
takes a dim view of the Dems' motivation for the lawsuit,
pointing out that "some Democrats - particularly those who live
west of the Cascade Range - seem confident that a clear Latino
majority in the 15th would automatically add a nice hue of blue
to Central Washington. But they're living in a fantasy world if
they take for granted that Latinos will lean left." Read more...

Governor Inslee's pennies can
sure add up...

DONATE

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com and sent from Shift
Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of
your friends, you can click here to do so.

You can also stay up to date on
our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following
us on Facebook & Twitter.
If you believe you received this message
in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift
Washington, click to unsubscribe.

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA Faith
subject: A Call to Speak Up for Biblical Truth
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American We're living in a pivotal time. In many ways we are witnessing the dystopian nightmare of a culture moving further from Jesus -- not closer to Jesus. **_As believers in Biblical truth, we need to speak up to current Western civilization and all of humanity!_** To help equip Pastors and congregations to put our Christian faith into action, TPUSA Faith hosts **_Freedom Night in America_**. Through this monthly series, a guest speaker joins me to engage in discussions around topics such as sexuality, gender, and family life. **[Freedom Night in America is on a mission to strengthen the church and fight for liberty - which is God's idea, not man's idea. Will you support our Freedom Night series with your gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or $500 today?](http://trk.readactnews.)**

Friend, News of our record fundraising haul from the last quarter has hit the press and we've got **_big_** things coming because of the support we've brought in. The doubters had their heyday, and yet again, we've proved them wrong. Now, we're bringing the fight right to the Hawkeye State, making progress on visiting the good people of Iowa in all 99 counties, and EARNING this nomination. But after two debates and another incredible fundraising showing, we have truly showed our hand as the threat in this race, and we are about to face attacks from every angle to keep us from winning in Iowa. We cannot let this take us down.
---
| | [Help me keep it up: Chip in $15](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c7162490ada1489cb66862fd7763dc97&_e=VA9XASEDVK9JwLsQha1xg5YK6cX9Z7vSZalmaoFrzB9NA9MLfzcYP46hUWqGgr6YDMkj9EtaNFvz6YNzz07q3I7ozXY_GzC8Nvpt1K7Sms2cF-sJ08dNiDY8fDXFE9wQI3bNJMAE-0Nll9XoruTuBi5G18oPKMdWpA6kawczsk4S_VarXJScmV2UXIusts4vuG3rT64mv3mCA3A50KC3KpBp5fPVMhBjz5q9X12jeOZgjO-VCU1tbixpYhNRLGHOaoRQ4yYh4jXvG1FgkPTy7RqaSGnXHBM0YN6E958XIeGBb-Ao-Umq3gwuA4FnpLYcGeES5PsgV9hBkwdaO77cDF_5oXZGEaLctnBfVCBwVUngXAUGNklOnQl7C7boDKtmMTTbz0iAkC9vnsCnZRJP39Fr2LUGZGjadakd4R9svoucXnFypLykc-zjN5uD1fNu_XSjcrzvS-dKnh1c8BiJxy57jmMa23plZ2-L3cSgoyw%3D)

Other candidates are taking the American people for granted and feeling entitled to votes. _That couldn 't be further from my game plan._ I am on the ground, building relationships, and earning the grassroots support that'll be necessary to win this election, and this will only be made harder as other candidates attempt to take us down in the coming months. I KNOW what it takes to win elections, but this is my first nationwide race, and I am counting on your support more than ever to cover this new ground. **_We 've just entered our critical sprint leading up to the Iowa Caucus on January 15th, and coming together now will make the difference when that night comes. If we step back and lose in this first nominating contest, we drop the ball for the future generations of this country and risk losing next November. Losing to Joe Biden... and losing freedom that soldiers have shed blood and tears for_**. All across Iowa so far, I've gained incredible support and endorsements from political, evangelical, agricultural, and local business leaders, **[but I'll need YOUR support to get me through the rest of this stretch.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c7162490ada1489cb66862fd7763dc97&_e=VA9XASEDVK9JwLsQha1xg5YK6cX9Z7vSZalmaoFrzB9NA9MLfzcYP46hUWqGgr6YDMkj9EtaNFvz6YNzz07q3I7ozXY_GzC8Nvpt1K7Sms2cF-sJ08dNiDY8fDXFE9wQI3bNJMAE-0Nll9XoruTuBi5G18oPKMdWpA6kawczsk4S_VarXJScmV2UXIusts4vuG3rT64mv3mCA3A50KC3KpBp5fPVMhBjz5q9X12jeOZgjO-VCU1tbixpYhNRLGHOaoRQ4yYh4jXvG1FgkPTy7RqaSGnXHBM0YN6E958XIeGBb-Ao-Umq3gwuA4FnpLYcNPWJyy6q95E4mGxSfaOYYlXm7jupNZufB28adZtFLFqC1FmsTvSeZmkkRRHo9dk2TErlY1xrXCMfLd0Fo5-1PYw0A0mTbq4XD3epLGrZKPYpO97pMfIPJfRv7PVtTlJDvp2wvl-gLWy0LgCIZwEeOE-tYhbBddUEK7R1ofVXlww%3D "but I’ll need YOUR support to get me through the rest of this stretch.")**

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c7162490ada1489cb66862fd7763dc97&_e=VA9XASEDVK9JwLsQha1xg5YK6cX9Z7vSZalmaoFrzB9NA9MLfzcYP46hUWqGgr6YDMkj9EtaNFvz6YNzz07q3I7ozXY_GzC8Nvpt1K7Sms2cF-sJ08dNiDY8fDXFE9wQI3bNJMAE-0Nll9XoruTuBi5G18oPKMdWpA6kawczsk4S_VarXJScmV2UXIusts4vuG3rT64mv3mCA3A50KC3KpBp5fPVMhBjz5q9X12jeOZgjO-VCU1tbixpYhNRLGHOaoRQ4yYh4jXvG1FgkPTy7RqaSGnXHBM0YN6E958XIeG6IwumTm8B9nJizub3N4ORQmKyEX1fQ9Ik14TehUYMGHfp5SqcViUWQ2Vv4_Xr6KdLcyJIxUCYPEYiIZoEdXM7_fob81bcY8af009VUANAz1ieinSpe3UNf0hC8Xn9bAiHzIR0D_8f8kVOg9lfXzAICAvHa35sNk4xURpUyw1BQ9WxdWblAI8iCDzYlmu1MaE%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

Now, we're bringing the fight right to the Hawkeye State, making progress on visiting the good people of Iowa in all 99 counties, and EARNING this nomination. But after two debates and another incredible fundraising showing, we have truly showed our hand as the threat in this race, and we are about to face attacks from every angle to keep us from winning in Iowa. We cannot let this take us down. | | Other candidates are taking the American people for granted and feeling entitled to votes. That couldn 't be further from my game plan. I am on the ground, building relationships, and earning the grassroots support that'll be necessary to win this election, and this will only be made harder as other candidates attempt to take us down in the coming months. I KNOW what it takes to win elections, but this is my first nationwide race, and I am counting on your support more than ever to cover this new ground. Biden Admin To Unveil New Chip Controls Focused on China: REPORT

The Biden administration is poised to unveil additional computer chip
sanctions targeting China as soon as next week, Axios reported
Saturday. The new export controls will shut loopholes in existing

subject: Make THIS Bank Account ‘Switch’ to Protect Your Cash
body:
This past July, banks across America made a disturbing change.

| | | | | Dear Reader, This past July, banks across America made a disturbing change. It handed the Federal Reserve DIRECT control over how money comes into and out of your bank account. Very soon, you could wake up to discover your money has been frozen ... or even confiscated. It's happened to innocent people before, and I don't want you to be next. That's why I've put together [these three simple steps you can use to protect your money.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aa4dba69f8447d3864065372812e370&_e=CfCA1jT5dXN2fTYGspNfqKx94dy6-HNrCmBxcW8HN2qGhF4xz1Av6ZlDn5KY9oJGO-lUk6ETktjQCuYcT7-qg2GOFW06daTxqVwpaMEJulItA1qt01gCX4rYm8fEs7n4sMkxIwPN7MoLWCMuHjtqBK2L2CzqobUrcPworkdLPLRueQn_7N9-p9dZKhlaGPHrfJBanWCz1VPl9Bv0ZYOlMVBwSSnI4c3300QstqfWPn0z9Of4cEv_Bxu6RXTs9WVs3pdnapuEaR5_HgpyraJC2a1DW6S24iHgIoueF7HqmWF9TdXzHJJCp9t5bSRER2TE) Once you put them in place, you can rest easy at night. You won't be helpless to the Federal Reserve's power. And, because of an odd "quirk" to how this works, you could stand to actually make more money. The Palace of Versailles and the Louvre art museum were evacuated Saturday for bomb threats as tensions relating to the Israel-Hamas war continue to ripple throughout the West, The Associated Press reported. French authorities evacuated civilian visitors and staff from the locations after as of yet unidentified individuals made bomb threats on Saturday, according to the AP.

The voters of New Zealand spurned the liberal Labour Party in
Saturday’s national elections, knocking them into the minority and
electing a conservative coalition led by the National Party. The

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Yesterday the Kennedy Campaign announced a new campaign manager
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. said of the change, “The campaign benefited enormously from the political experience of Dennis Kucinich.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_campaign_manager_announce3&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Yesterday, the Kennedy Campaign announced a new campaign manager, Amaryllis Kennedy. **Amaryllis, previously the Kennedy campaign’s co-manager, will take on the role of Campaign Manager beginning today.** Amaryllis is already a familiar face to many of you, having launched and managed a number of the campaign’s front-facing initiatives. **Given her passion for igniting our volunteer base and organizing our grassroots revolution for change, this moment marks an exciting new morning in our campaign's activation of supporters across the country to elect Robert F. Kennedy Jr. President of the United States in 2024.** Mr. Kennedy said of the change, “**The campaign benefited enormously from the political insight of Dennis Kucinich.** Dennis has been a moral center in American politics for more than five decades. This campaign would never have enjoyed such tremendous success during the past six months except for the leadership, wisdom, and experience he brought. We will continue to profit from his advice and judgment as we go forward.” “He is now handing off the baton to the team he did so much to cultivate, headed by my daughter-in-law, Amaryllis Kennedy,” he continued. **“Amaryllis is a woman of extraordinary intelligence and drive who I am confident will take this campaign to the next level.”** Amaryllis stated, “I am thrilled to lead this historic people-powered movement to reclaim the American Dream on behalf of all our citizens.” **Formerly founder and CEO of natural language processing startup Mulu and Head of Product for Twitter’s consumer commerce division** , Amaryllis brings immense experience growing and optimizing dynamic teams, leveraging cutting-edge digital engagement, and building energized communities at scale. Amaryllis holds a law degree from Oxford University and a Master's Degree in International Security from Georgetown University’s School of Foreign Service. **Prior to her work in technology, Amaryllis spent a decade working on counterproliferation efforts on behalf of the United States Government. She has written two books about the pitfalls of the forever wars and produced and presented the Netflix documentary series “Business of Drugs,” detailing the militarism and corruption driving America’s failed War on Drugs.** Over the last year, Amaryllis has worked closely with Dennis, campaign leadership, national staff, and volunteers. **She has spearheaded our campaign's digital strategy, breaking through legacy media embargoes to spread Mr. Kennedy's message to every corner of the country.** We could not be more excited for her to take the reins as we embark together on our historic Independent run to reclaim the American Dream. Team Kennedy
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_campaign_manager_announce3&n=2)[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_campaign_manager_announce3&n=3)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_campaign_manager_announce3&n=4) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_campaign_manager_announce3&n=5) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_campaign_manager_announce3&n=6) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_campaign_manager_announce3&n=7)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=new_campaign_manager_announce3&n=8).

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The Foundation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=1df7e2da7854ea671c78787743aa2d057c32e4b39fdf208082af025c4f183f41f10517a4a663faad99cafab4012a67ccc2d308dce341c19aed88faea88bdd2f41b8ed307db5f2344fe0a8809104cd8b5

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=546fee7761b435d7be8682a426e3f94c4ed9441f8bf6eb983e2e89baa548c935f36559c47fb00afe43cd8be76ff0af682de2391b5c57759d

Hey Friend, it’s Ron DeSantis with a quick info guide on the best way you can support our mission. I am campaigning at a pace impossible for our opponents to keep up with. We have chosen to take the opposite approach of Joe Biden and Donald Trump; you don’t win elections and earn support of Americans by hiding away in your basement and feeling entitled to anything. Answer me this: How do they expect to get our country working again for the American people if they spend 0 time with the ones who will be impacted most by their decisions? I haven’t governed in Florida by hiding out, and I would never run things like this as President either.

I’m out on the trail meeting inspiring Americans every day, and I want to host even MORE town halls and campaign events, order even more yard signs and merchandise to give out, and travel around, making as many appearances as possible to spread our message.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=546fee7761b435d7be8682a426e3f94c4ed9441f8bf6eb983e2e89baa548c935f36559c47fb00afe43cd8be76ff0af682de2391b5c57759d
Donate Here

The greatest impact you could make on this team would be volunteering to donate any amount once—and then checking the box that asks you to make that donation a monthly occurrence. While this may seem like a small act, one monthly donation, from everyone that supports this mission, would give us every resource necessary (and then some) to blaze forward and defeat the Left next November. The monthly donation that hits every 30 days gives our team the extra boost we need to hit our goals and stay ahead—every time, it allows our financial team to budget our upcoming events based on the revenue we know we have supporting our ideas and plans, and it’s a constant reminder to everyone else in this race that our team is willing to put everything we can into winning and month
after month, we refuse to back down.

Without your monthly contribution, though, we run the risk of playing catch up to the deep pockets of the incumbent candidates in this race, and we risk slowing down when we are just beginning the most intense ramp up of our strategy yet. I can’t let us fall behind without reaching out to ask for your help.

It’s critical that we win this race next year, and we only have so many months to close in. Will you consider supporting the foundation of my campaign?

If you can, we’ve checked the monthly donor box for you here:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=546fee7761b435d7be8682a426e3f94c4ed9441f8bf6eb983e2e89baa548c935f36559c47fb00afe43cd8be76ff0af682de2391b5c57759d
Be the foundation of my campaign

I know what it’s going to take to win, and I’m excited to put in the work to earn your support. I’ll need you to help me go the distance because I won’t slow down, and I will never back down.

Thanks for all you do,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=546fee7761b435d7be8682a426e3f94c4ed9441f8bf6eb983e2e89baa548c935f36559c47fb00afe43cd8be76ff0af682de2391b5c57759d

Ron DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=546fee7761b435d745dba5834dddd63eadc09a8dc9afa056a5eb7e873e738fb3367d5ac8ef3493648133769c7d698d46ec158ccc71b2612d
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=546fee7761b435d7be8682a426e3f94c4ed9441f8bf6eb983e2e89baa548c935f36559c47fb00afe43cd8be76ff0af682de2391b5c57759d

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=546fee7761b435d7be8682a426e3f94c4ed9441f8bf6eb983e2e89baa548c935f36559c47fb00afe43cd8be76ff0af682de2391b5c57759d

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

| | Friend, the pandemic created many challenges for families and students, revealing gaps in our one-size-fits-all government-run school system.
---
**Many parents witnessed firsthand ...**
* Politicians and teachers unions pushing to keep schools closed
* Inadequate remote or distance learning
* Schools teaching things that were _**NOT**_ a part of the curriculum

---
**This ignited a movement to reclaim control over their children's education. **

name: David Hogg
subject: Biden just delivered for young Americans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.

---
| I’m (almost) at a loss for words sharing this announcement with you, Peter:

**President Joe Biden just announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.**

This win couldn’t have happened without the non-stop work of young leaders and activists across the country, including everyone at March For Our Lives. After four long years of protests, registering thousands of young voters, meeting after meeting, and MANY Zoom calls...we did it!!!

I’ll share more about the work young leaders did to get us to this point, but first: [_**Please split a donation of $5 today between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress PAC to help carry this momentum forward and elect the leaders we deserve.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71594517/432635701/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231015-z-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2YTE2ZThlLTVjNmItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H6JiyrvY-r2MD-bT5kXTz-rGc7oxvmxyMSI9y45XaFc=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71594518/432635702/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231015-z-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2YTE2ZThlLTVjNmItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H6JiyrvY-r2MD-bT5kXTz-rGc7oxvmxyMSI9y45XaFc=)
---
**Here’s why we can draw a direct line from our work to the Biden administration’s new Office of Gun Violence Prevention, Peter.

When we talk about electing the “leaders we deserve,” we’re talking about folks like Maxwell Frost, one of our Advisory Board members and the first Gen-Z Member of Congress.**

Maxwell served as the first National Organizing Director for March For Our Lives and really helped us level-up our organizing work, especially on behalf of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. We did everything from asking presidential candidates about opening that department if they were elected at our 2020 Gun Safety Forum to sleeping on an office floor in the Virginia House of Delegates to ensure we were able to lobby on behalf of gun violence prevention, while armed white supremacists pointed guns at them through windows.

The very first bill he introduced on the House floor was to establish a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention. Republicans blocked it, but he didn’t give up, and neither did we. Even when it became clear that NRA-sponsored politicians weren’t going to let his bill pass, President Biden stepped in. In fact, Vice President Kamala Harris introduced Maxwell at the official announcement of the Office of GVP, and Maxwell got to introduce President Biden!!

**And when we talk about leveraging the power of the youth vote, we’re talking about years of record-breaking youth voting turnout that led us to this announcement.**

In the last five years, we went from having the most pro-NRA president in American history to the most pro-gun safety president in American history. Young people were critical in electing Biden.

Our voices and votes matter. But we need to elect more young people to make sure we build power on the inside and outside of politics.

[_**Help us carry this momentum and get more life-saving sh*t done by splitting a donation of $5 between Fight for Progress PAC and Leaders We Deserve.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71594519/432635703/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231015-z-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2YTE2ZThlLTVjNmItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H6JiyrvY-r2MD-bT5kXTz-rGc7oxvmxyMSI9y45XaFc=)

We should celebrate this momentous victory, Peter — but it doesn’t mean we can slow down or stop anytime soon.

There is still so much work to be done, from tackling the climate crisis to expanding abortion access to building a country that isn’t run by the rich and powerful few.

There is a long road ahead of us, and we need your help if we’re going to score more wins, elect more young people to office, and stop the fascist takeover of our country.

[_**If you’re celebrating this victory, but are ready for the important work ahead, please split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Fight for Progress PAC to help fund our work.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71594520/432635704/139938695?refcode=BLU-FFP-20231015-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk2YTE2ZThlLTVjNmItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=H6JiyrvY-r2MD-bT5kXTz-rGc7oxvmxyMSI9y45XaFc=)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Team NextGen America
subject: The best part of waking up
body:
Will you pledge to vote in 2024?

| | Rise and shine, team! ☀️ We can’t think of a single better way to start off your day than by joining the fight to save our democracy — after you’ve had your coffee, of course! The future of our democracy depends on young voters stepping up and making our voices heard in 2024. [So once you’re caffeinated (or while you’re waiting for your coffee to brew!), will you take a second to pledge to be a voter in 2024?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71595233/432636748/-1395152916?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFjOWQ0MC01ZDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKM-5qqukA87iatyVqQivZReh6pyTSJNuWieC26MS0M=&emci=7fd8a7fc-5f68-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ac1c9d40-5d6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172) | [Pledge to vote](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71595234/432636749/1098459604?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFjOWQ0MC01ZDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKM-5qqukA87iatyVqQivZReh6pyTSJNuWieC26MS0M=&emci=7fd8a7fc-5f68-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ac1c9d40-5d6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")
---
We’re not exaggerating. 2024 isn’t a distant possibility anymore. It’s a reality we need to prepare for as soon as possible.
Your vote could unlock the future we’re all fighting for. One where diversity is celebrated, our rights are protected, and our leaders truly represent us.
Young voters like you can make that future a reality. But only if we’re willing to show up to the polls. **[Can we count on you to be a voter in the 2024 election?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71595236/432636751/-467624337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzFjOWQ0MC01ZDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eKM-5qqukA87iatyVqQivZReh6pyTSJNuWieC26MS0M=&emci=7fd8a7fc-5f68-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=ac1c9d40-5d6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=6787172)**
Have a great rest of your day!

clean_body: Will you pledge to vote in 2024? | | Rise and shine, team! ☀️ We can’t think of a single better way to start off your day than by joining the fight to save our democracy — after you’ve had your coffee, of course! The future of our democracy depends on young voters stepping up and making our voices heard in 2024. | "CTA Button" We’re not exaggerating. 2024 isn’t a distant possibility anymore. It’s a reality we need to prepare for as soon as possible. Your vote could unlock the future we’re all fighting for. One where diversity is celebrated, our rights are protected, and our leaders truly represent us. Young voters like you can make that future a reality. But only if we’re willing to show up to the polls. Have a great rest of your day! Team NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

1️⃣ **_New Hampshire:_ House Democrats propose a critical transparency bill **
In New Hampshire, following the resignation of a GOP lawmaker living outside his district while continuing to vote on legislation, [**Democrats are calling for more explicit processes to inform the House of issues with lawmakers’ residency, and encourage transparency →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/c511-KAjM3jU_4OIFtitbQ3oIi3XzTAZ2IFpRc4Gpg8kzvPyGqVKCZ-GyUx4nc3U1D53skQHyXkxIJkFlMtWmehlOPz_cEwc709BrdPXXaMXWBzvy74bt93HNm1x0JSUhtz7KX_wJasQH_Q2SbkZnkjEiu8xOKOxfV987qjWRpT2ppsX-ym0-w4E_ktKPdxmujxp-HtzHNu5fLzURsbyW6AhY-BiQH0iVf68zpkV08oVXdokGC6KtffP4uITdehcaQPWjXpoC-UepZlQAAqVky63Z_K549G9Hms7w8q5_75B1-pP3EbBmI_OJwe1apjcqkwbrbrxMPNd80kg3Aw5SfPj8umfxOymurDgZIhkNz9LXkFWitzu4z2oB4oTT6fZjiO5dkzFtihJK2FmEJ-skQk2f4kDsSgy3e1GA6ZeA5F4T0gILbofXCotNHDyxCa5feB_f0QNQid7A-nlgM5gWasSPIZIyV4K3SqRNBVTrrwZubGWpjFET8ZIumxmu7lQ2MZQ4wuc5px4C762PVJquy-C4C7sI_R-5JFPlK-5UkedayXT8yscVt3l3NDqmR5wX5BbFQT7HHScY_oJXuqZqi81z7ZSs6ZsI5waX4UQAlTPnchTQQMvaUN_Lm9DnTvpIQGPly6vn1ScBBw1NmZgh7ltGrl1VNkrmY7Uihp7CeI/40g/AJNM543DRHCis9Yrxt1-Vg/h1/dxD5xJgNsMPfBS96DCfQjkpdiJhWO9sOwhL_P_oIQYU)
2️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ Pro-democracy groups file lawsuit in defense of voting rights**
In North Carolina, pro-democracy groups filed the second lawsuit against the Republicans’ latest attack on voting rights. [**This lawsuit comes after the GOP supermajority overrode a veto to disenfranchise same-day voters →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDKyLAM7ywg-n2XNyMEADZoZ-PBSgyqnqLkEJVEToXEI7avjb0x4TNpOflGxOg3wURJP7jtmu6bEFFJ29emlriClpxOBmCcWujILUIYUDl7pM3fy2GrI3x2iumgulCzhluzhu7BZv7wBeKG46lBT4dTvcL8Bzk0x1MT6aH2lWlC_7W6kP9XXgiqMFW5bfJck3-rcVa1yNNUn3AeykX-wk00Y2Rlbb_ndlp-i4SXWQU8WsiwZ-XcNAf5f1pKN3hCQArI7jW6gF_u7sv8Xfm2VHRLRZBBsWxmuBe-UgTg57lAHE42xvVt8f_QcEvgCi4fr6-sZKVABprkH4WT0wWNizwmyxmd7YH5ytDKFLdmxFI1VWPg1Ks5hQkv78wpDzRpDNVwNnVNvYNEUiwSEg0ey8TqSwMeDXmMHS8qvbmKxslmb50qmWy_aez3E40cuGWeX5xtVn_XjugOcqUxiDxuz7QLqxRFoRZ9fuByuuWnC7BKPIRgkoeMSDZVdYPhP8ELau_xw6CgMKfjKbtzlafLtK2klGYFxU4kaUKMUqHSrAXElxP3tiO2MW7ZK71kBIa8nJBj0unKmp4d3qZuoP9DxScELQ3gLu1cuzrnfh7iUsqQT56HanGM_iviMORqxAKYdZevGQTHi8zQfZ-tJE3MOCK6O0eDUvw_g1zje_9QokIrfH/40g/AJNM543DRHCis9Yrxt1-Vg/h2/TXJm3eTBOS2lN22bf4s-s3qkAZTBKx0uybhz2tQgv80)
3️⃣ **_Georgia:_ Senate Republicans seek punitive actions against GA DA Fani Willis for Trump charges **
In Georgia, eight Senate Republicans filed a complaint against DA Fani Willis, in a desperate attempt to undermine her authority and shield former president Trump from accountability. [**Their complaint claimed she “improperly cherry-picked cases” →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDO9V8dJzdKCltwJugXH_bwUNYFqHCsMRuWjpYO6cyqNlhSwu_hiSkOoHzIeW1l99mQc0qQKE0ruQugjtZlMP4ex1ad0B6aUZKaNG3fzsWPfZmJsMkTap7hr1Fkyed7Npw8_nuoKwQUyMeasgZTr-5hB97JsdbJlgt5B6QT7yqsiGOeIlGre8tZ8minNbrSyRGeLcgwYADkiZCaDaAXJqkSA_JqRfJpaK9roWxCxQGfBFuIK-yZilVMqG0eQy7t36uVRIBu1y0uQK_MzRLxMhgU8KIg7YlFV8wGUI0W0RuIUADKkuZjvBiKRO6Vzo7lQT1_zmIZ56P6YDd_QzAK0sjEokWmfBO6wirGrjKbo2kNBLtafR-kTomWO72EMyUghh_37VrGt3IXA0q4Vjr7E3TChoprrIQj7wm0GmxRpWqyHt-8SqyM5zNpXU6oN3p-zDWdCZGKEyXSWQYmkxldcR_EymJrxiynO-nFPk7dZSrH8opG-G9pDjqugO_8xNAZLCIUJ_ZOKUrYAUfPjFzUy8L4-d7kpbjxRh5dea1RPSXZlUfy1rNRGS4zxXNuZTY6cc0DidkNjSMfWgydb_7lNrUSr587vd9IL5V3GM_Y1wAbyTqzmkmTxvt5Y6ZHJ9tBJ8omu0ABLjgh5mnFASlpFXywLvSYRApFE4j7cGhj1WfLkR/40g/AJNM543DRHCis9Yrxt1-Vg/h3/xBMbve6c1qjD08p7SWlJ1ymJl5X-rjKUq4A5ET5c1lw)
4️⃣ **_Wisconsin:_ Newly elected Supreme Court Justice rejects unfounded GOP calls for recusal **
In Wisconsin, as a recently filed lawsuit draws national attention to the state’s gerrymandered maps, Justice Janet Protasiewicz is facing impeachment threats from GOP lawmakers concerned with keeping their tight grip on the legislature. [**However, Justice Protasiewicz took a strong stand in the face of Republicans' threats, saying she would not recuse herself from these types of cases →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTEBokwJ0izHXMWrpJl2hHyPnywfzN3Gz-fqabeTXV7JQYxO8L-Etf4Ert8kJam-2isfd4j_vxgj6fBYNuw1Dc0i7udSeriG_TDGGSAtxQRoWPBdEOwxlzVWDD8RO2VYJi1Sy9fycyIDbTHehPZ5ZjBDpk3qxbEa-W_XZzz1VmyaDP6N3GyuBkhjCH57HG4KsI6_VrxoGqgi43nbOVaVNjUKAHUpkT2jpau5nrepoI4TRG-ElKJFDlRct6JmfbtAO55OkoQWImvlFGgRoOjmS0cdj-Fn7G7lQ6bK2-9q2e-WEfGRh6_gu8XZB1jul323a2wg8ktUKuFXA6LvQVJ0A0lVQMG4vFf1h69Cd2DW1fdC70idoEkw9ezGtxGyZOluZ2goZO1wST7uPKj0jByjCb1uBw2kla4np83QF1Gol1Rb-83H6TUfz5ACfMOhAyR-nh6VcHXNMmR2WMIZwH-wxKKxd_G1_oOqex3l_TSR_zbKbXPFRpOQXr_lfJwMNyjPuPjjwd-3wBK70VMxyuQjPeyFsTuUq-5TE2g9PmM9q48bjY9Q_-W36uwtqf6Y9N8oMHFY4US3RaqL5clYaPERJsK9sYFViryYzAw8gKeK39xjPHONeGmVk9I9lCVHpBy66g/40g/AJNM543DRHCis9Yrxt1-Vg/h4/xNBo9v7ZxKkh0RT01syhC4yUhjzzaWe6klktz671idU)
**🗳️ _Special Elections:_ Democrats prepare for upcoming races **

We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records.

Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser.

_**Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter.

Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter.

Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter.**_

Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: My opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
With Trump’s endorsement, Kari Lake is surely raking in pledges of support and donations from the MAGA-right.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231015-1&t=1&akid=1333%2E734936%2EKLDHKd)
Kari Lake announced her campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona this week. With Trump’s endorsement, she’s surely raking in pledges of support and donations from the MAGA-right — money she will use to run a vicious campaign. And she will spend every dollar she raises to beat me.
[**If that’s all you need to hear, I am personally asking you to make a donation to my campaign today — before our mid-month deadline at midnight. Kari Lake isn’t going to have any problem raking in big checks from the MAGA faithful, but we can’t count on airdrops of cash from billionaires to save us. We’d never run a campaign like that. Virtually every single dollar we raise comes from people like you. And that’s why I need you to chip in today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231015-1&t=2&akid=1333%2E734936%2EKLDHKd)
With the Senate hanging in the balance and Arizona the most critical swing state in the nation, there are a lot of eyes on this race. Now that Lake has announced — with Trump’s enthusiastic endorsement — it is more important than ever that we do everything we can to win in Arizona.
And I’m not just running against Kari Lake. Kyrsten Sinema is set to announce her campaign any day now. She has nearly $11 million in the bank — a massive sum to start a campaign with. And just like Kari Lake, she’ll spend whatever she must to beat me and save her job in the Senate.
I’ve never run statewide before. Both Lake and Sinema have. Millions of people are going to see my name on the ballot for the first time next year. I need to raise a huge amount of money to meet those voters and make sure they know the stakes in this election.
[**So with Lake officially in the race, please: Chip in $3 to my campaign today. It would be your first donation, but an important one. To win in Arizona, and to save the Senate. I hope I can count on you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231015-1&t=3&akid=1333%2E734936%2EKLDHKd)

When I was just a kid, sleeping on the floor in the apartment my mom got us after my dad left, I never would’ve thought this is how it would end up — running for Senate to defend our democracy. But here we are.
It means a lot to me that you have my back.
Thank you.
Ruben

| | Patriot,

---
There’s no other way to say it: The fate of the First Amendment is on the line come Monday...
---
_Crooked Joe is attempting to have me_** _GAGGED_** _in federal court for the remainder of the election._
---
The gag order that his corrupt DOJ is requesting is said to be so broad and vague that it would prevent me from even _criticizing_ Biden.
---
With each passing day under the Biden regime, our country is looking less and less like America and more and more like a Third World Marxist dictatorship operating in broad daylight.

---
But no matter what happens on Monday, I want you to remember this:

---
**_Patriotism can NEVER be “gagged!”_**
---
_While Crooked Joe tries to strip me of my right to free speech, I will nevertheless be out on the campaign trail on Monday, speaking directly to the great people of Iowa.
_
---
Patriot, I gave you my word that we would save our country in 2024...

---
And I hope by now you see that no matter how many lies, vicious attacks, sham indictments, unjust arrests, or even mugshots that Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats throw at us, I will _**NEVER** **SURRENDER**_ our country to their tyranny.

---
Because every step of the way, no matter how dark these days may be for our country, patriots like YOU continue to be the source of my hope, my courage, and my unbreakable resolve to SAVE AMERICA!
---
_Of course, let me just say that if you are doing poorly right now due to the Crook in the White House who is setting the world on fire, then just hit the back button and go about your day. In that case, please don’t even think about donating!_

While Republican governors, like Ron DeSantis in Florida and Greg Abbott in Texas, focus their cultural extremist war on banning books, their states are seeing mass shootings and gun violence.

**Instead of passing gun safety reform to protect children in school, their only focus is banning books.**

In Florida, librarians could even face felony charges if they don’t comply with the new book bans.

**All of this is under the guise of “protecting children from inappropriate content.” Yet, they refuse to protect our children from gun violence.**

[_**We refuse to put up with Republican hypocrisy. That’s why we’re standing with librarians who are standing up to GOP bullies like DeSantis and Abbott. Will you sign on and join us?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71598929/432649423/191755510?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTE2MTQ1NmYtNjI2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fvefGou-GShZo1311q-0q5F8nmGza-vDv-wWshnnHEw=&emci=d078fbe0-d969-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=5161456f-626b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Tonight at midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
I'll get right to it, folks – **our mid-month deadline is tonight at midnight.**

Here's why this matters: Everyone from election analysts to my potential GOP opponents comb through our numbers to determine the overall strength of our grassroots team. If we show any signs of weakness, we could be putting this seat – and Democrats' Senate majority – in serious jeopardy.

**That's why we absolutely _must_ reach our $75,000 mid-month goal by midnight tonight. But with time running out, I'm falling incredibly short.**

[_So please, I'm asking directly: Will you chip in $10 or more right now to split between my campaign and Zak Malamed’s to help hit our critical mid-month fundraising goal, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue? Let's show Mitch McConnell and his megadonor allies that this seat isn't up for grabs._](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/23-rosen-split?amount=10?source=em231015-zm-jr-split-90do&refcode2=446_8507_ouPLtQ&akid=446%2E8507%2EouPLtQ)

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Colin Allred
subject: All hat, no cattle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08b81c66-5f44-4ed6-9a8c-19f9dc0ff0d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7015bf5e-ce84-4864-a29f-bd1a2f11e62b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I thought my days of putting people on the ground were over when I left the NFL. Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Will you donate now to me and Blue Amp Actin to help build our grassroots movement and defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. body:
Here’s what we accomplished in the third fundraising quarter of the year -- thanks to the generosity of supporters like you: | | |
---
We outdid ourselves last quarter and I couldn’t be prouder of this team. [**I hope you’ll take just a minute to read about what we accomplished together in the third fundraising quarter of the year, and then consider making your first contribution to the campaign to keep building our momentum heading into 2024.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZMfJjR1YRsu2onYECWuIPGERAqR1hIndceQ2ng9uEZ0iwYJd3cuaqsxRZFLsf4vafNKrGMJyYMgVYdgMybyCTZACs2enkzH3Fxo10MGbwIv_tCE-zx4KS7XAcGK0qot0Mh8MgD6Lgo62gSni5mUFoHmvyesMZU1-XcgdmBE0KARGPQpy8Nuo8AGjqvPtak6jpjkNWLtSTH7LQ2WmtQDe13MTJgAsNaN3OMVD70iX9J0of3JiDlI9FEaSmU9gk676-9bQH_iDG-OeEditXtZerC_c-1hvsD3AJFjn0uGEAv29JRbfGnhJsCUn1PpM8-uc8sFZ44FJ6WjQWL0SUXHNq_zJ6FJr5yMML32zk91yLmnQ/40g/X2sY2KnfTACTK13oSUE_-g/h0/T84EgqgcGjQR_VpgMjW9Pa7A-YMRg0GsW_1Dpxl1Mfk) **I am thrilled to share that thanks to the generosity of this grassroots team, we raised $70 MILLION last quarter to help reelect Joe and Kamala. Nearly 500,000 donors chipped in across the country which is truly incredible.** Even more importantly, we _doubled_ our base of recurring donors this quarter. Over 100,000 donors have made the commitment to donate monthly to sustain our campaign for the long haul. Together, we showed that grassroots supporters are the backbone of our campaign. We are so lucky to have you on the team, Peter. There’s so much to say, but here are some more snippets of what we’ve accomplished: ➡️ 124,000 new donors joined our team and are committed to reelecting Joe and Kamala. ➡️ $40.81 was our average contribution size -- a testament to the small-dollar donations that keep our grassroots campaign running strong! ➡️ Teachers and nurses were among the most common professions of our dedicated supporters. These stats really say it all: Folks are ready to reelect Joe and Kamala, and keep building on the progress we’ve made together. Your support _now_ is helping us invest in organizing across the country, registering voters, getting our message out, and more. That groundwork is critical as we look ahead to 2024. clean_body: Here’s what we accomplished in the third fundraising quarter of the year -- thanks to the generosity of supporters like you: | | | We outdid ourselves last quarter and I couldn’t be prouder of this team. I am thrilled to share that thanks to the generosity of this grassroots team, we raised $70 MILLION last quarter to help reelect Joe and Kamala. Nearly 500,000 donors chipped in across the country which is truly incredible. Even more importantly, we doubled our base of recurring donors this quarter. Over 100,000 donors have made the commitment to donate monthly to sustain our campaign for the long haul. Together, we showed that grassroots supporters are the backbone of our campaign. We are so lucky to have you on the team, Peter. There’s so much to say, but here are some more snippets of what we’ve accomplished: ➡️ 124,000 new donors joined our team and are committed to reelecting Joe and Kamala. ➡️ $40.81 was our average contribution size -- a testament to the small-dollar donations that keep our grassroots campaign running strong! ➡️ Teachers and nurses were among the most common professions of our dedicated supporters. These stats really say it all: Folks are ready to reelect Joe and Kamala, and keep building on the progress we’ve made together. Your support now is helping us invest in organizing across the country, registering voters, getting our message out, and more. That groundwork is critical as we look ahead to 2024. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you so much for your support -- you are the reason that our campaign is in such a strong position heading into the final quarter of the year. I’m excited to see what we do together from here. Thank you, Julie Julie Chavez Rodriguez Campaign Manager, Biden-Harris 2024

subject: The cash disadvantage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
The amount of cash my opponent has to spend this early in the race is astonishing. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=46d2eda7938b4a7aa47b9cd2de544cf5&_t=bpTFTu4N1JLjUwpb0ztt4otFRq08r447G9gphddSZFYk8k8_Ub_4SZAkQtmUnKEyR12EHkPnZ-D0z7_F2pT8lst11erycbHgQa70ZgY8HCc%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=46d2eda7938b4a7aa47b9cd2de544cf5&_t=bpTFTu4N1JLjUwpb0ztt4otFRq08r447G9gphddSZFYk8k8_Ub_4SZAkQtmUnKEyR12EHkPnZ-D0z7_F2pT8lst11erycbHgQa70ZgY8HCc%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=46d2eda7938b4a7aa47b9cd2de544cf5&_e=CMr7L3gwHvJLXLWx3sohoUfdxIAQMMOZ6lO5ZyN4Nkh77BsF_hCzT8p-hGVTkUsDcDfm9d8lEshu3A271zYkXxeck2dvV0XaJ6znghMJVIdKiTmQmkEQG8G0-FVc6QIpNwxSYs8Nbgv7AaN0kwCMXYkeitAOcNNy_P6ia37BDvQgtdJDsvDW7paqARm7zg9q7XLwqxs8FdC13JbrTbeHbaC9CLuS84dbI7z5V0GQGSjY6vzNqjh7mdAG7COC7kERpt-woPzGKbZbrMW8edUoA__Yz-ID5zV_-a-qx5CYhebbmmlHtJxOAeOpBbToqdh3VnPIh1NHIt-6f2Cef8cn58cter1he4ZJ2lPBJHfYSo-1sx8KTrsW3btbqV4N-9nYqGS1RgXNHsncGCWzY2Fm6AZkKbu-LTJIN3ubjT1JDa8%3D)

Peter,

We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records.

Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser.

_**Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter.

Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter.

Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter.**_

Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign.

**Given that more than $170,000,000 was spent on the 2020 Montana Senate race, there is going to be plenty more coming in from Tester’s biggest fans - elitists on the liberal coasts - to ensure they keep a strong liberal vote in office. **

Peter, the Senate majority runs through Montana. **[I’m asking you to chip in something](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=46d2eda7938b4a7aa47b9cd2de544cf5&_e=CMr7L3gwHvJLXLWx3sohoUfdxIAQMMOZ6lO5ZyN4Nkh77BsF_hCzT8p-hGVTkUsDcDfm9d8lEshu3A271zYkXxeck2dvV0XaJ6znghMJVIdKiTmQmkEQG8G0-FVc6QIpNwxSYs8Nbgv7AaN0kwCMXYkeitAOcNNy_P6ia37BDvQgtdJDsvDW7paqARm7zg9q7XLwqxs8FdC13JbrTbeHbaC9CLuS84dbI7z5V0GQGSjY6vzNqjh7mdAG7COC7kERpt-woPzGKbZbrMW8edUoA7rdfDOBlGz4tyS5TFhruZ8pQB7q9j1CiA-ycPvbUJ8X6iL1gRiYUv7QPX4zorzRj8MJ-afger55bh300xF0xLCH2_UBqFUPOAc7rOwYgLuw4bJ8PrK3gUK8f9XSyPeLTSWbm2MxnVPlQBEzkpwG3MI%3D)** – anything – right now because we need to take back our country from the Democrats and career politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Jon Tester.

clean_body: The amount of cash my opponent has to spend this early in the race is astonishing. | | Peter, We’re a little more than a year out from the election and already Jon Tester is breaking fundraising records. Jon Tester is a lot of things: A DC career politician, #1 recipient of lobbyist cash, a liberal hypocrite, and a footsoldier for Biden and progressive Democrats. One thing he is not is a weak fundraiser. Tester raised $5 million in the 1st quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 2nd quarter. Tester raised $5 million in the 3rd quarter. Tester now has more than $13 million cash-on-hand to spend on his re-election campaign. Given that more than $170,000,000 was spent on the 2020 Montana Senate race, there is going to be plenty more coming in from Tester’s biggest fans - elitists on the liberal coasts - to ensure they keep a strong liberal vote in office. Peter, the Senate majority runs through Montana. – anything – right now because we need to take back our country from the Democrats and career politicians like Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Jon Tester. Team Malliotakis here! We've got an **IMPORTANT** date approaching and we wanted you to be in the know.

We're in the final days of October and you know what that means: **OUR END OF MONTH FUNDRAISING DEADLINE IS NEARLY HERE.**

name: Team DeSantis
subject: These are innocent civilians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsxHEYTiNW

We have a message to anyone defending the atrocious acts of
Iran-backed Hamas. Read here.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osxHEYTiNW

Friend,

We're witnessing Israel's darkest hour... and American liberal
elites are out in the streets shouting that these innocent
Israeli civilians that are being senselessly murdered in the name
of hatred... got what was coming to them.

"More than 30 Harvard University student organizations released a
joint statement saying they "hold the Israeli regime entirely
responsible for all unfolding violence," after Hamas attacked
Israeli citizens over the weekend." - Deseret News

As
Americans, we should be OUTRAGED.

HOW
can a society rooted in peace and democracy justify the murder of
innocent people, the raping of young women and girls, and the
beheading of babies?

HOW, after the horror that our country witnessed during the 9/11
attack on our home, can ANYONE defend atrocious acts of
terrorism?

HOW
can President Joe Biden not be rallying this country behind our
ally and severing every tie we have with Iran as they back Hamas?

The
indoctrination of this country has gone so far that liberals no
longer recognize the horror before them. The Left has planted the
seeds of propaganda in higher education, from praising the CCP to
now justified murder.

If
the propaganda of the Left has led to terrorism being defended,
there is NO telling what the young people of our country will be
convinced to believe next.

We
MUST put an end to this. Our country desperately needs a
President who will stand STRONG in defense of freedom, deliver a
clear message on the situation our world is facing, and act. Not
a President like Joe Biden who will bow down to liberal globalist
institutions who defend these horrific acts of terror.

Support Ron DeSantis for President TODAY.

Strength. Decisive action. Discipline. Dedication. Focus.

These are the qualities that Ron DeSantis will bring to the Oval
Office when he shows Joe Biden how to handle a crisis. He is the
ONLY candidate in this race who never forgets where true north
is.

DONATE TODAY TO RESTORE A STRONG EXECUTIVE.

RUSH IN $47

When innocent people are being murdered, you will never see Ron
DeSantis hosting a barbecue at the White House like our current
"Commander-In-Chief."

In
Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.
