Friend, We're witnessing Israel's darkest hour... and American liberal elites are out in the streets shouting that these innocent Israeli civilians that are being senselessly murdered in the name of hatred... got what was coming to them. "More than 30 Harvard University student organizations released a joint statement saying they "hold the Israeli regime entirely responsible for all unfolding violence," after Hamas attacked Israeli citizens over the weekend." - Deseret News As Americans, we should be OUTRAGED. HOW can a society rooted in peace and democracy justify the murder of innocent people, the raping of young women and girls, and the beheading of babies? HOW, after the horror that our country witnessed during the 9/11 attack on our home, can ANYONE defend atrocious acts of terrorism? HOW can President Joe Biden not be rallying this country behind our ally and severing every tie we have with Iran as they back Hamas? The indoctrination of this country has gone so far that liberals no longer recognize the horror before them. The Left has planted the seeds of propaganda in higher education, from praising the CCP to now justified murder. If the propaganda of the Left has led to terrorism being defended, there is NO telling what the young people of our country will be convinced to believe next. We MUST put an end to this. Our country desperately needs a President who will stand STRONG in defense of freedom, deliver a clear message on the situation our world is facing, and act. Not a President like Joe Biden who will bow down to liberal globalist institutions who defend these horrific acts of terror. Support Ron DeSantis for President TODAY. Strength. Decisive action. Discipline. Dedication. Focus. These are the qualities that Ron DeSantis will bring to the Oval Office when he shows Joe Biden how to handle a crisis. He is the ONLY candidate in this race who never forgets where true north is. DONATE TODAY TO RESTORE A STRONG EXECUTIVE. RUSH IN $47 When innocent people are being murdered, you will never see Ron DeSantis hosting a barbecue at the White House like our current "Commander-In-Chief." In Freedom, Team DeSantis Get to Know Ron DeSantis Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now. name: Team Slotkin
subject: A lot has happened in our race recently
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=733%2E135344%2E5lNXKd)

Friends --
A LOT has happened the last six weeks in the Michigan Senate race. So to keep you up to date, and to explain plain and simple why your support really matters in our campaign, we wanted to lay out our big updates clear as day:
**FIRST:** In early September, Republican former Congressman Mike Rogers got in the race. Mike will try to paint himself as a moderate, but in his first two weeks in the race, he put out a video — as a former FBI officer – attacking the FBI, calling them “corrupt” for going after Trump. And his extreme record in Congress speaks for itself. He supports abortion bans even in the cases of rape, incest, and common miscarriage. And he has advocated to privatize Social Security.
**THEN:** James Craig, a Republican former Detroit Police Chief and the most Trump-aligned potential candidate, has jumped into the race. He is against any additional gun safety laws, he opposes all abortion, including for victims of rape and incest, and denied the results of the 2020 election. And most recently, he has been on conservative radio and talk shows promoting his campaign and attacking Elissa.
**NOW:** A new public poll came out in October showing a messy Republican primary for the Michigan Senate race, National Republicans launched digital attack ads against Elissa, and Donald Trump has made two visits to Michigan to ignite the Republican base.
So here’s where we’re at:
In response to these two new opponents, we need to share our positive, affirming message about Elissa with voters across Michigan in order to combat the inevitable negative attacks from whoever our eventual Republican opponent is.
But that takes resources.
[**That’s why we’re asking for your help. If everyone reading this email contributed just $10, we’d be able to continue building the early foundation we need to ensure success down the line. It all adds up, and the important thing is that you're in it with Elissa today. So, please contribute any amount you can today.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-oct23.ttRNnI&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=2&akid=733%2E135344%2E5lNXKd)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A quick note for Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4235%2E5257348%2E5d-9lC)
Hey Derek, it’s Adam. I wanted to share a quick note about our deadline at midnight **tonight**.
Throughout this campaign, you’ve stepped up to help our team respond to the relentless attacks MAGA Republicans have thrown my way while we build what we hope will be the largest grassroots campaign in the history of California. When Donald Trump launched baseless attacks against me and his allies censured me for doing my constitutional duty, you stood by my side.
We all know Donald Trump isn’t going to allow the legal process in his multiple criminal cases to play out quietly while he runs for president once again. He’ll follow his usual playbook, placing himself above the rule of law and attacking anyone who played an important role in holding him accountable. Just last month, he sought to _throw out_ the charges against him in Georgia — charges based on the evidence I helped present on the January 6 Committee.
Unfortunately for Trump and his cronies, I’m not stopping now, and I never will. No matter what he throws at me. It means the world to me to have you by my side, which is why I’m humbly asking:
**[Ahead of our first mid-month deadline of the FEC quarter tonight, will you pitch in $3 to my campaign for U.S. Senate? Your grassroots support powers my work, fuels our campaign’s voter outreach efforts, and helps my team respond to the MAGA attacks.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=oct2023_abs_em.EYisyV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_AC90_20231015_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4235%2E5257348%2E5d-9lC)**

Throughout this campaign, you’ve stepped up to help our team respond to the relentless attacks MAGA Republicans have thrown my way while we build what we hope will be the largest grassroots campaign in the history of California. When Donald Trump launched baseless attacks against me and his allies censured me for doing my constitutional duty, you stood by my side. We all know Donald Trump isn’t going to allow the legal process in his multiple criminal cases to play out quietly while he runs for president once again. He’ll follow his usual playbook, placing himself above the rule of law and attacking anyone who played an important role in holding him accountable. The Republican party is in chaos, team. They recently made history by removing their own Speaker of the House for the first time in history \- simply because he had the nerve to work with Democrats to keep the government running. Now they're intent on replacing him with someone even more radical — and Jim Jordan is one of the candidates. body:

_**The Texas primary election is less than five months away._**
That means in just a few months, we’ll know who our Democratic nominee is. To ensure we have the resources to implement our plan to show Ted Cruz the door to retirement, we have to hit all of our fundraising goals.
But we’re halfway through October, and we’re a bit behind where we need to be at this point in the month.

name: Courier Newsroom HQ
subject: Short and sweet
body:
Can you be one of the supporters we need to help us reach our $7k mid-month fundraising goal?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71607166/432677611/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE5MzY5YjMtNmY2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X5x5NvbXI_C4-32-kAHCxj0J9gtiXN-VK2W-UDkYUtQ=&emci=d08bbd8c-e369-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=fa9369b3-6f6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=14016711)
We'll be brief, Peter.
With the 2024 election in full swing, conspiracy theories, lies, and just plain bad information are exploding at an alarming rate.
Stopping the spread of bad information takes resources, so we rely on grassroots supporters like you to help our nine battleground state newsrooms stay on the frontlines of this work.
With our mid-month fundraising deadline just hours away, we ran our October fundraising numbers. **Here’s where we’re at:**
**[Right now, we’re roughly $2,100 short of reaching our $7,000 mid-month fundraising goal. Can you be one of the supporters we need to help us close the gap by pitching in right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71607168/432677624/-932789540?refcode=em20231015&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE5MzY5YjMtNmY2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X5x5NvbXI_C4-32-kAHCxj0J9gtiXN-VK2W-UDkYUtQ=)**
**The unfortunate (and ugly) truth is that right-wing bad actors like Donald Trump, Tucker Carlson, and Fox News have spent decades building their propaganda machine.**
If we’re going to go toe-toe with their money, power, and reach, it’s essential that we have the resources we need to hire great journalists to correct the record and cover the stories that actually impact people’s lives.
**Think of it this way:** by contributing what you can, when you can, you’re powering the incredible work our network of nine newsrooms do and strengthening our democracy by fighting bad information with good information.
**[So, with just hours to go until our mid-month fundraising deadline, can you chip in anything right now to help us reach our $7,000 fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71607171/432677633/-932789540?refcode=em20231015&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE5MzY5YjMtNmY2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X5x5NvbXI_C4-32-kAHCxj0J9gtiXN-VK2W-UDkYUtQ=)**

clean_body: Can you be one of the supporters we need to help us reach our $7k mid-month fundraising goal? We'll be brief, Peter. With the 2024 election in full swing, conspiracy theories, lies, and just plain bad information are exploding at an alarming rate. Stopping the spread of bad information takes resources, so we rely on grassroots supporters like you to help our nine battleground state newsrooms stay on the frontlines of this work. With our mid-month fundraising deadline just hours away, we ran our October fundraising numbers. Here’s where we’re at: = The unfortunate (and ugly) truth is that right-wing bad actors like Donald Trump, Tucker Carlson, and Fox News have spent decades building their propaganda machine. If we’re going to go toe-toe with their money, power, and reach, it’s essential that we have the resources we need to hire great journalists to correct the record and cover the stories that actually impact people’s lives. Think of it this way: by contributing what you can, when you can, you’re powering the incredible work our network of nine newsrooms do and strengthening our democracy by fighting bad information with good information. = = Thanks! Courier Newsroom HQ Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

Every little detail counts. How the ballot measure is framed and how long it appears on the ballot can make a huge impact on whether or not a voter will support the measure. When voters have little to no information about a measure, they’re more likely to answer “yes” when it’s written in simple, easy-to-understand language. Another factor that impacts ballot measures is placement — especially when some ballots can be multiple pages. It makes sense: the longer the ballot, the less likely voters are to complete it. So if the ballot measure is at the bottom of the ballot, voters are more likely to skip it completely — missing out on an opportunity to make a direct impact in their communities. And as always, there’s the fundraising and public outreach battle between both sides of any ballot measure that now is becoming more and more competitive. **Our team at The Fairness Project is working with partners across the country to power up and win ballot measures that impact people’s daily lives.** >From raising the minimum wage to expanding Medicaid to protecting abortion rights, we’re dedicated to using ballot measures to pass progressive policies. We know that when voters are encouraged to participate in direct democracy, progressive policies win. That’s why we’re fighting for progressive issues like paid sick leave, increased minimum wage, and reproductive healthcare to make it to different ballots across the country. |
#
Team — I have a personal request: **[Will you pitch in to our campaign before midnight ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71607922/432680221/1669815119?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_MMG_AC60_20231015_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNmI2ZWUxMy03MjZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ry5A2lNKbJc8K7lrsORQYd2YeUeOi1LOu93svlIcbvs=)** Let me explain why this deadline is so crucial: As House Republicans create endless chaos and pivot farther to the right, Senate Democrats are an essential stopgap on their extremism. Without our Democratic caucus, standing strong against the House GOP’s MAGA agenda, who knows what terrible laws they would send to a Republican-controlled Senate... name: Jon Soltz
subject: Your help really is appreciated.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Know how we know you’re one of VoteVets most committed supporters?
#
Derek,
Know how we know you’re one of VoteVets most committed supporters?
You’re reading this email. Over the years, a ton of people have joined us. But not everybody stays up to date with the work we’re doing. You have, and just opening this email and reading to this point is a good sign that you have our back, even if we haven’t convinced you to donate yet.
And that’s good, because we need your help.
Tommy Tuberville is holding up more senior Military promotions than ever. Tensions are escalating, from Ukraine to Israel. The House is in absolute chaos. And to top it all off, today is our mid-month deadline.
If we raise enough we can support more strong candidates — candidates who can win at the state level in Virginia, or who can take back the House, or expand our margin in the Senate. We can run ads around the country — ads that can swing races and win elections.
If we don’t raise enough, we have to scale back. And our foes in the GOP will notice... they’ll start making plans of their own, and that could lead to barrages of attack ads that can sink a campaign.
That’s why it’s really important that we put up a big number.
So please. If you make your first donation today, we will get there.
**[Can you make your first donation of $5 before tomorrow’s deadline at midnight? Every donation helps, and with thousands of people joining you we will reach our goal.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.zemByr&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=1&akid=17426%2E3013755%2EPT5cSN)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Rush $5 now](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.LcPALz&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=2&akid=17426%2E3013755%2EPT5cSN)**

****
| **[Another Amount](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-oct23.LcPALz&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=3&akid=17426%2E3013755%2EPT5cSN)**
---
****
Your donation will send a message that we’re ready for anything, and we’re on a path to victory. Thanks for adding your first.
With you in this fight,
Jon Soltz
Iraq Veteran, US Army
Founder of VoteVets

name: Shawn Wilson
subject: A personal note about the results of yesterday’s election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Our work is not over yet.

From the bottom of my heart – I want to thank you for believing in me and the movement we built together. Our campaign accomplished so much together – making sure critical issues like protecting Medicaid expansion, prioritizing community safety, and strengthening our public education system were at the forefront of the race for Governor. We listened to the voices of Louisiana voters. We empowered community leaders. We brought new folks into the electoral process. But here’s the reality: Yesterday did not go as we had hoped. Jeff Landry will be the next Governor of Louisiana. The results of yesterday’s election do not change or impact my unwavering commitment to the people of Louisiana. I will continue to fight for you and our communities however I can best do so. **_[But right now, I have to make one final request. My campaign has a few more expenditures to pay off before we can close the books on our campaign and begin the next fight for progress in our state. Please consider a final donation to our campaign, because the work of creating a safer, smarter, healthier, and wealthier state continues>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71608396/432682032/158767521?refcode=ea.20c79fe5-736b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.20c79fe5-736b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBjNzlmZTUtNzM2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h-HgZh9jYhss4x0eFYunaKw_B_SQ8Lnk_3CK8FkcrLc=)_** **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71608397/432682033/158767521?refcode=ea.20c79fe5-736b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.20c79fe5-736b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQzOTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjBjNzlmZTUtNzM2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h-HgZh9jYhss4x0eFYunaKw_B_SQ8Lnk_3CK8FkcrLc=)** Thank you. subject: America’s on the verge of collapse.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
SAVE AMERICA!

| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4fd7a9cbf7f34ea6b27ddc0079a16e4a&_e=ng3y5sKyfkHGfQiT6dlsc88iJk-uTTesVkDxRonzaS8zKVguhjbW0bBn1csW1HW90cCHfdq55sYhXkc8PBqg8KwgSJp3am-AbNSymDeDTh8NBAdpK0ptbHZ3gF7VQu1K6j_KvPrXfvzPJpA_3E-nZAim-4ijGariPn-Yepe6wws1qMsu2VmnUHkstOXQEvDzwZobRQdgUNGWmQFkD1_cx0Y2ABIXQ6ceMDlzjUHcPeLWnC0TJnbOytdohkR9qMiHcgPFvu5V9BidLbsUoDWMHsExoRGSynf4b6JnR1tFeI-CsaC06t7QSFxXARkHqKsO0z9LHlwdQIfopHlU9fs0A0w-lnbawoiG9nyUbBgIwVQ%3D)

Friend,

Our nation and our children's future is on the verge of collapse.

We're not in tenuous times - we're in DANGEROUS TIMES.

The time for family holidays and relaxation is over. We have ONE YEAR to turn this country around. We MUST turn away from Joe Biden.

**_I will stop the push towards communism.

I will be the most PRO-AMERICAN SENATOR IN AMERICA! _**
| [**STAND WITH ME -- JOIN THE MOVEMENT** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4fd7a9cbf7f34ea6b27ddc0079a16e4a&_e=ng3y5sKyfkHGfQiT6dlsc88iJk-uTTesVkDxRonzaS8zKVguhjbW0bBn1csW1HW90cCHfdq55sYhXkc8PBqg8KwgSJp3am-AbNSymDeDTh8NBAdpK0ptbHZ3gF7VQu1K6j_KvPrXfvzPJpA_3E-nZAim-4ijGariPn-Yepe6wws1qMsu2VmnUHkstOXQEvDzwZobRQdgUNGWmQFkD1_cx1BCWgN_Qtj-N6C1Senk7D8nLOO-SaGOQgp7yFJMBvRUvB03ccZvtQKVsa5l5--Q0H30gwdwicULbmrkqp8gi7AtH9f8t8Gni_kPQdD2IsLWmGbXkbfMY-76HPXOnbPI84YFhg0ndzVJGCBQJp1jfe4%3D)
---

Just a few years ago, America was thriving, but since Joe Biden stumbled into the White House, we have been on a kamikaze mission toward **TOTAL DESTRUCTION.**

We have one year, that's it. If we don't start fighting back and WINNING for America and EVERYBODY who's struggled in Biden's America, this country is lost.

**It 's now or never. I need you on my team. Will you join my grassroots movement and help take back this country so we can launch an AMERICA FIRST RENAISSANCE?**

[**STAND WITH ME -- JOIN THE MOVEMENT** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4fd7a9cbf7f34ea6b27ddc0079a16e4a&_e=ng3y5sKyfkHGfQiT6dlsc88iJk-uTTesVkDxRonzaS8zKVguhjbW0bBn1csW1HW90cCHfdq55sYhXkc8PBqg8KwgSJp3am-AbNSymDeDTh8NBAdpK0ptbHZ3gF7VQu1K6j_KvPrXfvzPJpA_3E-nZAim-4ijGariPn-Yepe6wws1qMsu2VmnUHkstOXQEvDzwZobRQdgUNGWmQFkD1_cx6XaCSyJrItLipyCw4aQgzJvOgltXmbSMjbt51SWXP6PadzkTfk4JIYoqwHu9Oqq90yYo4z3_UDF1xeWpNpJQvsGfEUWzY3HA-RdKTM4v6oKf7Y382ss_nxujPncm3mU72zY-GYFiRQNVhsUYnc22m0%3D)

name: Emily W.
subject: this is why I'm all in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
everything within in my power
| | |
---
Hi, friend, it's Emily, Debbie's Digital Director. When I started this job, I knew that I was signing up for hard work and long hours. But once I met Debbie, I knew that I wanted to do absolutely everything within my power to send her to the Senate.
Can I have just a minute to explain why I'm all in on this race? **[(If you're already 100% on Team Debbie, will you chip in $5 to help us keep on growing this grassroots campaign?)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71608977/432684116/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk192-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NlMzAzOTQtNzQ2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aiVLR56CZCif5r6_RTak-BSm2RnDExLBgJ5GygZn0q8=)**
Debbie's story is America's story. She was born in Ecuador and came to the United States with her mother and sisters when she was only 14. She watched her mom work back-to-back shifts to afford rent in their small one room apartment. Debbie eventually started working at a local doughnut shop to help pay the bills.
After graduating college, Debbie started working in Florida to help build up this community that she loves. She worked at nonprofits across the state and worked to help expand health care access during her time at Florida International University. She's also been a lifelong advocate for gun reform, and has partnered with Gabby Giffords to pass common sense gun laws all over the country.
**Throughout her entire life, Debbie has been driven by a truly sincere commitment to serve her community and her country.** That journey led her to flip a key House seat from red to blue, making her the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. In Washington, she fought tirelessly for families in Florida, secured legislation to protect the Everglades, defended Social Security, and wrote the bill to expand Medicare Advantage coverage.
**Debbie's story is a story of what's possible in America. Now, she's running for Senate to make sure that families like hers can always count on the opportunities that gave her family their American Dream.** She's the real deal, friend. But her opponent couldn't be more different.
Rick Scott has spent his career lining his own pockets while threatening to cut Social Security and Medicare, trying to raise taxes on working families, and pushing the American Dream out of reach.
**Debbie is **_tied_** with him in a recent poll, and we've got a real chance to defeat him. That's why this race is so important, and why I know we can win. [But Debbie and I need you to join the team too. So please, if you have a bit extra to spare today, can you make a donation right now to help Debbie move our country forward, flip this seat blue, and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71608978/432684117/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk192-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NlMzAzOTQtNzQ2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aiVLR56CZCif5r6_RTak-BSm2RnDExLBgJ5GygZn0q8=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71608979/432684118/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk192-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2NlMzAzOTQtNzQ2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aiVLR56CZCif5r6_RTak-BSm2RnDExLBgJ5GygZn0q8=)

body:
While one donation may not seem like a lot, the collective power of thousands of donations drives our movement forward. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking for to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We have _seven_ special elections next month in critical states like South Carolina, New Hampshire, and Maine – $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re battling Republican mega-donors who are dumping millions into races nationwide. But when enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps our candidates compete against the GOP money machine. **Reason #3:** Losing means Republicans will gain an advantage in key battleground states – so $7 can help defeat extremists who are determined to tear down abortion rights and ballot access. [So what do you say? It is absolutely crucial that we meet this deadline because it’s what helps us keep the lights on, make sure we’re able to pay our staff, and most importantly, reach out to South Texans across TX-15 with Michelle’s message and vision of hope for the district.
Running a campaign against an incumbent isn’t cheap, Peter — and in our case, Monica De La Cruz has hundreds of thousands of corporate, special interest dollars behind her.
**[We don’t have the kind of resources behind us that Monica does. But we have something better — people power. To hit this goal of raising $6,241 by midnight on Tuesday, we need all hands on deck! clean_body: We have a big deadline coming up. | | | Peter, we’re halfway through October and you know what that means. Spooky season is in full swing, pumpkin spice is back, and Team Vallejo is facing our mid-month fundraising deadline. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: | We know you hear about fundraising deadlines from campaigns like ours, but the reason we set these goals is because that’s what it takes to keep a grassroots-funded campaign on track. It is absolutely crucial that we meet this deadline because it’s what helps us keep the lights on, make sure we’re able to pay our staff, and most importantly, reach out to South Texans across TX-15 with Michelle’s message and vision of hope for the district. Running a campaign against an incumbent isn’t cheap, Peter — and in our case, Monica De La Cruz has hundreds of thousands of corporate, special interest dollars behind her. ¡Vamos Por Quince! | | Patriot,

---
Tomorrow, we will find out if any semblance of _true_ justice still exists in America...
---
**_...Or, if we are now a country where Crooked Joe can_** _**_GAG_**_** _his chief political rival for the rest of the 2024 election._**
---
**But whether or not Biden and his corrupt DOJ get away with setting fire to the First Amendment tomorrow, he can**** _NEVER_****stop me from being with my incredible supporters like** _**YOU**_**!**
---
Which is why, to mark **1 YEAR OUT** from the most consequential election of our lifetimes, I’m flying one lucky winner (plus a guest of your choice) out to my special MAGA reception next month in Dallas, Texas!

---
You’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this incredible night.

---
**_And Patriot, all YOU have to do is to enter to WIN!_**

Peter, in my first campaign for Congress, I ran against Republican Ken Calvert. I was ultimately unsuccessful in my first bid, and he’s still in Congress now.

But part of the reason I was unsuccessful is something that might seem unbelievable now in 2023 – _**Ken Calvert outed me as gay in a time when being openly gay was extremely dangerous.**_

It’s so hard to be forced to come out before you’re ready, _especially when that choice is taken from you by someone maliciously trying to hurt you._

In a bright pink series of mailers, Ken Calvert took away my autonomy and my right to share my sexuality when I was ready:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71609853/432687101/236453838?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20231015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDMzMDY0My03NjZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cVVjPMO6z_r6pRBW5vPqucTS_V1WgU_MJgQuGToKJM8=)
The fact that someone like that is still in Congress today – **that someone so blatantly homophobic is making our laws** – is absolutely horrifying.

But I’m working every single day to fight back against the MAGA Party’s extreme anti-LGBTQ rhetoric and policies – and I can’t keep fighting without your help.

[**If you’re as horrified by the extreme homophobic and transphobic agenda of the far-right, I hope you’ll chip in before my mid-month deadline to ensure we Republicans like Ken Calvert no longer hold the House Majority »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71609854/432687102/236453838?amount=7&refcode=MTFC_20231015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDMzMDY0My03NjZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cVVjPMO6z_r6pRBW5vPqucTS_V1WgU_MJgQuGToKJM8=)

Fellow American - _I'll be direct with you._

We need 667 additional patriots to stand with me today to meet our mid-month goal.

**Do you want incremental reform in this country or do you want revolution?**
The future success of this campaign and our revolution is riding on us being able to show that we have momentum right now.

We need support from Americans, like you, who are tired of the status quo and tired of a system that preaches what you should and should not think. Stand with Americans who are tired of a managerial bureaucratic deep state that has tarnished the integrity of our Constitution. _**That ends now.**_

With your support, Fellow American, we can stand up to the Washington elites that have taken advantage of our complacency with this system.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: If you're ready for change, I need to know that you're with me. | | Fellow American - I'll be direct with you. We need 667 additional patriots to stand with me today to meet our mid-month goal. Do you want incremental reform in this country or do you want revolution? The future success of this campaign and our revolution is riding on us being able to show that we have momentum right now. We need support from Americans, like you, who are tired of the status quo and tired of a system that preaches what you should and should not think. Stand with Americans who are tired of a managerial bureaucratic deep state that has tarnished the integrity of our Constitution. That ends now. With your support, Fellow American, we can stand up to the Washington elites that have taken advantage of our complacency with this system. | We have a choice: If you want to defeat the social agenda being forced on you and revive American excellence, then please stand with me today. , shows that our revolution is here, supported, and ready to be realized on that debate stage and in the election next year. For America, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Letting you in on an open secret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Derek, do you ever get emails claiming to need “342 more donations from your zip code?”
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=31493%2E3422442%2E8C5v2D)
Derek, do you ever get emails claiming to need _“342 more donations from your zip code?”_
**We’re going to let you in on an open secret: those goals are fake.** Every campaign or organization worth its salt sets fundraising goals, but absolutely no one is doing things on that granular of a level.
As a consumer protection attorney, Katie has always thought fundraising tactics like those are **fundamentally dishonest**. It’s why she’s always insisted that our email program should meet the gold standard for ethical fundraising.
But that being said, we _do_ still have monthly and even weekly fundraising goals!
**Right now we’re coming up on our mid-month deadline, and we need help to stay on track to meet our goal for October.**
[**If you’re tired of all the dishonesty in politics and want to send Katie to the U.S. Senate to fight for everyday families all over California, will you pitch in $5 or anything you can before tonight’s mid-month deadline?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231015-1?refcode=EMAM15_1_MID_20231015_V1_F&refcode2=31493_3422442_8C5v2D&akid=31493%2E3422442%2E8C5v2D)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231015-1?refcode=EMAM15_1_MID_20231015_V1_F&refcode2=31493_3422442_8C5v2D&akid=31493%2E3422442%2E8C5v2D)
Thanks for your support,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAM15_1_MID_20231015_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=31493_3422442_8C5v2D&akid=31493%2E3422442%2E8C5v2D)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=31493%2E3422442%2E8C5v2D)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

subject: Reaching out about my son Ritchie

body:
| Hi Peter, if you don’t know me, my name is Debra, and I’m Ritchie’s mom. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71610403/432689409/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzdiZjAxNC03ODZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rt5lerud-sVRxZQho9ZcmUEnF_jRZUzT_cVkfrl7G5o=) I’m personally reaching out today on behalf of my son, who’s working so hard right now to give Americans like me a voice in Congress.

As you can probably imagine, I could talk about Ritchie all day, but I’ll keep this short. | [CONTRIBUTE TO SUPPORT MY SON RITCHIE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71610405/432689411/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzdiZjAxNC03ODZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rt5lerud-sVRxZQho9ZcmUEnF_jRZUzT_cVkfrl7G5o=)
---
I always knew Ritchie was going places, but I never imagined one of those places would be the U.S. House.

His path to Congress wasn’t a traditional one. **He was raised by me, a working, single mother who often supported a family of four on a $4.25 minimum wage.**

Ritchie doesn’t have a college degree, and he never relied on fancy donors or affluent connections to get him to where he is today.

**My son was able to connect with and captivate New York families because he understands their struggles — we often lived them ourselves, Peter.**

And I know that those experiences drive him _every single time_ he walks into his office in D.C.

[Peter, I know I’m biased, but there is truly no better person than Ritchie to represent NY-15. So if you can afford it, today I’m hoping you could make a $3 donation to continue supporting him. I know he would appreciate it so much. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71610407/432689413/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzdiZjAxNC03ODZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rt5lerud-sVRxZQho9ZcmUEnF_jRZUzT_cVkfrl7G5o=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Hi there, Peter.

We hope you're doing well! We wanted to personally reach out to let you know about our **impending Mid-Month fundraising deadline -_TONIGHT -_** one that our campaign has never seen before.

This is one of the few deadlines we have left before the start of 2024. Our performance directly impacts our projections for the election year. Although we aren't in cycle, **many crucial House and Senate races are - not to mention the race for President, which is truly at the forefront of this election.**

We need to be consistently meeting our fundraising goals, and right now, we just aren't. We know time is expensive, which is why we'll try to keep this short, but we really need your help. **Can Team Vance count on your financial support before our****Mid-Month deadline? ****[Click here to chip in $25 and support America-First Patriot JD Vance!](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=36bd5edee3c5448cb80951523ef4e25a&_e=e7-UYTZPwD3fsIwG-bkX4QkD0JRToQdvjEvmXOhDB_oNr-KlBgfZt-vGA2JBTkFbgeKZhGypiSv5upfKU5vZ9P1S1XvB1L0K3FCLYBjoVcHtLB1VKd2Ea4hOGoemtTe8A-7Ng3G8h-oS1HOsFXLHZt_DPnvMLWXqAwDmbIhtIHZrbsQ-sHhj23zO9Lyg9DgnUP-kxqND6GUi71ftpKaElTDzFKAxLhbz6XMrlOKB18XjDvXOZFsWI3dpGgqR0lAcNleR2P8NKvVrlW56bDvCifjIAqAqOOp_92EuXhrujkvCm1qrLuS1n2_ofgDlZImx)**

| | | Peter,

I’m reaching out to make sure you saw the email from my team yesterday and to let you know what’s at stake.

**[Our mid-month deadline is TONIGHT at MIDNIGHT,](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=a2aeff50d27e497fb78cd9186453ff92&_e=VmD8xyeaYiCxKnULadKfgXiOx3sM1jiwroUVtfshHSqnDFuL7a2tpKuGAK6WVVE22w4cnwdQNmoSMnajnhS55FLULLAyFCX6FRlvVCGawI79j3DPduo3JIoSgO4MIfGBT2QeKjXckp1HrlbI1ldYyOnoFNPoL9V8KCOIGbWMFpjyVh7hobfxX_gTq1J7gNDColzWorh9Agmg-PwPUJWMlxsWU00bEHSpJA1wyC8zjZaCsJuoffDXKtjJxpT_vQRWSz6uFfvg3SfJkjRmeysTiWI6LCqHwCgDkikJjTM4nZGGUnoYtuWfohDvAs1DFG81EbmlfM1hDhF7C1WJ4Wp-uhDhF-QKj2wJlx2PTmWjRq8%3D) and if we fail to meet our goals, we’ll be playing catchup against my opponents going into 2024.**

name: Gallego for Arizona
subject: Please: Let us explain…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We have a long way to go to raise the amount of money we need to elect Ruben in 2024 and beat Kari Lake.
#

Peter, in just a minute we are going to ask you to make your first donation to Ruben Gallego. Please, before you click away, let us explain why this donation is so important.
Back in 2022, Kari Lake ran one of the most extreme, far-right campaigns in Arizona’s political history. She lost by less than 18,000 votes — out of more than 2.5 million ballots cast.
And in Arizona’s Senate campaign in 2022, the total cost for the race was more than $230 million — one of the most expensive races in the country.
This Senate campaign in Arizona will be no less competitive. It will be no less expensive.
We had a great start. Historic. No lie.
But our momentum fell this summer. Now that Kari Lake is officially in this race, we’re getting back on track.
Here’s the thing, though: We have a long way to go to raise the amount of money we need to elect Ruben in 2024 and beat Kari Lake.
[**So, we are asking — with the Senate hanging in the balance — if you can make your first contribution to Ruben’s campaign? We will use every dollar we raise to run a campaign that can win.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231015-2&t=1&akid=1335%2E734936%2E1cr-ON)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-oct23.Ns39yQ&amount=3&refcode=em231015-2&t=2&akid=1335%2E734936%2E1cr-ON)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-oct23.Ns39yQ&refcode=em231015-2&t=3&akid=1335%2E734936%2E1cr-ON)**
---
****
Thank you for listening. We hope you can make that contribution.
Team Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

[**Tonight, our first critically important deadline in October expires and I have a very important request: Will you donate just $1 to my campaign? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71611437/432693200/417269932?amount=1&amounts=3,5,7,10&&refcode=RRFC_20231015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThhYjY0NDctN2M2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5K46X3UaywUBa1_PxMtEflJ4GN6uk_2rUujmtx0Fz70=) | [CHIP IN $1 TO RE-ELECT RAUL RUIZ! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71611449/432693204/417269932?amount=1&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=RRFC_20231015_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThhYjY0NDctN2M2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5K46X3UaywUBa1_PxMtEflJ4GN6uk_2rUujmtx0Fz70=)

Look, I know it may seem odd to ask for _just_ $1. In the grand scheme of things, it can be hard to see how a dollar can even make a difference.

**But here’s the difference, team:** My campaign doesn’t run on dark money contributions or wealthy mega-donors. **It’s built by hard-working folks like you.**

Supporters who come from families like mine. Families who want to leave their communities better than they found it. Everyday people coming together to build something greater than themselves.

And though $1 may seem symbolic, the movement it grows will be able to move mountains. **And it all starts with $1.**

name: Team Nikki
subject: Sorry to bother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Folks, We don’t usually like to bother you on a Sunday afternoon with a long email, but our reelection campaign’s mid-month fundraising deadline expires tonight at midnight. Nikki has been working tirelessly to deliver meaningful results for people in Central and Southern Illinois, like the $7.8 million contract for the Belleville Shoe Manufacturing Company from the Defense Logistics Agency for temperate weather combat boots, which will be supplied to the U.S. Army for the next two years. This is a result of Nikki’s steadfast effort to work across the aisle to support domestic military equipment manufacturing at Belleville Shoe Manufacturing Company, the oldest and leading manufacturer of boots for the U.S. Military. In July, she secured a bipartisan amendment to the _National Defense Authorization Act_ alongside Republican Congressman Mike Bost that would require the Department of Defense to examine current military footwear regulations and provide recommendations on improvements to support the footwear needs of our troops. Nikki’s ready to continue fighting to expand job opportunities, raise the federal minimum wage, and support our local economies, so we wanted to reach out to see if you’ll help our team stay on track to reach our mid-month fundraising goal so she can stay focused on passing critical legislation. National Republicans are eager to expand their House majority, and Nikki’s seat is one of their top targets, so we’ll need the resources to fight back as we prepare for next year’s election. **[Friend, will you contribute to our reelection campaign’s mid-month deadline to ensure we stay on track for October? If we miss our goals now, it could make a huge difference in the fight to hold on to Nikki’s seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71611724/432693963/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231015_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTA5MmE1ZS03YzZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HZjQwhrG3yyaTXbY8uVR_Apw_r1adgsQP1yuGcPF6o=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71611726/432693965/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231015_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTA5MmE1ZS03YzZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HZjQwhrG3yyaTXbY8uVR_Apw_r1adgsQP1yuGcPF6o=) | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71611728/432693972/-2002594886?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231015_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTA5MmE1ZS03YzZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0HZjQwhrG3yyaTXbY8uVR_Apw_r1adgsQP1yuGcPF6o=)

subject: A quick update from me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PASCRELL FOR CONGRESS, Inc
body:
Here’s what is happening in Washington

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71611740/432694015/-197340401?refocde=wrapper_hdr&ms=231015_bp_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWViMDE5NmItN2M2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KvbiMLkaHC8ZAGiJYH1guP_-ZoarlcOMTk4pYzbDyLc=)
---
Friend, The House GOP is wasting our time and taxpayer dollars with their own political infighting, an impeachment farce, and yet another looming shutdown that imperils our seniors and veterans. body:
Peter, I don't even know what happened here.
---
A few days ago, I reached out to this powerful community with an update – my mid-month deadline is getting closer and I need to raise $20,000 by midnight tonight.
From the get-go, dozens of supporters made donations to help me meet my goal. But then, out of nowhere, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our goal for October.
I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short, but I _refuse _to let it get the best of us. I’m confident in the size and strength of this grassroots team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up the gap on our final $2,137 left with only hours to go.**
**Peter******,** I’m counting on **_you_ to be one of the people I need to make a donation, so please: [**Will you donate any amount before 11:59 p.m. to support our fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71612347/432696026/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1219-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcxY2VmNC03YzZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQ2EoDQPDnfhaMR2Zej990ya4zbyEgaQmMUkAi4n53w=)

I just got out of a meeting with my finance team, and after crunching the numbers, we determined that we need to raise at _least_ $20,000 by tomorrow to get back on track.
I rely on grassroots donors like you to keep my campaign charging full steam ahead, so I have to ask: **[Will you rush $5 by midnight tomorrow to help us continue our fight for progress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71612351/432696031/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1219-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcxY2VmNC03YzZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQ2EoDQPDnfhaMR2Zej990ya4zbyEgaQmMUkAi4n53w=)**

Peter, it's thanks to supporters like you that I'm able to do my work. You have given me the ability to go head-to-head with some of the most powerful and corrupt organizations and men in the nation while knowing that they can _never_ bully me into submission.
But our hard work is far from over. With the pro-gun supporters continuing to reign nearly unchecked, far-right lawmakers attempting to control every aspect of a person's life, and powerful and corrupt men continuing to get away with unthinkable crimes, we have our work cut out for us.
**I'm up for the task, but I can _only_ do this with you, Peter. So please, before midnight tomorrow: **
**[Will you chip in $5 or more now to get me back on track to hit our mid-month goal? My fight for progress is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, and I'm counting on your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71612365/432696046/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1219-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTcxY2VmNC03YzZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TQ2EoDQPDnfhaMR2Zej990ya4zbyEgaQmMUkAi4n53w=)**
Thank you.

Letitia

Hi. It’s Roland Gutierrez, the Democratic TX State Senator running against Ted Cruz for U.S. Senate.
Ted Cruz is not a serious person. He has no idea what is really going on in Texas, and no desire to actually help the people who live here.
Cruz supports “Operation Lone Star”, a political stunt that wastes taxpayer dollars on hurting migrants, all so he can get airtime on Fox News.
He’s hurting women and children. He wants to look and act tough, but we see this for what it really is: It’s wasteful and inhumane.
Texas deserves leaders who will tell the truth and work hard to find real solutions to the problems Texas is facing. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate — but I need your help.
My opponent is backed by right-wing extremists who will do whatever it takes to keep their man in power. I’m backed by grassroots supporters who want to see real change. So if you’re with me, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em]

If we lose this district, the Left will have a clear path to take the rest of Florida - and then our chances at undoing the Biden administration’s disaster will be destroyed. | | Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

body:
We set some ambitious goals. Goals that we knew — with the continued support of our grassroots movement — we could reach.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=625%2E791427%2EjMVZjG)

Hey friend — we know it's the weekend, so we'll keep this pretty quick.
Today's the 15th, which means we're just about halfway through October.
It's been an important month for our campaign. And after hitting our FEC fundraising goals in September, our team had pretty high expectations that we could keep the momentum going.
We set some ambitious goals. Goals that we knew — with the continued support of our grassroots movement — we could reach. But the truth is, even though we're 50% through October, we're still only about 34% of the way to that goal.
Is it the end of the world? No. We still have time to get back on track.
But it does mean that we need a big day today. Especially on email, where the vast majority of our grassroots donations come from. So today's one of those days we have to ask:
**[Can you chip in a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with Ilhan Omar today? It would mean a lot to see your name on our donor list before midnight.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct23.jei10D&refcode=em231015-1-t1t2&t=2&akid=625%2E791427%2EjMVZjG)**

Peter, I was just checking Actblue to review our fundraising numbers over the past few months, and I was stunned. **_$25.28. That was our average donation last month._** **It’s indisputable proof: Since Day One, our movement has truly been people-powered, people-centric, and proud of it.** Thanks to supporters like you, I’ve been able to run the campaign I want: one that values Gen Z as the legitimate powerhouse we are. One that isn’t a piggy bank for shady special interests. One that counters fascism and hate with community and love. So, I need to shout out every single small-dollar donor who has helped build this movement. _But we cannot slow down or get complacent._ That’s why I’m counting on your support for the long haul. clean_body: | ~ Peter, I was just checking Actblue to review our fundraising numbers over the past few months, and I was stunned. $25.28. That was our average donation last month. It’s indisputable proof: Since Day One, our movement has truly been people-powered, people-centric, and proud of it. Thanks to supporters like you, I’ve been able to run the campaign I want: one that values Gen Z as the legitimate powerhouse we are. One that isn’t a piggy bank for shady special interests. One that counters fascism and hate with community and love. So, I need to shout out every single small-dollar donor who has helped build this movement. But we cannot slow down or get complacent. That’s why I’m counting on your support for the long haul. ~ | | | ~ ~ | ~ | Thank you, Maxwell ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. name: Colin Allred
subject: I hate doing laundry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, my wife Aly and I share the work of running our household and raising our boys evenly, but to be perfectly honest with you, my smile is forced in this picture – I hate doing laundry .
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
But here's one laundry list even I can get behind: the list of reasons we need to fire Ted Cruz:
*
Ted
Cruz
viciously
attacks
our
fundamental
rights
and
reproductive
freedoms
–
even
though
six
in
10
Texans
support
abortion
access.
*
Texans
deserve
a
leader
who
will
fight
for
them
–
rather
than
podcasting
three
times
a
week
or
running
off
to
vacation
when
he's
needed
most.
*
Ted
Cruz
has
parroted
dangerous,
far-right
conspiracy
theories
that
endanger
the
safety
and
accessibility
of
our
democracy
for
working
Texans.
Friend, Ted Cruz has a lot of dirty laundry – and I could keep going on for pages and pages.
But the bottom line is this: Texans can't afford six more years of an extremist like Ted Cruz. Not when he's proven that his loyalties lie only with the special interests and the mega donors that keep him in power.
Right now, polls show that Ted Cruz and I are neck and neck. We can send him and his dirty laundry packing for good, but it's going to take a huge outpouring of grassroots support to reach the millions of voters we need to win.
Can you split a donation of $5 or $10 right now between my campaign and Serve America to power my campaign to defeat Ted Cruz? His mega donors are pouring millions of dollars into his race, and I'm depending on grassroots supporters like you to help me keep up → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you for being a part of this team, friend. Let's do this.
Colin

name: Jared Golden
subject: I can’t change DC on my own
body:
But with some more folks like me and my Blue Dog friends, we stand a good shot. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71613587/432699989/1530338443?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNGQ1OGQzLTgyNmItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HqpwtW_BzU0oQL88VeeDcRpWlkD43J_qJv9nXPcpKjs=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71613588/432699990/-313727143?&refcode=E4463-20231011-WhyIRan-Image-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNGQ1OGQzLTgyNmItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HqpwtW_BzU0oQL88VeeDcRpWlkD43J_qJv9nXPcpKjs=) Peter, It’s frustrating watching all the political games happening in Congress. That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place. I saw that Mainers were being left behind in all the partisanship, and I decided to do something about it. Now, I’m fighting for my community back home — working to lower costs, defending our veterans, prioritizing health care access, and taking on the corruption in the DC beltway. **I will continue putting my working-class and middle-class constituents above the noise from lobbyists and special interests,_and making sure Mainers can see themselves in every decision I make and in every vote I take._** But even with all that, I can’t change this town on my own. That’s why I’ve joined forces with other members who are just as determined as I am to put their constituents over the partisan games in DC. **Together, we make up the Blue Dogs. And together, we have a good chance to change how things are done in DC. But we need help from our grassroots supporters to get it done.** [**If you want to see members of Congress stop the grandstanding and posturing and start to listen to folks in their districts, help us out with a donation →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71613589/432699991/-313727143?&refcode=E4463-20231011-WhyIRan-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNGQ1OGQzLTgyNmItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HqpwtW_BzU0oQL88VeeDcRpWlkD43J_qJv9nXPcpKjs=) [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/71613590/432699992/-313727143?&refcode=E4463-20231011-WhyIRan-SB-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNGQ1OGQzLTgyNmItZWUxMS05OTM3LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HqpwtW_BzU0oQL88VeeDcRpWlkD43J_qJv9nXPcpKjs=) I know that all across the country, there are folks who are just as upset as I am with all the political games and who want to join us in DC to make a difference. The Blue Dogs have made it our mission to support these candidates as they take on the extremists who currently hold power and who are misrepresenting the people who elected them to office. _That’s why I’m checking in with you today._ The Blue Dogs in Congress rely on grassroots supporters to help us defend our seats and to grow the number of level-headed people in Congress who understand that their ultimate boss is not a leader of a national political party; it’s the people who elected them. But we need help from our grassroots supporters to get it done. = = I know that all across the country, there are folks who are just as upset as I am with all the political games and who want to join us in DC to make a difference. The Blue Dogs have made it our mission to support these candidates as they take on the extremists who currently hold power and who are misrepresenting the people who elected them to office. That’s why I’m checking in with you today. The Blue Dogs in Congress rely on grassroots supporters to help us defend our seats and to grow the number of level-headed people in Congress who understand that their ultimate boss is not a leader of a national political party; it’s the people who elected them. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you, Jared Golden Co-Chair of Blue Dogs PAC Blue Dogs are normal people in Congress who want to get sht done. We believe in freedom and we’re fighting to protect yours. We’re pro-America, pro-democracy, and working to pass fiscally responsible policies that benefit everyday, hard-working Americans. = = = If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . BLUE DOG POLITICAL ACTION COMMITTEE PO BOX 83142 GAITHERSBURG, MD 20883 United States

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Re: The GOP Playbook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Our campaign is preparing to face a flood of GOP spending in Wisconsin.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1332%2E35263%2EBuzRIr)
Peter, in just a moment, I’m going to ask you to pitch in before tonight’s mid-month deadline. But before I do, I hope you’ll take a few minutes to hear me out and let me explain why each fundraising goal matters in a race like ours. **[If you’d rather cut to the chase, you can click here to make a donation now and help power our work to defend Wisconsin and our Democratic Senate majority.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-oct23.ejjIam&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231015_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1332%2E35263%2EBuzRIr)** Our campaign is preparing to face a flood of GOP spending in Wisconsin. The NRSC has hand-picked two megamillionaires who have pledged to spend up to **_$20 million_** out of their own pockets to defeat me. That much cash could break the record for the most personal wealth any candidate has ever spent in Wisconsin — and it gets worse... Neither of my potential wealthy opponents are _officially_ in the race yet, but they _are_ **campaigning in secret to skirt around FEC disclosure rules and avoid answering questions about their personal wealth and radical agendas — all to put our campaign at a huge financial disadvantage.** It’s the same playbook Ron Johnson used to flip Wisconsin’s other Senate seat from blue to red: get in late, pour millions of dollars into the race, and then win a narrow victory. We cannot let that happen again. But the only way to ensure our campaign has the resources to fight back against the colossal amount of GOP spending coming our way is for us to hit every one of our fundraising goals — that’s where you come in: **[Will you make a donation before our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight? I’m counting on you to help me keep Wisconsin and our Senate majority blue. subject: I am counting on your support today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71613868/432701139/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY4NjNhNS04NDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUiVU_aMggHTzeoflNgkt8MhjoUnloex0MYsTPYNph0=)
Friends, this is important.
Our October mid-month fundraising drive is coming to a close at MIDNIGHT tonight, and I need your support so I can continue fighting for California families and accountability for lawmakers in Congress.
**[So I’m reaching out to my top supporters, including you, to ask: Can you chip in $3 before midnight to ensure we hit our fundraising goal? Any amount will fuel my campaign to continue serving you in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71613869/432701144/871887458?refcode2=1ff863a5-846b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&refcode=em231015-1-t3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY4NjNhNS04NDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUiVU_aMggHTzeoflNgkt8MhjoUnloex0MYsTPYNph0=)**
This year, I have made my stance in Congress clear. I will not shy away from holding members accountable, no matter the case. I’ve done it with George Santos. I’ve done it with Marjorie Taylor Greene. And I will continue to fight for truth, justice, and accountability of all lawmakers. Because that is what Americans deserve.
But standing up for the truth and accountability sometimes means making yourself a target, and that has become a reality for me.
Fighting against far-right extremists has not been easy, but serving the people and being your voice in Congress was never supposed to be. When has fighting for truth and justice ever been? However, standing against right-wing national attacks is going to be an ongoing challenge, and I can’t do it alone.
I know that with your support, we can fight back against all the right-wing attacks coming our way, but that also means I am counting on every member of this team to support me when I need it, like today:
**[Can you please make a $3 contribution to my campaign for Congress ahead of our midmonth fundraising deadline? Every donation will help me continue to serve you in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71613870/432701145/871887458?refcode2=1ff863a5-846b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&refcode=em231015-1-t3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY4NjNhNS04NDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUiVU_aMggHTzeoflNgkt8MhjoUnloex0MYsTPYNph0=)**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71613871/432701173/871887458?refcode2=1ff863a5-846b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&refcode=em231015-1-t3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmY4NjNhNS04NDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nUiVU_aMggHTzeoflNgkt8MhjoUnloex0MYsTPYNph0=)****
Thank you for continuing to stand by my side in our fight for a better California and country. None of this would be possible without your grassroots support.
With gratitude,
Robert Garcia

subject: All hands on deck
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We’re just hours away from our FINAL mid-month fundraising deadline for this campaign. Hey Peter,

We’re just hours away from our FINAL mid-month fundraising deadline for this campaign. I wanted to reach out one last time to share where this race stands and what's at stake this November.

But if you’re ready to make a donation now, chip in any amount before our final mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tonight → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oct-23?link2=personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71613989/432701383/1286826882?refcode=em23_231015_mm4_fnd_gq_act___abp_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231015_mm4_fnd_gq_act___abp_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=16f863a5-846b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmY4NjNhNS04NDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-URQQyVVTdqGjn5k1x8pT7K07uXDcEfuatwhfa5Np_A=)

There's less than one month until Election Day and my opponent and his allies aren't slowing down their efforts to defeat me. They've spent a combined $21 million to try and buy this race. We know even more will flood in during these final weeks.

They're lying to Kentuckians about me and my record so they can try to win this race and roll back all of the progress we've made. We can't let that happen – but winning won't be easy.

Election experts are calling this the most competitive race in the entire country this year and _Politico_ has called the match-up between me and my opponent "dramatically close." Peter – We need all hands on deck if we're going to defeat my opponent and continue moving our Commonwealth forward.

Can I count on your support? Chip in before our final mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight to help ensure my team and I have the resources we need to win on November 7 → [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-oct-23?link2=personal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71613994/432701389/1286826882?refcode=em23_231015_mm4_fnd_gq_act___abp_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231015_mm4_fnd_gq_act___abp_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=16f863a5-846b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmY4NjNhNS04NDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-URQQyVVTdqGjn5k1x8pT7K07uXDcEfuatwhfa5Np_A=)

Thank you for your continued support,

Andy

name: Becca Balint
subject: The GOP’s civil war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
Amidst the chaos, knowing that you’re still standing with me means so much.
Peter,
It’s been a busy few weeks in DC, so I wanted to take a minute and touch base with you.
I remain so grateful for the opportunity to serve Vermonters in the House, but it weighs on you.
Standing by as the GOP House devolves into a civil war and seeing the so-called moderate Republicans too afraid to stand up for what’s right, all while knowing that there’s important work that we should be doing.
_This is what happens when MAGA extremists are enabled._
It’s infuriating and frustrating. Today’s political environment is not for the faint of heart, but I’m honored to be a voice of reason and respect through it all.
I’ve always said that being a middle school teacher was some of the best prep work I could have done before choosing to run for Congress. It helped me build a thick skin, learn how to think quickly on my feet, and diffuse arguments among peers.
Knowing that you’re still standing with me means so much, Peter. And ahead of tonight’s big mid-month deadline, it would mean the world to see a donation come in from you on ActBlue: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-ALL-Email-Oct2023-FR-October](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71614653/432703666/-2055426186?&refcode=E4527-20231015-MidMonth-SL-DeadlineOther&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDFiMjI1YS04NTZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BmjKoC3kuqsmFb9siTybRICFdoQd5i7OvZQCV3lKAxM=)
As always: Thank you, thank you, thank you.
— Becca B.

Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yduqSyHWDE20n1Ms6JOWpw2?unsubscribedata=vazwGTlddON5r%2BcvJwIQ%2F3zQmZL5maqD6bkvc4NoC09VFQUEB%2F%2FqGAHKIDR9oHaLcqI3R%2BASqkY6KsCPdgDZ2FY%2FtJOlo7tp39jePiaxzWCL%2F4wwRcnzm3ibGzK9HQyMPhLv5IpF2mZvjYSRKbixCnQFNwILgzSU3jCt2ERAJapBmEchLIsykICFeqfuzHthVl0Yj%2FheqeGbYIRmWom7LHbCvXhgguq1j%2F4w%2FANArHcxId8U6wvlyGTNf%2BPOl4qrtzWn%2FEU4AXRVmjsxX6Zg4dQhzr0p77uEaHx78ZIt5K3%2BbOAWmG82FKAfuLLxr2d22CDulIjSfjpdn8evUtL9zQ4vE1vlvi6hDxC4p0G413owQiuwnb6UfWUQOm0StkLMrPZfNr8GxHNo8mmuplGkj8tJ11Mk9qTnHydzOWULzg9ZE5XneFM%2BXI0f%2FatLKIcS).

Becca for Vermont
P.O. Box 291
Burlington, VT 05302
United States

name: Emerge Membership Team
subject: FWD: will you step up today, while there's still time?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
Peter, we’re worried A’shanti’s email got lost in your inbox and that's why **we're falling short** of our critical mid-month goal.
---
We had to reach out and make sure that you can still activate your Emerge membership before the deadline at midnight tonight!

The reality is we can’t afford to slow down our work to transform politics and protect our rights from the GOP’s all-out attacks. But we need your help to empower Democratic women to lead and continue this crucial fight in every state. **So please, before our mid-month deadline tonight: Will you donate $10 or more to activate your Emerge membership right now?**
