subject: DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
We’re nearly there.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=530801273f&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# DEADLINE: MIDNIGHT
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friends, **Tonight is our critical mid-month fundraising deadline, and we’re still $12,500 short of our goal.** And time is running out! We have until midnight to hit our target of raising $100,000 by October 15th. Your donation of **ANY SIZE** helps us close the gap. The Washington Establishment have tried all their tricks and games to push us out of the race. But, as we’ve traveled across this great country, our campaign is energized by the outpouring of support from patriotic Americans who are craving bold, effective leadership to tackle the problems facing our nation. [**So, I’m asking you: what can you give RIGHT NOW to support my America First campaign - $5, $10, $25, $50?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=c55fb2c8df&e=0be619cbaa) All the other candidates in this race can count on special interests filling their campaign coffers. But I’m counting on We the People to fund our campaign – a campaign based on common sense solutions that honor American principles and the promise of a better future for future generations. This presidential race isn’t a coronation. Any candidate running should be willing to work hard and earn votes. And that’s what I’ve been doing. [**But I need your financial support to keep our people-fueled campaign moving forward. Please, dig deep and give a donation of ANY AMOUNT to help us meet this mid-month deadline!**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=28f18e6f07&e=0be619cbaa) Your support sends a strong message to the GOP Establishment that the voters **DESERVE A REAL CHOICE** in this race for president – someone who can advance America First policies while tearing down political silos to reunite our country. Thank you,
Larry Elder
GOP Candidate for President

name: Susan Swecker
subject: A secret battlefield
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
With less than a month to go before the most important Virginia election in recent history, conservative extremists are waging hidden war on a secret battlefield.

|
---
Derek, With less than a month to go before the most important Virginia election in recent history, conservative extremists are waging hidden war on a secret battlefield. As reported by the New York Times, _“Under a peculiarity of Virginia law... After Mr. Youngkin won the governor’s office in 2021, electoral boards across the state flipped to 2-to-1 Republican control from 2-to-1 Democratic control.”_ GOP extremist groups like Virginia Fair Elections are pouring resources into recruiting and training poll workers and election officials. They are simultaneously infiltrating electoral due process while setting the stage to intimidate and disenfranchise voters. This is what election interference actually looks like. Under MAGA Republican control, many counties across the Commonwealth have also canceled Sunday voting including Richmond. This is what we are up against, and why we must double down before it’s too late. Virginia Democrats are at risk of a hijacked Commonwealth if we don’t succeed. The DPVA is fighting at full force, but we are running out of time and resources. [We have until midnight to reach our mid-month goal, and we’re still $7,870 away. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Pukita=2C=20GFI?=
subject: Critical Volunteer Needs!
body:
Critical Volunteer Needs! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5420faeb32&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| | |
**Critical Needs:**
** **
**Everyone Can Do Something,**
** **
**Nobody Should be Doing Nothing!**

---
|
The grassroots, conservative community in Ohio is coming together into a coordinated, united, focused, voter bloc that can no longer be ignored. It's time to take the next steps to solidify a durable, multi-generational, growing movement. To do this, we need volunteers to help with a few activities. Here's what we need:

##
[CRITICAL: CHURCH & PASTOR (OHIO) DATABASE DEVELOPMENT DATA ENTRY](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bf4185b670&e=5c740fa3e2)
As part of our efforts to defeat November's Issue 1, we need help organizing a pan-Ohio, church & pastor database. We need volunteers who we will direct to websites where church & pastor data can be found. Volunteers will enter what they find into an online form we've developed that automatically builds a spreadsheet for us. There is no spreadsheet experience necessary. This is a data entry or data "cut & paste" activity. It's essential we have this contact information so our army of phone callers can contact pastors about defeating Issue 1. Anyone can do this!

To volunteer for this CRITICAL need, please go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5cb0e77bd0&e=5c740fa3e2) and fill in the form. Someone will be back to you very quickly! Thank you!

##
[SOCIAL MEDIA TEAM](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f96040b7f3&e=5c740fa3e2)
GFI, together with OhioFAN and OhioFAN's member organizations, are building a social media powerhouse. We envision having a world-class, social media team, who develop messaging and messages, post original content developed by the team, and amplify, through sharing, the "reach" of our messages. This will be a well-organized, well-managed, team of volunteers working to get out our messages of freedom, small government, self-responsibility, sanctity of life, and constitutional order, to name a few.

To put your hat in the ring to be part of this team, please go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=77ffb394be&e=5c740fa3e2) and fill out the quick survey. Someone will be back to you soon. Thank you!

#

[RADIO CALLERS "BUREAU"](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bbd7d54cef&e=5c740fa3e2) -and- [LETTERS TO EDITOR & OPED WRITERS "BUREAU"](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=322b569cda&e=5c740fa3e2)
We're developing two statewide working groups to use the legacy media to our advantage. We're looking for volunteers who can (and will) write & speak (call-in radio). The writing will be letters to the editor and opinion pieces ("Op-Ed"). The speaking will be calling into talk radio shows. This is a statewide effort we're already building-out across Ohio.

We're going to work on crafting consistent messaging across the state, so this will be a team effort - you won't be on your own! If you'd like to explore this volunteer opportunity, please fill out one (or both?) of the forms linked below. Thank you!

[**RADIO CALLERS "BUREAU" SIGN-UP**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=f540dfa556&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**LETTERS TO EDITOR & OPED WRITERS "BUREAU" SIGN-UP**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0479f4f7ac&e=5c740fa3e2)
#
* * *
---
|
---
| |
**What else can you do to help TODAY?**

---
| Today, you can do two things.

**First** , download our new app calle**d GFI _connect_**. It's available for both Google and Android and it's **FREE**.

Go **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=968101f003&e=5c740fa3e2)** to download and install **GFI _connect_** , or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=54cbf4ee8c&e=5c740fa3e2)

**Second** , you can forward this message to 5 friends or family members who you feel would be willing to consider joining us. Please ask them to download and install the **GFI _connect_** app, but also ask them to fill out the questionnaire found **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fcd9936f96&e=5c740fa3e2)** or by clicking on the image below:

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=59f5d88355&e=5c740fa3e2)

**South/60 • North/30** is part of our effort to ACTIVATE more Ohioans to our movement while the **GFI _connect_** app is a way to UNITE, COMMUNICATE with, ORGANIZE, and EDUCATE those in our movement, striving for constant improvement of our knowledge, skills, and tactics.

* * *
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[September 21, 2023 - Issue 1 Extreme & Dangerous!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5f16370570&e=5c740fa3e2 "Issue 1 Extreme & Dangerous!")

[August 12, 2023 - Download Our FREE App!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c2f64d56d6&e=5c740fa3e2)

[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=782791fb8c&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| **Another Way You Can Help GFI:**
You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our **network**. You can forward them this email and ask them to:

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c503d6fb5a&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| If you want to text an invite to someone, just cut and paste this into a text (or email):

I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me.

Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started!

Thanks!

[http://eepurl.com/h1wIZ5](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1f462c275d&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=20ad4742a1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=20ad4742a1).

---

name: John Padora
subject: The chaos caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
You might not think Ken Buck and Lauren Boebert have much in common. Lauren Boebert is, after all, one of the most unhinged and extreme members of Congress in Washington. But they are both hurting our country in different ways.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2cfad1c371e740b2ab1de8f936ac6d9f&_e=aTxOTmSlb60tOgzpSFjZX2Wtxty0DVyeegT8rh4OeHFK4VvLv5BeafRPLQJSENkV936AYs4X4M7abRnfpDbtniCLfQl-_dijlE9tibxt5nM7JUmrbGOzZByPz-OxNQh0pGCIhjQaUyjYeFfJcBvCnTvLygPpcKxVbCWawUQTMaogLKh5PgoMXuHV-ezdXl3KM2d1UGQ8lsOH7-Gv4tYyk0M8GxSkQdHqFABOOov3uggVwysXLMXLTz7YIy-uHtgidE8cTdxD2a__nruO331wCdHtugVRs46S8BIjkSBV9hXe-sY9NXEr08p-3UT2fB6L1zi8tyhlq9bD2EjdHkKh2b-S1eygCWKsTHWUrnXDtirMXj-R3cnEq4rr-Mtjt_dpg_58vpJn0raC9ZNBKCDXPFE6Prl6SwvJoamhFQ4jS1U%3D) You might not think Ken Buck and Lauren Boebert have much in common. Lauren Boebert is, after all, one of the most unhinged and extreme members of Congress in Washington. But they are both hurting our country in different ways. Boebert spews extremism, chaos, and disunity all for some soundbites and viral videos on social media. Ken Buck doesn’t do that, but he certainly has enabled people like Boebert to feel empowered in their extremism. And that extremism has led to a dysfunctional and chaotic House. I want to go to Washington to fix the problems facing our community. I want us to get back to doing our jobs rather than causing chaos. But I need your help to do it. **[Will you chip in $20.24 to help me reach my 10/16 mid-month goal, defeat Ken Buck, flip the House back to Democratic control, AND fight for you in Washington?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2cfad1c371e740b2ab1de8f936ac6d9f&_e=aTxOTmSlb60tOgzpSFjZX2Wtxty0DVyeegT8rh4OeHFK4VvLv5BeafRPLQJSENkV936AYs4X4M7abRnfpDbtniCLfQl-_dijlE9tibxt5nM7JUmrbGOzZByPz-OxNQh0pGCIhjQaUyjYeFfJcBvCnTvLygPpcKxVbCWawUQTMaogLKh5PgoMXuHV-ezdXl3KM2d1UGQ8lsOH7-Gv4tYyk0M8GxSkQdHqFABOOov3ugiv4VdPL4uUip-appEC-nAL-xLNFZ0skCzXVYxg4EI06ohk38AwK4QVpLwUnjWBAcY8cUCPPgeg0a5PW7_7OsAtqScPPAQLAjcig9BcmoLdJT_rFNIF6Cn9J0D1N7V_DXzTPJ23C_qjpIymDTxhnB11xOpLMd5eEY_hvRYLQHBcp81T_ixjMMxXMi0I_J8ZtBQ%3D)** I’ve told you that both Democrats and Republicans have left communities like ours behind. But now it’s clear to me that only Democrats are interested in actually solving any of these problems. The Republicans can’t even agree on who should be Speaker. **[If you’ve had enough of this, chip in to help me defeat Ken Buck and fight for you and for the Fourth District.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2cfad1c371e740b2ab1de8f936ac6d9f&_e=aTxOTmSlb60tOgzpSFjZX2Wtxty0DVyeegT8rh4OeHFK4VvLv5BeafRPLQJSENkV936AYs4X4M7abRnfpDbtniCLfQl-_dijlE9tibxt5nM7JUmrbGOzZByPz-OxNQh0pGCIhjQaUyjYeFfJcBvCnTvLygPpcKxVbCWawUQTMaogLKh5PgoMXuHV-ezdXl3KM2d1UGQ8lsOH7-Gv4tYyk0M8GxSkQdHqFABOOov3uggVwysXLMXLTz7YIy-uHtgif0R0qJsN9glsQ-ktsbpy66p5FxrEBTjE49RSqSt3iJXkDUJQ46put3O9fpHPY8-fIUhVwRVltemun7bvEStujrUYZgvdV9UUY563LTgnboedKtezNC2RozzoRglT_EbNxNMfcU56LMr0bsW4UWwHhLma78-6C4EkDD6sBvjoQ5k%3D)** Thanks, John **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2cfad1c371e740b2ab1de8f936ac6d9f&_e=aTxOTmSlb60tOgzpSFjZXzTrUdzmJDx-6TIAY436JW_0WHsK-47-ZRffaMkbSZ9GzI_KXYhgjxlbSXE4qwS6vUrbWqW0skNDPz3fGG4wL82TiAllGLNhZJdC-eZmCxPVLZxoECH0Z_sR3iXnqK4CBK35RU9pD86CkQ1744C1P5lyflza-x8It7R64bBSH4l6WMQWgfd63QrkhPd9WSbQ3w%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=2cfad1c371e740b2ab1de8f936ac6d9f&_e=aTxOTmSlb60tOgzpSFjZX2Wtxty0DVyeegT8rh4OeHFK4VvLv5BeafRPLQJSENkV936AYs4X4M7abRnfpDbtniCLfQl-_dijlE9tibxt5nM7JUmrbGOzZByPz-OxNQh0pGCIhjQaUyjYeFfJcBvCnTvLygPpcKxVbCWawUQTMaogLKh5PgoMXuHV-ezdXl3KM2d1UGQ8lsOH7-Gv4tYyk0M8GxSkQdHqFABOOov3ugiU5wKQeft3Mum1VurovYZlQmJQKjroBx-w0R2PY2pI3XnKaBkEqICpDY1YBIxoqdhI-uIpEsL9nMFilW0CYynhOJPWSkuF2XjoYtg_HW2HtP5Nzr5nTiz-QkqD5mkfqZuapJ2sG6xyGVwq6LOXN93xAsHawXshX0MIhKbyinZU1gIJqZkCdJ9BZL4xdzbIpuk%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_s=2cfad1c371e740b2ab1de8f936ac6d9f&_t=8SsVZUgZVylCqzwUPI0hKV35Dhr5Ty-Wo9oVsM0KTO5IufENT7E2fWmeJDvRAVkMqfx4aNj6lorGOr7Ep_eWKmjMgb6ArhQvc0MCcaquxag%3D)

John Padora , 1267 Wild Basin Road, Severance, CO 80550

name: Christie
subject: Will you become a Grassroots Democratic Strategist? >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
I wanted to follow up.
| | | Hi team -- It's Christie, Executive Director at the DSCC. I just reviewed this community’s recent survey responses, and I wanted to follow up personally.

Grassroots Democrats like you are central to everything we do here at the DSCC. Your support shapes our strategy, fuels our ground game, and drives our campaigns.

But your feedback is every bit as crucial -- it helps us make sure we’re meeting people where they are and talking about the issues they care most about. And as one of our **_most active supporters**_ , you're exactly the kind of Democrat we need to defend President Biden's Senate majority next year. **That’s why I’m reaching out today:**

**[Will you accept my personal invitation by taking this survey to become a Grassroots Democratic Strategist and join an _exclusive_ focus group? name: Chuck Grassley
subject: Our Second Amendment rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Did you see what Joe Biden’s allies did? | Peter – Chuck Grassley here.

I’m reaching out because one of our most crucial **constitutional rights is under assault from the radical Left: The Second Amendment.**

Left-wing politicians have openly stated they want to TAKE GUNS AWAY from law-abiding citizens. One of Joe Biden’s Democratic Governors is doing just that. [**She issued an “emergency” public health declaration to SUSPEND individuals’ rights to carry and bear arms.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b11cabe4af8b4d6f9e9025714b5ca9a5&_e=1lvl4IQomL2MWOHEcYk-BQQmCuUedpblLZh6DWDmHMVZkW5LKxwwTLhOgJiBDFCMjo2TEVd4EsJSF4XhM0_8qdwpg9VemZKTZs6HDdvrD1YLK3nnMHSheBhAMBJOylcyqmdPc93HWT0RZPOo0fBIo_Q4GD2EzLCtXcfDAAEe0mPVEq3AwrWjyE5ZmqmZvqc59b2yqiUFOtNPEYwIrPXdw1O-8rxprFHhNHX4LJW10jK5Hm9yI-lgqEBlrIX6cYbQRKP7tgloGCPcx-7L791uUj4RAGWjngyzRie1A3nrIZ24zvkuYvet9fcHT7eRdaL8xiqu4Vb9q9Lg0J2p5KXX84nI5HvDwF_U3ifY8JylEuCqp0JLfMbjGSxnGhQynQtUWfJgxsdEgIsFPCmTmTbLJhUQxSBL0qI-b-2UOnOs2X7gTBA9THekiMt_nY6YjbFVV6iMzwnd8JdhT9lr7LgFXji3K0kwtd2nnEjdLlvnb8o%3D)

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: "Nothing to worry about"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Alexandria’s community sent her to Congress on purpose to disrupt and challenge a lot of what’s wrong in D.C.
But during her first term, many people in her own party said her election was a fluke, a mistake, and that there was “nothing to worry about.” Many believed that Alexandria would be a one-term Congresswoman.
One colleague in Congress said they were “shocked” to see how hostile her own party was towards Alexandria from the moment she arrived — and she still faces hostility to this day
It was clear from the beginning that the party never wanted Alexandria there. It’s why a Moderate Democrat mounted a $3 million primary challenge, and why Republicans spent over $10 million trying to unseat her in 2020.
Now Alexandria already has at least one MAGA Republican opponent next year. So we need to be ready to fight back against their posters, mailers, commercials, and whatever else they’ll throw at us this year and next.
[Can we count on your first $5 contribution today to help us fight back against their disinformation about our Congresswoman with deep organizing and truth-telling?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231015.rx2xk9&refcode=em20231015-5153-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5153%2E2526796%2EaX_WPp)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231015.rx2xk9&refcode=em20231015-5153-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5153%2E2526796%2EaX_WPp)**
Every dollar, no matter the amount, shows the widespread support for our priorities from NY-14 and beyond.
Our sincerest thanks,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231015?refcode=em20231015-5153-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=5153_2526796_aX_WPp&akid=5153%2E2526796%2EaX_WPp)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231015-5153-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=5153%2E2526796%2EaX_WPp)**

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

clean_body: The best way to show that YOU can never be silenced... | | | | | Patriot, Tomorrow, Crooked Joe may very well get away with GAGGING me – his leading political opponent for the presidency – for the remainder of the 2024 election. It would be an attack on the First Amendment the likes of which our country has never seen and would mark a truly dark day in American history. But this is what Biden and his Deep State thugs have transformed our country into: a Third World Marxist dictatorship. I may not know exactly how tomorrow’s “Gag Order” hearing in Washington will unfold, but there’s one thing I do know for certain... ...regardless of whether Crooked Joe gets away with gagging me, the millions and millions of grassroots Americans who make up our Silent Majority will peacefully make their voices heard loud and clear. Because patriotism can never be gagged! And what better way to show that YOU too willNEVER SURRENDER our country to their tyranny than your very own “Never Surrender Mugshot Mug!” | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
Stronger representation in Congress means more of us tackling the ongoing climate crisis, fighting to protect our reproductive rights, and working to end gun violence.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71616560/432708805/-1301578774?refcode=BLU-SAN-20231015-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzIyZmYwYS04ZDZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9y8-mnnJv21UhF35G4CDo_8F-Bbc2C_lMWUFS2gtH_c=)
---
| Peter,

As Hispanic Heritage Month comes to a close today, I’d like to take a moment to express my appreciation for supporting this campaign.

Growing up, I was constantly motivated by my parents. My father worked as an industrial mechanic, and my mother was an elementary school teacher. Despite not graduating high school themselves, they made sure all seven of their children went on to become first-generation college graduates. Their commitment to our success is what guides much of the work I do today.

This year, I became the first woman to ever lead BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus. As I work to represent the nation’s working class in Congress, I’m working to elect Latino progressives up and down the ballot next year.

**Stronger representation in Congress means more of us tackling the ongoing climate crisis, fighting to protect our reproductive rights, and working to end gun violence. Stronger support for this campaign is what will make this possible.

DEROY MURDOCK: The Far Left Says Israel’s Pain Is Israel’s Fault

The Blame Israel First crowd strikes again. Hamas unleashed an
unprovoked, surprise attack on the Jewish State on Saturday morning,
October 7, during Shabbat and the Simchat Torah holiday. The Gaza
Strip-based terrorist group’s Pearl Harbor-style onslaught included
2,200 rockets that blasted communities as far north as Tel Aviv.
Regardless, Israel’s critics and enemies point their fingers at the
Israelis, as if they had bombed themselves.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71617176/432710485/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBlYjQ3Y2QtOGQ2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cv_juDU9f6EGJCj-px-nUE_Gu94STbeoMTzvgg78BQ4=)
Friend,

Today marks the end of National Hispanic Heritage Month -- from September 15th to October 15th, we celebrate the incredible contributions of Hispanic Americans to the culture of the United States.

**As a first-generation American and the proud daughter of Cuban immigrants, I want to share part of my personal journey with you.[I hope you’ll read on about my story, then chip in a $3 donation toward our campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71617177/432710486/-381882994?refcode=em-10.15.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBlYjQ3Y2QtOGQ2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cv_juDU9f6EGJCj-px-nUE_Gu94STbeoMTzvgg78BQ4=)**

1962\. The year my parents fled Fidel Castro’s dictatorship in communist Cuba to give me and my siblings a chance at a better life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71617178/432710487/-381882994?refcode=em-10.15.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBlYjQ3Y2QtOGQ2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cv_juDU9f6EGJCj-px-nUE_Gu94STbeoMTzvgg78BQ4=)
It wasn’t easy. My father sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet, and we didn’t enjoy many luxuries growing up.

**But what my parents did instill in me and my siblings was the power of hard work, the importance of fairness, and that no matter what you always do the right thing.**

These values have driven me for my entire life. They led me to Arizona in the 1980s, where I worked as a broadcast journalist. It’s where I grew as an investigative journalist, uncovering corruption and holding truth to power.

I am so very proud to be an Arizonan and to have raised my family here. It’s where I met the love of my life, Grant, and where we raised our children.

**But today, much like how my parents fled extremism in Cuba, our country is facing another type of extremism -- the far-right.** Extreme Republicans are hell-bent on stripping away our rights. And now, my daughter is growing up with less control over her own body than I did.

My family is what drove me to become a candidate for Congress in AZ-01. David Schweikert is nothing but a rubber stamp for Trump and his extreme followers, and our communities deserve a leader who will actually hold extremists like him accountable.

**[This is a toss-up race in a critical district for Democrats. Will you chip in $3 toward our mid-month fundraising deadline? Your support really makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71617179/432710488/-381882994?refcode=em-10.15.23-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBlYjQ3Y2QtOGQ2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cv_juDU9f6EGJCj-px-nUE_Gu94STbeoMTzvgg78BQ4=)**

But today, much like how my parents fled extremism in Cuba, our country is facing another type of extremism -- the far-right. Extreme Republicans are hell-bent on stripping away our rights. And now, my daughter is growing up with less control over her own body than I did. My family is what drove me to become a candidate for Congress in AZ-01. David Schweikert is nothing but a rubber stamp for Trump and his extreme followers, and our communities deserve a leader who will actually hold extremists like him accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Marlene =** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office’s requested gag order against

Hi Friend,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ef366fe0db3407593850ba87868600b&_e=-kUY9VFsPMUkiBfSNE604tVE3C5Q0APQCqiG5yYmwLnWvouZLuTM4ZSeWB8RMntOEZ4EuMAaZgGukJGaplGLAzKtHWNWV-DFUNB8Xt88L_9TJXm7yt47_RIhSZLG5ilyKpPyt_IAscYOPDUKEeSQel5ECSaexPzWYK7gEf1CVdjW9DL9fQVJeLBz2VgVRMhskqH3JERAG8WiVexFocgM2Nsw0Hh89GgcwEtPWwU28tI7N6Blme2jS-SUiCCqvbDjBe4My9lnCO54CRQ2WeBsmIhfdAO-cfXOFHJfmpymFxn4LM2dqPG483euBaAFUsOibHe8BTEmUuIW1Ih0UFT9JwRflwzSAvcoMfwQlL2CSoCoMm1DMCKNwjOak6WSilVZgZnEJ2gZSpqbctS1JigU--MWG5hQ6VgYqRYcr_DCzuA-3xudOqY0ikbdHaz5qFPEnFAbdDYSBpBsmBHJNEbzi_pXl8lcQcSIZGvx7bZmwjeySuUbrHNc7nOP8IY20XZy5JkRJHAQhccsaL1CF_zQdVxvw0Vg4pfEslV8yMiQK8bq44EBZmSkyZWoQ19f3tAz "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ef366fe0db3407593850ba87868600b&_e=-kUY9VFsPMUkiBfSNE604tVE3C5Q0APQCqiG5yYmwLnWvouZLuTM4ZSeWB8RMntOEZ4EuMAaZgGukJGaplGLAzKtHWNWV-DFUNB8Xt88L_9TJXm7yt47_RIhSZLG5ilyKpPyt_IAscYOPDUKEeSQel5ECSaexPzWYK7gEf1CVdjW9DL9fQVJeLBz2VgVRMhskqH3JERAG8WiVexFocgM2Nsw0Hh89GgcwEtPWwU28tI7N6Blme2jS-SUiCCqvbDjBe4My9lnCO54CRQ2WeBsmIhfdAO-cfXOFHJfmpymFxn4LM2dqPG483euBaAFUsOibHe8BTEmUuIW1Ih0UFT9JwRflwzSAvcoMfwQlL2CSoCoMm1DMCKNwjOak6WSilVZgZnEJ2gZSpqbctS1JigU--MWG5hQ6VgYqRYcr_DCzuB8Py842JahVNg-I3U8GcBvFjzG9pUY0tziq-5EBJYW7ZphhnI1BA2m8SfuHV-cdLIFT6PT6ex9-3lXPPWIKomKbUO0l-UQF9E3212lkKLG3ogfWueOySVgxVIAsT07ut3q1B8keL3RevBO0fNCrb3u)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.**
---
| | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ef366fe0db3407593850ba87868600b&_e=-kUY9VFsPMUkiBfSNE604tVE3C5Q0APQCqiG5yYmwLnWvouZLuTM4ZSeWB8RMntOEZ4EuMAaZgGukJGaplGLAzKtHWNWV-DFUNB8Xt88L_9TJXm7yt47_RIhSZLG5ilyKpPyt_IAscYOPDUKEeSQel5ECSaexPzWYK7gEf1CVdjW9DL9fQVJeLBz2VgVRMhskqH3JERAG8WiVexFocgM2Nsw0Hh89GgcwEtPWwU28tI7N6Blme2jS-SUiCCqvbDjBe4My9lnCO54CRQ2WeBsmIhfdAO-cfXOFHJfmpymFxn4LM2dqPG483euBaAFUsOibHe8BTEmUuIW1Ih0UFT9JwRflwzSAvcoMfwQlL2CSoCoMm1DMCKNwjOak6WSilVZgZnEJ2gZSpqbctS1JigU--MWG5hQ6VgYqRYcr_DCzuCQor8_NJw8dhhA0awq6gop-z1VWrqnZsLJT9h09VJs0UmfL30JH0Hd7JEGS_LV-VMKDpsWbyeaLusfCLChF5U3kL1F5Wz-S6w8oWtbZKqLGUMA-7ELwEdnB4p1WqLCDdhgEDwt295aCXVj8DkGMRpY)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---

I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

Now, I just completed my **SECOND** debate, and I need a **SURGE** of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! **[It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!>>](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ef366fe0db3407593850ba87868600b&_e=-kUY9VFsPMUkiBfSNE604tVE3C5Q0APQCqiG5yYmwLnWvouZLuTM4ZSeWB8RMntOEZ4EuMAaZgGukJGaplGLAzKtHWNWV-DFUNB8Xt88L_9TJXm7yt47_RIhSZLG5ilyKpPyt_IAscYOPDUKEeSQel5ECSaexPzWYK7gEf1CVdjW9DL9fQVJeLBz2VgVRMhskqH3JERAG8WiVexFocgM2Nsw0Hh89GgcwEtPWwU28tI7N6Blme2jS-SUiCCqvbDjBe4My9lnCO54CRQ2WeBsmIhfdAO-cfXOFHJfmpymFxn4LM2dqPG483euBaAFUsOibHe8BTEmUuIW1Ih0UFT9JwRflwzSAvcoMfwQlL2CSoCoMm1DMCKNwjOak6WSilVZgZnEJ2gZSpqbctS1JigU--MWG5hQ6VgYqRYcr_DCzuCfinSpBqZg02ZTmjZB_t_yAixkQCF3EHtGSIIhEc8uGDpdWe8dkoUhSDVfuLC-rbBfoylMSWk55eflzX9SB90Q6gxyFTbxtXyEjRoZwB7Bj_uUPXriDNZGF6cUuQEzAjNRZ8dWUN8BaQnI8BkzLfCv "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> ")**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5ef366fe0db3407593850ba87868600b&_e=-kUY9VFsPMUkiBfSNE604tVE3C5Q0APQCqiG5yYmwLnWvouZLuTM4ZSeWB8RMntOfFHrmuDZSLkRbJ2vB0B68jd3sw0h8tbqTFfhEQFzFmxr9Lyu7dY47YGVycYw59IKXcI_wZyuqEUqvKx7GKzXaEwmNYZigilW1_MMkSAs27nDUTHHpqXXW_1V9iiBFI5IEyh-g8iExGnzgTVW6slX4jHuyVpjole0onmrtOT1q9f_RwFskVu7vgz6zV7UoDK67zGY-b3CEDsZ1PCHNtmZf-j7f-9y8E_p73xklXKhN07_thz0o_7p4zP6MaMWU0lUWJngpRIjnU02pz2i38Vk2Mvj-eFy7ptmNC1xLPik7j0c5hoM0jqg6ZjuwcY1Gb6Y-ZRp1BJxu1xZfyi7o41sub4fW2ldWpsntpjIQYaIll1ZvDsCvYRFTRgxCIJJ1S_Zpr9HywesPzN6e_CHJD8idOzFXKU3WDhWC0svy5fxmNr4tc-CqYuvlJTR4yVTlgaWutNIavI9dOEYI7PEMRO6Y92mEH3MHEhslxPaGTrJbdCYBWsJ4-e6OKfojpPO6qI1VX0Twx2AsrJkbyDPHDHNnQ%3D%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: | | | | | | Hi Friend, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once youâ€TMve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, I just completed my SECOND debate, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained since last quarter! I 'm hoping you'll consider pitching in a generous gift today! "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this could send a donation of just $5 to show the strength of my campaign post-debate. >> " ** | | | | | | | | | | Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, " I need your help â€“ starting right now. " Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley (48324) directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

name: Lexi Reese
subject: I need your help!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Friend,
I’m reaching out today because I need your help. With all the recent changes to the California Senate race, it is absolutely critical that we reach our fundraising goals. We’re in a scramble to raise the $12,680 we need to reach our mid-October goal, and we only have until midnight tonight. Can I count on your support? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Donors are now able to give a maximum of $13,200 to this campaign, and while I’m aware that most of you will not be writing massive checks – every dollar we receive really does make a difference.
I’m running for Senate because the status quo is a problem. We are less safe, healthy, and economically secure than we used to be. We have an opportunity to turn that around, but first we need to win. Will you please donate today and help us reach our goal before midnight tonight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
With gratitude,
Lexi Reese

Republicans like to talk about how the government doesn't get anything done. The truth is **they are right, but only when they’re in charge.** California’s 30th District deserves better, and I’m running to bring my bold vision and experience to carry it out. | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71624647/432714868/-377887102?amount=20&refcode=JRFC_EM_FR_101523&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2JlMTg4ODktOTU2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Pt_dED2_sy1YBEZL5kRzKWODyYwRG9CdKmMaaindQRU=)

Their party's presidential front runner has been charged in four criminal cases. Meanwhile, they’ve ousted their House Speaker and are letting extremists like Matt Gaetz run the show. They’ve even launched a sham impeachment inquiry into President Biden with no evidence of wrongdoing.

It’s easy to dismiss what’s going on as mere incompetence. But it’s far more frightening. Our leadership has fallen out of touch with everyday Americans. We need leadership in Congress who understand and respect the job. **I have the most experience in the federal government out of anyone running for California’s 30th district. subject: Dave Min Outraises Democratic Field In Q3
body:
Min Again Outraises The Democratic Field–Reporting No Candidate Loans Or Campaign Debt | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d4d850aefa15/dave-min-outraises-democratic-field-in-q3-15663576?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release: October 15, 2023
Contact: press@davemin.com**
**Dave Min Outraises Democratic Field In Q3** _On The Heels Of Recommendation from the OC Labor Fed, Min Again Outraises The Democratic Field–Reporting No CandidateLoans Or Campaign Debt
**It’s The Third Quarter Of Impressive Fundraising As Min Continues To Wrack Up Endorsements**_
**IRVINE, CA** — Today, State Senator Dave Min reported raising $311,196 from July 1 to September 30 for his campaign for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District. This is the third quarter of impressive fundraising for Dave Min, who reports no personal loans to buoy his total, or campaign debt. Min, who has shown a strong lead against likely Republican nominee Scott Baugh in the 20204 General Election in public polling, boasts a coalition of support that includes Congresswoman Katie Porter, SEIU California, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, and more than 125 local and state elected officials. California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that is being vacated by Rep. Porter, who is running for U.S. Senate. The announcement comes a few months after a [Public Policy Polling](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=e0768a1492&e=7017cc100e) poll showed Min with a strong lead against his likely Republican opponent Scott Baugh in the 2024 General Election.

**“Republicans have made it extremely clear: they’re gunning for CA-47,”** said Dan Driscoll, campaign manager at Dave Min for Congress. **“Dave Min has the track record and the experience to keep this seat in the right column–not just in 2024, but beyond. Orange County’s working families know that Dave isn’t the same old politician. When he makes a promise, he keeps it. Thank you so much to everyone who has put their faith in Dave and our campaign these past few months. This is the sort of grassroots support we need to keep this seat blue for the long haul.”**

It’s important to consider the source of the funding as well. Notably, **Min’s fundraising to date includes no money from corporate PACs and no loans from the candidate.** Min has also signed the No Fossil Fuel Money Pledge, and his list of donors reflects those commitments.**Crucially, his campaign reports no debts.**

Considering fundraising and endorsements in tandem tells a compelling story about Dave Min’s general election viability. While approaching $1 million raised, he’s also consolidated support from local, state, and national endorsers. In recent weeks, Min has announced the recommendation of the Orange County Labor Federation, and endorsements from the Service Employees International Union (SEIU), the California Federation of Teachers (CFT), the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 47, UFCW Local 324, Teamsters Joint Council 42, California Lieutenant Governor Eleni Kounalakis, Attorney General Rob Bonta, State Treasurer Fiona Ma, Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara, Superintendent of Public Instruction Tony Thurmond, the Congressional Asian Pacific American Caucus’s political leadership ASPIRE PAC, more than 50 local Orange County government officials, and more than 60 state legislators. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=b6f3c55e1c&e=7017cc100e).

Dave Min is the Democrats’ most viable candidate in the race, having entered the contest with the endorsement of the outgoing incumbent Katie Porter. Min currently represents over 80% of the 47th Congressional District in the State Senate, and won CA-47 during that election by over 5% in 2020, a tough year for Orange County Democrats. Just after the end of 2023’s first quarter, former Congressman Harley Rouda ended his bid for the 47th, leaving Min as the only Democrat in the race with previous campaign, legislative or federal policy experience.

Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes, gun violence prevention, family safety, and women’s reproductive rights. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling. Min serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. He previously chaired the Senate Cybersecurity Select Committee.

Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.
###

_California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country. _

name: Team Pramila
subject: This work takes all of us, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
As things in Congress inevitably ramp up, it’s our job to make sure we’re on track to reach our fundraising goals so Pramila can keep focus on the goals ahead of us.
#
Peter, we know it’s the weekend but this is important.
Earlier this week, we set a goal to raise 500 contributions from emails just like this one — and as of this morning we’re just 87 donations away from closing the gap on our goal!
**[We did the math and if just 4 people from 18326 can chip in, we’ll be able to close the gap on our goal right before midnight. Can we count on you to be one of the supporters we need to help us reach this goal?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46268?refcode=em20231015-3039&t=1&akid=3039%2E420207%2Eavh3yJ)**
**Peter, goals like these might seem unimportant, but they are far from it.** As things in Congress inevitably ramp up, it’s our job to make sure we’re on track to reach our fundraising goals so Pramila can keep focus on achieving our movement’s goals.
Donations from emails like these keep our operations running, and set us up for success during busier campaign moments while investing in year-round organizing work. So we’re coming to our most engaged supporters first — that means you!
This work takes all of us, Peter. **[So in these final hours, can we count on your donation of $3 or any amount today to help us close the gap on the final 87 donations of our mid-month goal? No matter the size, your support will be deeply appreciated.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46268?refcode=em20231015-3039&t=2&akid=3039%2E420207%2Eavh3yJ)**
**[Donate >>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46268?refcode=em20231015-3039&t=21&akid=3039%2E420207%2Eavh3yJ)**
Thank you for your support,
Jayapal HQ

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231015-3039-footer&t=22&refcode2=3039_420207_avh3yJ&akid=3039%2E420207%2Eavh3yJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Gabby and all of us at GIFFORDS won’t rest until everyone in our nation can live freely without the fear of gun violence.
#

Hi there, we hope you’ve been having a relaxing weekend.
We don’t want to take up too much of your time today, so we’ll be direct: [**We’re writing to humbly ask you to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231015-1-60&t=1&akid=6693%2E3935704%2EeHa_hG)
Here’s why:
Since GIFFORDS’ founding ten years ago, we have made so much progress in the movement to end gun violence. Last summer, we helped pass the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act—the most significant federal gun safety legislation in nearly 30 years. Just last month, President Biden announced the creation of a federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention.
This is progress that we could never have imagined ten years ago. Back then, people thought that challenging the gun lobby was too risky, that talking about gun safety was taboo. Too few elected officials had the courage to fight back.
The only way we have been able to shift the power in Washington and make this progress is because of the help of supporters like you who care about ending our nation’s gun violence crisis. We’re so grateful for your voice and your vote.
But there’s still so much work to be done.
Gun deaths have reached historically high levels, with more than 43,000 Americans dying from gun violence per year. The threat of gun violence exists everywhere—in our neighborhoods, our supermarkets, our places of worship, our movie theaters, our schools, our concerts. The list goes on and on.
**Gabby and all of us at GIFFORDS won’t rest until everyone in our nation can live freely without the daily fear of gun violence.**
[**If you’re with us, will you please make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? With our mid-month fundraising deadline tonight at midnight, your support today truly makes a difference.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-oct23.zcsGXG&refcode=em231015-1-60&t=2&akid=6693%2E3935704%2EeHa_hG)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Hey, it's Eric.

We are still, STILL waiting for a final vote for the next Speaker of the House. It's been a complete sh*tshow in Congress.

Our national budget will run out in less than 30 days. There is no serious movement to elect a Speaker. I’m sick of the chaos that’s been the MAGA circus agenda this year. And I know Americans are tired of it, too.

While these MAGA Republicans scramble to get their act together, it's time for us to come together to chase these clowns out of Congress in 2024. If you're with me, can you donate $15 today?

name: Powered By People
subject: Just $21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
With your help, Powered by People is working day and night to build the infrastructure we need to ramp up our voter registration programming as we move through the fall.
To reach our goal of registering hundreds of thousands of new Democratic voters in Texas before the 2024 election, we have to make sure we’re meeting every benchmark that we set for ourselves at the beginning of the year.
Since you are a key part of this effort, we want to give you an inside look at our fundraising progress for the month of October so far:
Right now, we’re $5,488 short of where we need to be for mid-October. [**So we’re reaching out to ask if you can make a contribution of $3 right now to help us reach our $35,000 mid-month fundraising goal by midnight tonight.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231015.BzXPES&refcode=ema20231015-233315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=233315%2E444211%2Eij84h6)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231015.BzXPES&refcode=ema20231015-233315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=233315%2E444211%2Eij84h6)**
Any contribution you make today will help ensure we stay on track to meet our targets as we head into this critically important election that will determine who represents us in the White House, in Congress, and in key statehouse and local positions.
We can’t do any of this work without grassroots support from people like you—so thank you for being in this fight with us.
— Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20231015-233315-footer&t=21&refcode2=233315_444211_ij84h6&akid=233315%2E444211%2Eij84h6)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=233315%2E444211%2Eij84h6), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=22&akid=233315%2E444211%2Eij84h6).

| 🔵 To you and everyone supporting Kevin Thomas as he runs for Congress in NY-04: Is there _ANYTHING_ we can say to convince you to **_[make a contribution before our critical mid-October fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71629832/432718138/1307708269?refcode=ea.cb03a5b2-9b6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cb03a5b2-9b6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjAzYTViMi05YjZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1m1ynW1Hm95bCHYcuzy7jwJpkTNyyQLssYLPiTI3OiE=)_** We’re nearly 24 hours out, and we could REALLY use your help.
---
What if we said that this battleground seat right here in New York could ultimately determine which party controls the House in 2024?
---
And that the odds are in our favor, with election experts and the media calling this **one of the most fiercely contested House races of the 2024 election?** _(Plus, this is one of the key districts that flipped red in 2022 after Biden won it by nearly 15 points in 2020!)_
---
But that House Republicans and the GOP establishment are already spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to keep their vulnerable incumbents like Rep. Anthony D’Esposito safe so they can hold onto their House majority?
---
Would that be enough to convince you? **_[If you’re with us, click here to chip in $5 or $10! With your help, we will crush our 500 grassroots donations goal and give Kevin Thomas the firepower he needs to take on the GOP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71629833/432718139/1307708269?refcode=ea.cb03a5b2-9b6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cb03a5b2-9b6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjAzYTViMi05YjZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1m1ynW1Hm95bCHYcuzy7jwJpkTNyyQLssYLPiTI3OiE=)_** | _[RUSH A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71629835/432718140/1307708269?refcode=ea.cb03a5b2-9b6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ms=ea.cb03a5b2-9b6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjAzYTViMi05YjZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1m1ynW1Hm95bCHYcuzy7jwJpkTNyyQLssYLPiTI3OiE=)_

body:

name: Bob Casey (Official Campaign)
subject: Building a team across PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=900%2E552475%2EiYq-2N)
We'll keep this super short because it's a weekend, Peter.
We're building a team across PA to hold this seat, re-elect Bob Casey, and make sure we have a real Pennsylvanian fighting for the Commonwealth in the U.S. Senate — not a mega-millionaire Republican who lives in Connecticut.
But we need to make sure we're on track to meet our October fundraising goal, and to do that we need your help today.
**[Can you help us compete with our mega-millionaire GOP opponent by chipping in $5 before tonight's mid-month deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231015-1?refcode=em20231015-1&refcode2=900_552475_iYq-2N&akid=900%2E552475%2EiYq-2N)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231015-1?refcode=em20231015-1&refcode2=900_552475_iYq-2N&akid=900%2E552475%2EiYq-2N)**
We're so glad you're a part of this team -- so there's nothing else to add but _thank you._
-- Bob Casey for Senate

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Protect the critically endangered Rice’s whale from Big Oil
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051651?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **ENDANGERED SPECIES ACTION ALERT: Stop Big Oil from drilling in critical habitat for one of the _most endangered marine mammals on Earth!_ >> [_Act now!_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051652?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Rice’s whales are gentle giants discovered less than 2 years ago in the Gulf of Mexico. With only an estimated **51 WHALES remaining** , they could **already be extinct in just a few years.** The Bureau of Ocean Energy Management announced three new lease sales in the Gulf of Mexico, including Rice’s whale habitat. These sales would allow greedy oil companies to build massive offshore drilling rigs to suck fossil fuels from below the ocean floor, risking **catastrophic oil spills!** Gulf communities have felt the devastation of oil spills before: toxic pollution, destroyed beaches, the stench of decaying animals washed onto shore. Many communities have never fully recovered. **We could risk it all happening again without your immediate help** – this time potentially DOOMING Rice’s whale to extinction. [_**Please, Friend, tell BOEM to STOP offshore drilling in Rice’s whale habitat and protect our communities and oceans from oil spills before it’s too late!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051653?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ***Your Signature is Missing*** | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051654?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_**Oil spills are not a matter of IF but of WHEN**_. In the Gulf Coast, offshore pipeline leaks happen at a **10x HIGHER RATE** compared to the rest of the country. One lease sale permitting Big Oil to drill in our oceans is bad enough. Three is far too high of a risk.
Fishing is a vital part of the economy for many Gulf communities. These lease sales could risk the entire livelihoods of thousands living along the coast.
The severe health impacts from oil spills make the situation even worse. Toxic fumes from oil-stained shores can cause **trouble breathing, heart damage, and damage to immune systems.**
The choice is clear, Friend: BOEM can choose to let Big Oil drill in critical Rice’s whale habitat and risk another oil spill in the Gulf, or it can protect communities and wildlife on our coasts. But **we’re running out of time before this comment period closes!** [_**We need 938 more signatures from your area to hit our MIDNIGHT GOAL, Friend. Please send your message to BOEM now and prevent drilling in the critically endangered Rice’s whale habitat!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051655?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | ENDANGERED SPECIES ACTION ALERT: Stop Big Oil from drilling in critical habitat for one of the most endangered marine mammals on Earth! >> == Rice’s whales are gentle giants discovered less than 2 years ago in the Gulf of Mexico. With only an estimated 51 WHALES remaining , they could already be extinct in just a few years. The Bureau of Ocean Energy Management announced three new lease sales in the Gulf of Mexico, including Rice’s whale habitat. These sales would allow greedy oil companies to build massive offshore drilling rigs to suck fossil fuels from below the ocean floor, risking catastrophic oil spills! Gulf communities have felt the devastation of oil spills before: toxic pollution, destroyed beaches, the stench of decaying animals washed onto shore. Many communities have never fully recovered. We could risk it all happening again without your immediate help – this time potentially DOOMING Rice’s whale to extinction. == *Your Signature is Missing | == Oil spills are not a matter of IF but of WHEN. In the Gulf Coast, offshore pipeline leaks happen at a 10x HIGHER RATE compared to the rest of the country. One lease sale permitting Big Oil to drill in our oceans is bad enough. Three is far too high of a risk. Fishing is a vital part of the economy for many Gulf communities. These lease sales could risk the entire livelihoods of thousands living along the coast. The severe health impacts from oil spills make the situation even worse. Toxic fumes from oil-stained shores can cause trouble breathing, heart damage, and damage to immune systems. The choice is clear, Friend: BOEM can choose to let Big Oil drill in critical Rice’s whale habitat and risk another oil spill in the Gulf, or it can protect communities and wildlife on our coasts. But we’re running out of time before this comment period closes! == == Standing with you, Hallie Templeton Legal Director & Senior Campaigner, Friends of the Earth** | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

name: Phil Rizzo
subject: Save the Date: Nov 9th - Mike Huckabee at Trump National
body:
September 12, 2023 Bedminster, New Jersey: Governor Mike Huckabee is set to give the keynote address at the inaugural Project 29:2
Gala being held at Trump National in Bedminster on November 9, 2023. New Jersey 101.5 radio host Bill Spadea will emcee.

“I’m honored to be invited to stand with so many strong leaders in New Jersey’s faith community.” Spadea said. “This event serves
as a starting point for uniting people of all faiths to join us. The journey and battles ahead will be challenging and rewarding.
The fight to restore common sense to New Jersey government is critical and urgent. Our victories will benefit all New Jerseyans.”

Dominick Cuozzo, President of Project 29:2 stated, “God instituted human government and God intended for people of faith to take
it seriously. History has proven that when we do, society is better for everyone. This is our message: our country is in need of
the voices, values, and involvement of people of faith.”

Former gubernatorial candidate and spokesman for Project 29:2, Pastor Phil Rizzo, commented; “We are all witnessing the moral
degradation in our state. I believe this coincides with the faith community withdrawing itself from the political process.
Involving people that stand for our Judeo-Christian founding principles is the only way forward.”

Both Dominick Cuozzo and Phil Rizzo are pastors that have been involved in New Jersey politics. Their goal is to educate other New
Jersey faith leaders. When asked what has given apprehensions to faith leaders in the past, Rizzo responded; “It’s been
unwarranted fears. Biblical principles are not partisan. Pastors and ministry leaders need to know that teaching the entirety of
Scripture will not result in loss of tax exemption status.” Rizzo continued, “Project 29:2 is an education ministry, and
educating New Jersey’s faith leaders is vital.”

Phil Rizzo posted a “Save The Date” [https://email.mg.ascendadvisers.com/c/eJxskT1v2zAQQH8NNRr8PIoDh6CGiiKtnS5F3EWgSEpmKkaCeK4r_fpCGYoOHu8OeHh459sUrMLoj883fD3dnv9c7lK9nb9XwULtjFBVtAyMllTAPmSXxhbXOVrv8uzS8P7fboeBYj4a7eq6lz3UgTINUnWiulrDZBdAKVWD65xnXQ-9M1wzF6gJQVfJcsoFo0xxRqlQB9r5KGvfgWKUmV4TSfNwcMXH9-DC71TiUg5-ytVor4hzIeKJ8IbwBu8JMS77jfDmLS4lrkvatonwpqDDWyG8YWAMZ2C4BK0o14xpIppCxFEC4YBEHAc8z-k1__xiIK-iP23Tp_P6VI3TR7hf3bo1ny9f68vpmr9N_OWl_1EtNsz3NI6pwO477HU-HNFGbP9VQ7tDHhLQ-im3j77yNwAA__-tboke]
flyer tagging Governor Mike Huckabee on his social media last week.

Project 29:2 is dedicated to educating, activating and mobilizing faith leaders and people of faith, helping them leverage their
influence and have impact within the civic, governmental, and political arena..

Copyright © 2023 Project 292, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is: PO BOX 1656 Morristown, NJ 07960

To unsubscribe click: <https://email.mg.ascendadvisers.com/u/eJxMzjFP8zAQxvFPU4-Rz7EdZ_DwSq9gKJSyIDJVZ985NcRN1KSU8ulROrE-0v_RLx4yebNw_L-9LO-7y_a7u2rz8fIqyFuHbW0EF8zDYblN7COWCXN_-rOtvTUQuW3QuaSTdSShsdqEWhw9Q0ICG2SDLSXWyAFqCcqxC0xkRPZKqhokGAVS1qaSIbJ2MVgDEtrUbLQsfYVz5BMhfeWZz3MVxyKG8Y7_DLefh8fuyXW7Y3ke1X6f3sTZ03TNw5Bnux70K_ceLX6j_v0GAAD__6onTfQ>

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Checking in before the deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
As a first-time candidate, I am blown away by the generosity of people just like you. | | Peter, I just have one last update before our midnight deadline. Right now, we’re so close to hitting our $20,000 mid-month goal, but we still need 29 donations to close the gap.

I decided to run for Congress knowing I could have a greater impact on my community by repairing systemic issues — **_not in the trauma bay, but in the halls of Congress._**

**This campaign is a team effort. We need all of our supporters chipping in where they’re able to reach every goal. That’s why I hope today you’ll chip in[$10 to help my campaign reach $20,000 before midnight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brian-williams-october-2023?refcode=em23_231015_MM4K_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231015_MM4K_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=10a3f015-9e6b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73
?amount=10)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Williams
Date: October 12, 2023
Subject: Building on our momentum
Team, last month, we crushed our end-of-quarter fundraising goal — raising over $350,000! **But if we’re going to elect Dr. Williams as the next representative from TX-32 next November, building on this momentum is critical.**

Right now, we’re so close to hitting our $20,000 mid-month goal, but we still need 29 donations to close the gap. I decided to run for Congress knowing I could have a greater impact on my community by repairing systemic issues — not in the trauma bay, but in the halls of Congress. This campaign is a team effort. _**Forwarded message from The Collective PAC:**_

Peter,

Black women in politics are under attack.

Across the country, lawmakers, prosecutors, and judges are being burdened with an onslaught of racist and misogynistic attacks.

Right now, we’re seeing extremists like Trump, DeSantis, and Jim Jordan go after Black women like Fani Willis and Monique Worrell for _doing their job_ and going after those who break the law.

And in North Carolina, a state judicial commission is attempting to restrict the First Amendment rights of Supreme Court Justice Anita Earls for daring to point out the clear racial bias in the state judiciary.

clean_body: Here are some quick numbers you need to know about Mondaire's race in New York’s 17th District: Team—Here are some quick numbers you need to know about Mondaire's race in New York’s 17th District: FIVE: Democrats need to flip just five seats to retake control of the House—and we have one of our best shots here in NY-17. FOUR: NY-17 is made up of four counties—and Mondaire will fight for folks in every single one. THREE: Election experts at three outlets— Cook Political Report, Inside Elections, and Sabato’s Crystal Ball —are calling this race a “toss-up!” TWO: Roll Call named Mike Lawler the second most vulnerable member of Congress. ONE: Mike Lawler won by less than one percent in 2022. ZERO: The amount of money Mondaire is taking from corporate PACs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, MondaireForCongress.com Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = **= ********= ******** ****************** PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | ---|--- The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated next month. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. Peter Willis —

Did you see our note yesterday about the Ohio election? Abortion is on the ballot and millions of women’s access to healthcare lies in the balance.

What’s more, this race is a serious bellwether for 2024. We can’t let the billionaire, dark money extremists funding anti-abortion, book-banning, anti-LGBTQ campaigns across the country head into next year with a win.

Abortion is on the ballot in Ohio, and early voting started this week.

Our Revolution has been organizing for months to make sure this measure passes, and abortion is constitutionally protected in the Buckeye State moving forward. But the resistance has been real. Please rush a donation of $10 today to ensure that we are doing everything we can ahead of Election Day to make sure that Ohio women don’t have to face this fight again. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10252?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20231015_fr_oh_0_2MO_amandanichols_na_na_ohturnout&t=1022&akid=4794%2E5885482%2EmyoHUf)
