name: Wesley Bell (personal)
subject: I hate having to message you so late, but here's an update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
An update about our organizing plan Peter, I just got an update!

Just a couple of days ago, I had a meeting with my campaign team, where we formulated a plan to FIRE Josh Hawley.

Our plan to win hinges on my campaign's ability to **organize** from the ground up, **meet** people where they are, and **speak** to them directly about the issues that matter most. But for our campaign to scale up to this challenge, we desperately need your support to ensure we can continue to grow this grassroots movement.

And thanks to your support, so far, we've been able to raise $13,248 of our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal to give our organizing campaign the kick-off we need. Before tonight's midnight deadline, will you donate $5 or anything you can today to ensure we hit this critical fundraising goal? >> [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bell-q4-23?refcode2=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71631061/432722509/-1824387521?refcode=em23_231015_mm3_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231015_mm3_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=77e92e30-a66b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzdlOTJlMzAtYTY2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=DVQtsNdd6Z1G-ptuIIZVzkIpKe4fCKJbfHl2MfvV3gI=)

Thank you,

Wesley

We appreciate you. In gratitude, Team Wes Moore

name: Jon Tester via Alex-Padilla.com
subject: I’m stressed.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hey there, it’s Alex Padilla. My friend Jon Tester is in what’s likely to be one of the closest Senate races in the country, and he needs our help to fight back against the millions Mitch McConnell and the GOP are going to spend attacking him. I hope you’ll read his message below about why this is so important – and then[**consider splitting a donation between our campaigns today.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-tester-october23.M6kld0&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=1&akid=1567%2E159979%2EsNg6js)**

[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-tester-october23.M6kld0&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=2&akid=1567%2E159979%2EsNg6js)
---
Folks:
I’m stressed. My finance team just called me to let me know we’re still $23,736 short of our October fundraising goal—this is especially bad news because national Republican groups are attacking me earlier than ever before.
[**Before I explain any more, I wanted to ask: Is there any way you can split a contribution between Alex Padilla and my campaign to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal today? It’s important.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-tester-october23.M6kld0&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=3&akid=1567%2E159979%2EsNg6js)**

---
****

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2332?c0=ap-em-tester-october23.DaXViN&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=24&akid=1567%2E159979%2EsNg6js)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2333?c0=ap-em-tester-october23.jk8Tz2&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=25&akid=1567%2E159979%2EsNg6js)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2334?c0=ap-em-tester-october23.GkVMqG&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=26&akid=1567%2E159979%2EsNg6js)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2337?c0=ap-em-tester-october23.7xkokN&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=27&akid=1567%2E159979%2EsNg6js)**
---
****
We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough.
With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.
Folks, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. **I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.**
Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
So, here’s the part where I ask: [**Can you make a split contribution of $17.77 (our average online donation) today to Alex and my campaign to help meet our mid-month goal? Your donations keep me fighting for regular folks in Washington, and will help us respond to the onslaught of out-of-state money coming in to attack my record.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-tester-october23.M6kld0&refcode=em231015-1-30&t=28&akid=1567%2E159979%2EsNg6js)**

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Baby monarch caterpillars are losing their ONLY food source
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051657?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **Your Signature Is Needed: Save monarch butterflies from Bayer-Monsanto’s dangerous pesticides! [ _Sign the petition now! >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051658?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** Perched on a backyard fence, a beautiful bright orange monarch butterfly searches desperately for a spot for her offspring. Milkweed plants are the ONLY place these iconic butterflies can reproduce and lay their eggs. And once her baby caterpillars hatch, milkweed will be their ONLY source of food. **To put it bluntly, monarchs CANNOT SURVIVE without milkweed. ** **_But where has all the milkweed gone, Friend?_** Over the last 20 years, **850 million** milkweed plants have disappeared, while an alarming **90%** of the North American monarch population has _DIED OUT_. **_Now, these epic butterflies are officially ENDANGERED._** Meanwhile, Bayer-Monsanto continues to contribute to their decline by pushing sales of glyphosate, the active ingredient in Roundup. The Big Pesticide corporation has even been _**caught lying to the public**_ \-- _**manipulating science**_ and _**evading pesticide regulations**_ to cover up the truth of how _DANGEROUS_ Roundup really is! [_**We can’t let Bayer-Monsanto get away with their greedy lies that could push endangered monarch butterflies to EXTINCTION. Please step up now and fight back! >>** _](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051659?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051660?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Bayer-Monsanto’s profit-driven lies and manipulation don’t just harm monarchs and other endangered pollinators that are critical to our ecosystems, Friend.
Glyphosate has been linked to **cancer, reproductive harm, and other serious health risks in humans** \-- ** _with children being the most susceptible to exposure!_ **
Yet despite _KNOWING_ these dangers, Bayer-Monsanto still willingly continues to put **profits above people, pollinators, and the planet.** But even with the _**MILLIONS of dollars**_ that the powerful company pours into ** _covering up the TRUTH about how UNSAFE Roundup really is_** , we know that _YOU_ won’t be fooled by Bayer-Monsanto’s deceitful lies, Friend.
That’s why we’re coming to you today to help us reach **5,312 more signatures** on our petition telling Bayer-Monsanto to clean up its act and ** _STOP selling toxic Roundup immediately._** [ _**_Can we count on you to add your name RIGHT NOW before 11:59 P.M. tonight?_**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051661?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION NOW ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2051662?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for protecting our pollinators against corporate greed,
Friends of the Earth **
|

Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 [Contact us](foe.org/about-us/contact/)

name: Keep Oregon Blue (via Team Salinas)
subject: Tired of seeing the People’s House turned into a venue for right-wing political theater?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Us too. Add your name to help Democrats take back the House.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71631431/432723622/-1683764351?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODgyNjI0YS1hNzZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mGZe4LEnpapRX2LwuLLTikKeWTDAhJc-x_5NBO0hNZc=&emci=9f354391-5168-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&emdi=1882624a-a76b-ee11-9937-00224832eb73&ceid=5643047)**
---
Are you tired of seeing the People’s House turned into a venue for right-wing political theater?

Us too.

Andrea ran for Congress to lower costs, fight the substance use crisis, improve public safety in our communities, and defend our rights — and that’s exactly what the people of Oregon’s 6th District elected her to do.

Plain and simple: The MAGA Majority cares more about their partisan infighting and their extremist agenda than delivering for the American people.

body:
New Hampshire Needs Your Help
| | |
---
| | Derek, I hope this message finds you well. Our mission to secure a brighter future for New Hampshire continues, and I'm reaching out today because your support is critical to our success. In these challenging times, Granite Solutions is dedicated to electing Republican leaders who will champion the principles of limited government, individual liberty, and fiscal responsibility. We are determined to build a stronger New Hampshire that empowers its citizens and ensures that the values we hold dear are upheld. The success of our mission depends on dedicated individuals like you. By contributing to Granite Solutions, you are investing in a New Hampshire that values conservative ideals. Your generous support allows us to fund critical campaign activities, such as voter outreach, grassroots organizing, and digital advertising, all of which are essential to victory. Every dollar counts, and your contribution, [whether it's $10, $25, $50, or more](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.), will directly impact our ability to elect Republican leaders. With your help, we can expand our majority in the New Hampshire House and Senate, ensuring that conservative values continue to guide our state's policies. Now is the time to take action. Join us in our fight to secure a prosperous and free New Hampshire by making a contribution to Granite Solutions. Your support sends a clear message that you stand with us in this important mission.

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71631675/432724620/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20231015_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGU0NDA1ZDItYTk2Yi1lZTExLTk5MzctMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KBKNhhiV7f-dfT5x4xM3bXpBOuhF7ez6iXIRZlcxqZE=)

Peter, I thought I should take a moment to address some of the most frequently asked questions I get about HER Time:
1. **Why do you send all of these emails?**
These emails are the primary way HER Time raises money to support all the work we do. Whether that’s advocating for our issues (like passing the _SHIELD Act_)_,_ protecting abortion, or boosting women candidates like Lauren Underwood or Angie Craig. They’re also the most direct way for our team to send critical updates to our supporters — like you!
2. **Does my $5 really make a difference?**
Yes! $5 may seem insignificant compared to the huge checks pouring in from Republican super PACs, but small donations prove the power of a grassroots team. When you multiply $3 or $5 or $10 over and over by everyone reading these emails, the impact can be huge. But grassroots power only works if everyone plays their part.
3. **Do you expect me to donate every time we reach out?**
_Of course not!_ But we do hope you open our emails and give them a read, because they have the most up-to-date information about our work, and your engagement helps us out.

While we don’t expect you to donate to every email, I hope you’ll consider donating to this one. [_**What do you say, Peter? Have I answered your questions? clean_body: | = Peter, I thought I should take a moment to address some of the most frequently asked questions I get about HER Time: 1. Why do you send all of these emails? These emails are the primary way HER Time raises money to support all the work we do. Whether that’s advocating for our issues (like passing the SHIELD Act), protecting abortion, or boosting women candidates like Lauren Underwood or Angie Craig. They’re also the most direct way for our team to send critical updates to our supporters — like you! 2. Does my $5 really make a difference? Yes! $5 may seem insignificant compared to the huge checks pouring in from Republican super PACs, but small donations prove the power of a grassroots team. When you multiply $3 or $5 or $10 over and over by everyone reading these emails, the impact can be huge. But grassroots power only works if everyone plays their part. 3. Do you expect me to donate every time we reach out? Of course not! But we do hope you open our emails and give them a read, because they have the most up-to-date information about our work, and your engagement helps us out. While we don’t expect you to donate to every email, I hope you’ll consider donating to this one. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, team. — Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

| | Derek, My team just let me know that we’re still short of reaching our mid-month fundraising goal, and frankly, I’m a little surprised. Take a look: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71631937/432725521/1131571155?refcode=mw_em_231015_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNlMjM2MS1hYTZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XdyNWEFfPAdvjOI4uNBk0hYwqYinD_O2gSdZzZk0_yE=) _****[Rush $5 right now to help us boost our fundraising efforts so we can turn VA blue>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71631938/432725522/1131571155?refcode=mw_em_231015_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNlMjM2MS1hYTZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XdyNWEFfPAdvjOI4uNBk0hYwqYinD_O2gSdZzZk0_yE=)****_ Last month was our strongest month of the entire year, which wasn’t all that shocking. We expected a fundraising spike as we got closer to Election Day. But I was a bit bewildered when my team told me that not only are we short of hitting our mid-month goal for October, **but at our current pace, we’re going to come up short of hitting our fundraising projections for the entire month.** Our fundraising efforts cannot take a hit now. Not when Republicans have the opportunity to control the House of Delegates, the Virginia Senate, and the governor’s office. October is the last chance we have to get Democrats in Virginia across the campaign finish line and elected to the General Assembly where they get things done for everyday Virginians. _****[Can you help me give Democrats the resources they need to win next month by donating anything you can today before our mid-month fundraising deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/71631939/432725523/1131571155?refcode=mw_em_231015_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDNlMjM2MS1hYTZiLWVlMTEtOTkzNy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XdyNWEFfPAdvjOI4uNBk0hYwqYinD_O2gSdZzZk0_yE=)****_ We’re so close, Derek, we can’t give up now. name: Karl Rove
subject: While it’s true the environment favors our party retaking the Senate in 2024, things can change in the blink of an eye.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I’ve been in politics nearly my entire life and I can tell you what we have before us is a once in a generation opportunity to not only build Republican majorities in the House and the Senate | Fellow American,

In politics, we can’t take anything for granted. **While it’s true the environment favors our party retaking the Senate in 2024,_things can change in the blink of an eye._**

I remember well the night that Al Gore – having previously conceded the presidency – called to tell Texas Gov. George W. Bush that he was withdrawing his concession and would take the fight over who won Florida to the U.S. Supreme Court.

A more recent example of why elections matter would be the 2021 Georgia Senate runoffs. Had Republicans held onto those seats, America won’t not be in the “transitory” phase of inflation we’re in today. **A Republican majority would have blocked Biden’s $1.9 TRILLION “American Rescue Plan.” that set inflation raging.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c3fff7a836f24e02bb1f133653a43066&_e=5p9BPXPtaDDHYGZTiZ80WhNcaYAxE6dVLpXny6Ke2gwGmXyQSZnmkmP8-dhDaPZH4BsQsq9nxsmBwipEioMVKMhbKm7_9bjB7_l3hhiHPuLAF5RHFXN37C2DSWd_biJPgS5alYGSgm4tcymS2WRgeqjT-OjNHrPnCdnuczbVgOxawphKcf42cchsUcs3xrICJnD6AU5ozgRZyIpOu4CjUuLZaLebayoN7REGnKRrMO2D6YFDnafjTdl_yhBmuGNJc1wrSqJOAoQDxhgEkNhcsLnvPcnztLDjpZmHawfhk0hic67O_B8x3-GEqZTEUp4Nn39_nCVYIbiIM1fsH2tA4CNyoL8RVsC78UMTUQcSaw8IHDirFahUiKIg0GS__umAddZRECjsQlHkkIrj1V7TNi2mhYAoZoh40twOQCU_U_I%3D)

The math before is simple.

**3 -> Number of Senate seats now held by Democrats in Red States.
2 -> Seats we need to FLIP the Senate.
1 -> my ask of you today.**

[**Will you help NOW so we can prepare for victories next November?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c3fff7a836f24e02bb1f133653a43066&_e=5p9BPXPtaDDHYGZTiZ80WhNcaYAxE6dVLpXny6Ke2gwGmXyQSZnmkmP8-dhDaPZH4BsQsq9nxsmBwipEioMVKMhbKm7_9bjB7_l3hhiHPuLAF5RHFXN37C2DSWd_biJPgS5alYGSgm4tcymS2WRgeqjT-OjNHrPnCdnuczbVgOxawphKcf42cchsUcs3xrICJnD6AU5ozgRZyIpOu4CjUuLZaLebayoN7REGnKRrMO2D6YFDnafjTdl_yhBmuGNJc1wrSqJOAoQDxhgEkNhcsNS_U_AECg78x4DAtnzXMekP5IifpREtgQo6Ojkb3Ju9ChhRTtBwV695PlCPtvAj4V7Gxu9jpUz5WpBG-3i6MlMJQiffr7J2lkyYXCAVssx4i6B--k0ifxo4aMLqsOYTFxWxi4woI8fyYDQ712ugScc%3D)

Fellow American, I’ve been in politics nearly my entire life and I can tell you what we have before us is a once in a generation opportunity to not only build Republican majorities in the House and the Senate – but to correct, mend, fix, and reverse the mess Democrats have thrust upon our country dating back to Barack Obama’s election in 2008.

[**I’m asking you to donate $10 today to help make sure the GOP has the resources necessary to make the best possible investments in Republican candidates when that moment arrives.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c3fff7a836f24e02bb1f133653a43066&_e=5p9BPXPtaDDHYGZTiZ80WhNcaYAxE6dVLpXny6Ke2gwGmXyQSZnmkmP8-dhDaPZH4BsQsq9nxsmBwipEioMVKMhbKm7_9bjB7_l3hhiHPuLAF5RHFXN37C2DSWd_biJPgS5alYGSgm4tcymS2WRgeqjT-OjNHrPnCdnuczbVgOxawphKcf42cchsUcs3xrICJnD6AU5ozgRZyIpOu4CjUuLZaLebayoN7REGnKRrMO2D6YFDnafjTdl_yhBmuGNJc1wrSqJOAoQDxhgEkNhcsIVZBdgo-8GtjGNtHYo4KY4_iRaxzRNXieR7nNi1ec3YGRi4V8QYxHMwAWFenazBpxNsJ1PWzC-se9o_bBSynhyuvjJASj1hKyScN74BiuUaX1dc7xGVvdRZV_XxOE7TBU-c-MlnD3rmnHKQAtswsqc%3D)

[**Can you help me reach my target goal for the NRSC by midnight tonight?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c3fff7a836f24e02bb1f133653a43066&_e=5p9BPXPtaDDHYGZTiZ80WhNcaYAxE6dVLpXny6Ke2gwGmXyQSZnmkmP8-dhDaPZH4BsQsq9nxsmBwipEioMVKMhbKm7_9bjB7_l3hhiHPuLAF5RHFXN37C2DSWd_biJPgS5alYGSgm4tcymS2WRgeqjT-OjNHrPnCdnuczbVgOxawphKcf42cchsUcs3xrICJnD6AU5ozgRZyIpOu4CjUuLZaLebayoN7REGnKRrMO2D6YFDnafjTdl_yhBmuGNJc1wrSqJOAoQDxhgEkNhcsLlJyp4reEetOvkLy0vA3Z0w6LuQDQ7W68YvWJN8C-sXNjrjODQyJdek1QZczlZEuYv4HcKW6t4f730ennmKvxFyfvJTV0bakR-K3QMelQ6wHdezRAmb-PwNrLYtNxBCgvGlPccX-6RmT9CwthBYp_c%3D)

Karl Rove

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A simple question:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
With hours to go, I am humbly asking if there is anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to my campaign.
#

Peter, it’s Ruben.
Just a quick, simple question from me before our mid-month deadline at midnight:
**With hours to go, I am humbly asking if there is anything I can say to convince you to make a donation to my campaign.**
What if I told you that Kyrsten Sinema — with nearly $11 million in the bank — is going to announce her campaign any day now?
What if I told you that Kari Lake — who JUST announced her campaign — is raking in money hand over fist as we speak?
And what if I told you that in a three way race between me, Kyrsten Sinema, and Kari Lake, anything can happen?
We need to be prepared for every scenario we can possibly expect. And we need to raise a really massive amount of resources to fund a campaign that can go the distance and win next year.
A win to take back Arizona’s Senate seat. A win to hold control in the Senate. And a win — really — to help keep Trump out of the White House. Because if we can win in Arizona, we can help President Biden win, too.
Please, we have to make these next hours count. So, one more time, I am humbly asking:
[**Make your first donation before our deadline at midnight tonight. If you do, we’ll be one step closer to hitting our goal. One step closer to victory in Arizona.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-oct23.kRA6ky&refcode=em231015-3&t=1&akid=1336%2E734936%2EE-4P2H)

subject: Our moment to pull ahead

body:
George Santos will be in court later this month
#
Friend – at the end of the month George Santos is going to stand trial for his 23 criminal charges.

The charges include conspiracy, fraud, identity theft, and more. All of which Santos has said he will “pretty much” deny.

**We need to make sure our campaign is BLASTING out our message the entire time he is on the stand!**

[If we can raise $10,000 in the next week, we will be able to launch a digital blitz to target George Santos when it matters most!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-mm?amount=10&refcode=em231015-no&refcode2=513_8507_xpLskj&akid=513%2E8507%2ExpLskj) [_Will you pitch in $10 or more today to help us get there by our mid-month deadline at midnight tonight?_](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2310-mm?amount=10&refcode=em231015-no&refcode2=513_8507_xpLskj&akid=513%2E8507%2ExpLskj)

body:
We know it's a Sunday evening, so we'll make this brief. Peter – We know it's a Sunday evening, so we'll make this brief.

Tonight at midnight is our final mid-month fundraising deadline. We need one last surge of support to ensure we have the resources to re-elect Andy in just a few short weeks.

[**Will you help us? name: =?utf-8?Q?Shawnna=20LM=20Bolick?=
subject: LAST CALL: Please Join Us on October 18th for our Campaign Kick-off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Bolick
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bolickforarizona/lastcall_oct18thkickoff2023-2133922?e=a7ab36849c)
---
| |
---
| Please join us at 5:30pm on Wednesday, October 18th as I kick-off my campaign for the State Senate.

The Democrats are fielding a well-funded incumbent legislator to win this Senate seat and have committed as much as two million dollars. The State Senate currently has 16 Republicans and 14 Democrats. Everything we have built upon the last 20 years in this state is on the line from universal school choice to our low flat tax policy. If this Democratic governor gets her way, the Republicans will be in the minority next legislative session.

Together, we can grow our GOP majority and keep Arizona free, but I need your help today. name: Derek Marshall for Congress
subject: Add your name: Tell Congress to preserve DACA and protect our Dreamers!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
**[Save DACA! Sign ON to support Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnlsX8Yr6xMmF1i5guQujZPx9XlpPGv80NqzUihMHrcPq5XPSOszCTZUmHhw6xl7xdIp9Nits8FRG_akOJIpsDkUz_RyRVb-dEcOC8YI9IcImaDf_8EUvipqF0FmkjQZ7EAIi2VbWqGoNPP300SlGHJ1GqcH9idKGLJH2t5NXJVXfAkhtZZwDojPzRedUQXge0PB8Gs4M_I9RxyUBxGYeT09TpgsYpItqp4iDC4qNZQRGI0-vU7CbxIluBKbNxrqNSvC1Qof8OQYsIEr3HHUXsVpeeWiq6osDg2eaUjDvpZ0Bg158ZQKdH5dXUvaNNE9VZJjC0E4n1HJCq1KUDkltU9cGN5NYsbK7dQGI51UXYJEajabDe6Fkx6MBJUyz-MLwteZPq5Sh3h-IXNYv_VDQzyGLizJjm6fSk_TqI-DMla9p4ntb913t2rxipsLXfkRiFN_2tFTjlCyCtuaD1pIDCdToE6lm2WU5JHQVFQ5S9nPNIh2wjyK9o4sJNpefY2ouf_nCKzGoXSUDRI1qWP1LJSG9vyUayz6CeZKaRq-L45qQ/40g/BJ26AvpXReC6_gKQ3njrZQ/h0/vpHbIY9KOzlmoOcj6u87TikMXmEwM4wEupVsMR7aYgg) **
* * *

In Texas, a federal judge ruled that DACA (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) is unlawful, throwing the lives of undocumented people in the United States into a perpetual state of anxiety and uncertainty as new childhood arrivals would not be protected from deportation.
DACA recipients, also known as Dreamers, are undocumented immigrants that came to the US as children with their parents. They had no part in the decision to come to America.
Being “DACAmented” allows recipients to get a Social Security number, a drivers license, a job, and plan their lives in the United States of America, the only home they have ever known.
Ruling DACA unlawful throws recipients back into legal limbo, and it is an affront to the promise of America. **
** **Derek Marshall is running for Congress to protect DACA and provide a pathway to citizenship for DREAMers. We need your help to flip CA-23 red to blue and take back the House.**

This week offered multiple case studies in disinformation and propaganda spread by sources ranging from MSNBC to the White House itself. The militarism enabled by failures of institutional journalists has led thousands to their graves, and international human rights to their ruin.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/de641eb6-870f-4884-8289-3b941866ce32?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by: Ali Hamad, [Wikimedia Commons](https://substack.com/redirect/66fd58c4-532c-4012-a53c-006b10904a27?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **Journalists have a job to do**
One reason I focus so much of my ire on journalists and editors is because they are supposed to play [such a crucial role](https://substack.com/redirect/ff15c802-5d1e-4e60-8cf1-cf1d07684987?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in ensuring legitimacy, transparency, and accountability in government.
Their failures cascade well beyond their profession. By leaving the public blind to important issues (or by [legitimating outright lies](https://substack.com/redirect/390c340f-2b78-47d1-a93b-80a57a50a095?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), journalists ultimately enforce ignorance on the electoral process that, in turn, allows militarism to increasingly threaten democracy--as[ we were warned that it would](https://substack.com/redirect/f712a777-bcee-4147-8122-5149eb4bee97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It's not as if Muslim journalists are being sidelined by news outlets based on their religion. They're being removed based on their awareness of systemic injustices in which their respective institutional media outlets have been actively complicit for 75 years.
When I discovered the depravity of our electoral system's corruption in 2020, I learned that there are many ways to rig an election, and that political parties routinely do so.
Stuffing ballot boxes was the traditional technique. Hacking voting machines might be a newer one. A president trying to strong arm election officials is no less outrageous.
But throughout, controlling the press is one way that capital in the United States has successfully co-opted both of the major political parties and effectively rigged elections in its favor. The press plays a crucial role enabling corruption that journalists are ethically committed to instead exposing and holding accountable.
Voters rely on journalists to make informed decisions, but the willingness of editors to [suppress](https://substack.com/redirect/ccb28273-50c3-4585-8ef1-27e490c4eb3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) facts [inconvenient](https://substack.com/redirect/d9605900-70fe-43a2-b75b-0d89efae2fd4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Wall Street and the Pentagon, while [amplifying](https://substack.com/redirect/8721a201-d66c-4111-a70c-81fee45e3b68?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) every lie they spin on behalf of corporate profits and weapons manufacturers, ensures the ignorance of voters.
Crises inevitably result.
The mounting global climate catastrophe and the war in Gaza offer two among any number of tragic--and preventable--examples.
Efforts to keep the public in the dark range from corporate platforms suppressing content, to Washington prosecuting whistleblowers and publishers under a bipartisan consensus. Want to help spread a little sunlight? Share this post!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=137995861&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM3OTk1ODYxLCJpYXQiOjE2OTc0MTQzOTQsImV4cCI6MTcwMDAwNjM5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Lzo-ZwwHmgufbySt-I6gNrRQaSO-eR87EaZCMmgXB0w)
### **MSNBC shows its true colors**
Few examples demonstrate an abdication of responsibility better than MSNBC [marginalizing each of its several Muslim anchors](https://substack.com/redirect/ebbbdcc6-754d-46a2-af1f-d5a50d7a67fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the wake of the war in Gaza. A cable content producer prominently featuring opinions alongside reporting, the network's status as a "news outlet" may be debatable. For better or worse, many viewers rely on MSNBC for what they perceive as facts.
When I ran for office, I spent years hoping that MSNBC might take note of our campaign, since our efforts offered the chance for progressive rhetoric about any number of issues to find some basis in policy. My platform proposed novel policy solutions to climate chaos, healthcare, labor, education, policing and judicial ethics.
But MSNBC is not interested in the issues that concern Democratic Party voters. The network is most interested in propping up the corporate leadership of the Democratic Party.
The illusion of inclusion at MSNBC follows a predictable pathway of demographic co-optation on which the Democratic Party largely relies. I've written about how that is [one reason why the presidential campaign of Cornel West could be so incredibly significant](https://substack.com/redirect/3736fc74-a820-4a41-bda9-d17f998d539b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): he, better than any other previous presidential candidate, is poised to expose the lie at the root of the Democratic Party's co-optation of Black Americans in the service of supporting white capital.
MSNBC choosing to hire Muslim anchors in the first place was significant. [Removing them from the air after they demonstrated the independence](https://substack.com/redirect/ebbbdcc6-754d-46a2-af1f-d5a50d7a67fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to report on current events with greater accuracy than their colleagues is inescapably more significant.
Mehdi Hasan, Ali Velshi, and Ayman Mohyeldin have each shown the courage to report the facts from the War in Gaza, in spite of the Washington spin machine dedicated to portraying Palestinians as animals and their resistance to illegal occupation as terrorism.
In [response](https://substack.com/redirect/04495a92-42ba-47e7-838c-036e7934b49c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), MSNBC:
> did not air a Thursday edition of The Mehdi Hasan Show on its streaming platform, reversed course on its plans to have Ayman Mohyeldin fill in for Joy Reid's 7 o'clock show on Thursday and Friday and intends to have Alicia Menendez replace Ali Velshi this weekend....
More significant than MSNBC hiring them in the first place, or removing them when they did their jobs, is the stunning silence across the rest of the institutional press while observing a demographic--and ideological--purge of its own ranks. Some even came to the defense of MSNBC, accepting claims by NBC that the surprise moves at MSNBC were merely "[coincidental](https://substack.com/redirect/04495a92-42ba-47e7-838c-036e7934b49c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
It's not as if Muslim journalists are being sidelined by news outlets based on their religion. They're being removed based on their awareness of systemic injustices in which their respective institutional media outlets have been actively complicit for 75 years.
Over 22,000 readers subscribe to this newsletter. Under 100 support it. If you'd like to help expand my work and make more frequent publications possible, please consider a paid subscription. Most of my content appears above the paywall to keep it accessible to readers with a free subscription.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..g3Eq23bcWDLqe-7MTCos-I_9O7AKzjBUGK_HDWvXI_k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=137995861)
Nor is this the first time that MSNBC has purged its ranks to stifle dissent from the unrestrained militarism that drives each of the corporate political parties. 20 years ago, MSNBC removed legendary anchor [Phil Donahue from the air in retaliation for him](https://substack.com/redirect/2927519b-bf57-4d85-8f09-961e376c35ed?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) questioning official narratives promoting the war on Iraq that ultimately proved to be lies.
Truth is the lifeblood of democracy. It is also the first casualty of war.
Americans might think ourselves insulated from international conflicts, but our inability to gain access to independent reporting about global events has already wrought havoc on our own futures. Indefensible policy decisions made possible by widespread ignorance have eroded our nation's international standing, undermined the legitimacy of our own elections, filled our prisons, enabled continuing human rights abuses, placed the future at incalculable risk for ultimately foolish purposes, and driven an accelerating upward transfer of wealth.
International relations, and the recurring failures of journalism that poison them, hit much closer to home than most Americans realize.
### **Editors --and elected officials--amplify discredited lies**
For days, news outlets around the world [parroted](https://substack.com/redirect/4f41c94f-ea23-4e54-bcb7-bb1eac359018?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the [discredited](https://substack.com/redirect/0c609ebe-f504-4624-b395-51326472bb00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) claim that Hamas had beheaded Israeli babies. In this case, it's not only journalists who deserve critique and accountability for amplifying orchestrated lies, but also President Joe Biden, who himself [repeated](https://substack.com/redirect/03e61e36-c72e-4636-8f2c-137991809ce5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) those claims, and even claimed to have seen photographs that ultimately did not exist.
This is far from the first time that Biden has lied to the public. Before winning the White House in a spectacular display of national amnesia, he had been [driven out](https://substack.com/redirect/860ab13e-ce24-4888-97c1-dea60f010f92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of several presidential campaigns before by controversy surrounding his [unapologetic lies](https://substack.com/redirect/859dcabc-b989-498c-918e-cff4daf81546?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about everything from his own record to [current events and the economy](https://substack.com/redirect/6f87172b-2f8c-4291-82e6-502ce22027d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Biden claimed to have stood in solidarity with the civil rights movement, citing a political arrest that [never happened](https://substack.com/redirect/895e1011-6dad-42c5-875b-881a34e1d78d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a supposed demonstration of his moral courage. Not only did he lie to steal the valor of activists who showed the courage that Biden lacked, but his lies also aim to obscure his work as a senator that [actively undermined](https://substack.com/redirect/39da85f4-d249-4034-b493-19690abc9523?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the civil rights movement's goals.
Biden [claimed](https://substack.com/redirect/42b91996-4452-45f3-a92d-83492151f4cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to have declared a climate emergency, when he has done [no such thing](https://substack.com/redirect/5053a1ca-7494-4f24-9590-a9d92f25c966?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and--[like Obama](https://substack.com/redirect/1a2ba9f7-0c04-4ea7-90b3-f633db769260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--ultimately only [expanded](https://substack.com/redirect/33a7752a-3fd3-4969-b884-7a83ed07131c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) fossil fuel extraction [beyond](https://substack.com/redirect/6e73e69a-3e97-4606-bb01-afbb21b66355?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the baseline of his predecessor.
Biden's long-standing propensity to bend, distort, and manufacture reality bears a close relationship to that of his nominal antagonist in the presidential race, Donald Trump. Their shared attributes are just a few of the reasons why Americans have grown so thoroughly disillusioned with the escalating [farce of the 2024 election](https://substack.com/redirect/d31f66bd-6d32-44b0-b69f-070a9043dffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
It is also another reason why Democrats who rally behind Biden effectively aim to leap from a frying pan into a proverbial fire. One hopes they might relent, if only to avoid dragging the rest of us with them.
But don't hold your breath.
### **Hamas throws Netanyahu a lifeline**
It's always ironic when political actors empower their antagonists. It is even more so when they rescue them from their otherwise seemingly inevitable fates to revive their careers.
That's the story of [Dan White ultimately making Dianne Feinstein Mayor, and then a Senator](https://substack.com/redirect/d7a6bad7-71a4-48eb-85d6-a577651234b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), by assassinating Harvey Milk and George Moscone in San Francisco City Hall in 1978.
That's also the story of the United States [empowering and enabling Saudi Arabia](https://substack.com/redirect/ff1a7a27-5df1-49e4-b2ef-7cea4b4905e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) under the administrations of presidents from both of the corporate political parties over the last 50 years.
That's also the story of Obama. In 2008, he [campaigned](https://substack.com/redirect/14b5bad6-4dbe-4ae2-bcda-85ce596aebbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the White House on ending the war in Iraq and re-establishing human rights, only to [give the CIA a free pass](https://substack.com/redirect/89d3a181-12bc-4943-acde-03739719ecdf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for torture--and in the process, [sacrifice the legal victory](https://substack.com/redirect/a8883991-b7fa-4238-9d5e-8356fe9b11d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for human rights established by the Second World War, 60 years after our forebears won it on the battlefield.
That's also the story of Democrats getting [rolled](https://substack.com/redirect/b94f2d47-0dff-4773-a92f-e3315514778d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the national security establishment, and increasingly falling for [predictable lies](https://substack.com/redirect/0d0ca58e-a957-4185-91ca-84e7f7c0b016?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) enabling industrial fossil fuel extraction that, in turn, threatens all life on the only planet we know we can inhabit.
This, even after [the CIA publicly admitted this week](https://substack.com/redirect/15f41f70-b6f7-4de6-813e-1f18ea7f21e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--after 70 years--that its 1953 intervention in Iran undermined democracy. Why does it take 70 years and an official admission for journalists to simply observe what is already apparent based on the public record?
Last week, Hamas [threw a political lifeline](https://substack.com/redirect/95492642-295b-454f-bca4-1a21f5dd6a84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Israel's Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu by invading Israel. He had already [announced reforms](https://substack.com/redirect/79815e50-b4d5-48e3-acd6-ba458113b0b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Israeli governance that had prompted [massive dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/adefd5fc-51e9-47da-9a27-a893cd514554?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), including unprecedented [mobilizations and rallies](https://substack.com/redirect/7ebcfb1d-eaed-4f5b-a892-3fb783fb0ae9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) drawing support even from [within the military itself](https://substack.com/redirect/dcd973ae-5a30-47a2-a559-a0ac2bfc337e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Netanyahu had engineered his own domestic political crisis, which Hamas inadvertently helped him hurdle by uniting the entire country behind him.
On the one hand, the right to resist unjust rule is embedded in the very theory of government legitimacy on which our own legal system relies. [Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. established it himself](https://substack.com/redirect/6a502a5f-c977-4837-b090-2e1a7ad8401f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), although he carefully limited the resistance he prescribed to nonviolence.
Put another way, without rights, laws have no legitimacy. Yet too many observers forget the relationship between those two seemingly overlapping spheres, not realizing that the erosion of rights alongside the extension of law is the most reliably paved pathway to fascism.
### **Genocide, as the world watches and cheers **
This weekend, Israel escalated its assault on northern Gaza, [displacing a million people](https://substack.com/redirect/b05fb4c1-6568-48f5-8727-37d7fb52458a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) while leveling entire city blocks.
Collective punishment is an international crime and violation of human rights, yet elected leaders across the United States have [cheered](https://substack.com/redirect/849e91f2-0f6f-4203-8ea2-eb97fbc2e896?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it on. [Active support from Washington](https://substack.com/redirect/7b0a12d4-e8a0-4925-b699-13ae4c5d8257?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) continues to enable the Israeli military as it escalates and expands its retribution to now force displacement on an entire civilian population--[yet again](https://substack.com/redirect/b9956dad-333f-4069-bedb-78bbd72da79f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The collective punishment inherent in Israel's armed occupation of Palestine since 1948, as well as its longstanding blockade (which has escalated into an [outright siege](https://substack.com/redirect/cb679af8-5329-4ac8-9e4b-936d994c55dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)), settlements on disputed territory, and sustained violence towards non-combatants, were all bad enough.
This weekend's attacks on Gaza have escalated those longstanding abuses and threaten to [conclude](https://substack.com/redirect/cf3bd15d-0b6a-4f6f-a7de-c685debf0002?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) an [unfinished genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/6b73e0f3-43b0-4e40-9184-b15c544bafc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Yet among western leaders, patterns of deference and complicity remain (with only a handful of [exceptions](https://substack.com/redirect/1e9e7105-1a1b-455e-ad73-9ac5b3de895d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) a disturbing consensus.
What is happening in Gaza is ultimately the entire world's responsibility. It could have been prevented if the international community had simply defended human rights at any point in the last 75 years.
Yet, instead, discrete acts of terror--which are effectively [inevitable](https://substack.com/redirect/8072a24b-236c-45ff-9b88-e7619193899b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) wherever populations are denied basic human rights--have been met by escalating violations of human rights. The war crimes committed by Hamas when murdering Israeli civilians earlier this month have been used to justify [ever](https://substack.com/redirect/4eeff3ba-f151-47c4-b09c-50d9ff489f0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) more [severe](https://substack.com/redirect/b55d4302-6906-4373-9e1b-534eb021a81b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [expansive](https://substack.com/redirect/72ca824f-cc11-41bb-9913-4a492972b3e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) retaliation by Israel.
This pattern has grown painfully well-established over the past three generations. The past week's escalation into outright war continues a terrifying pattern, one in which the entire globe is complicit.
Ultimately, the world's failure to have supported human rights in Palestine so speaks to [inherent limits](https://substack.com/redirect/bdbb6108-2946-42c9-ac68-0b321b203c71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the United Nation's structure. On the one hand, the U.N. General Assembly has passed [dozens of resolutions](https://substack.com/redirect/e82795ee-b9d3-46c2-82d8-ef3168a232b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) condemning one or another international crime by Israel in the context of its illegal occupation of Gaza and the West Bank.
Yet Israel enjoys impunity because of its relationship with Washington, which wields its veto on the Security Council to insulate it from any meaningful accountability. The Security Council structure allows member states--all nuclear powers--to [effectively stand above international law](https://substack.com/redirect/91f3cf8a-c67f-47ee-a96c-f4d62754f02b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), as the United States [has long done](https://substack.com/redirect/e76f2ed1-b0ec-489c-9785-2b8c1069f0f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Until member states submit to international law and [allow adjudication](https://substack.com/redirect/d366f9eb-2220-49a7-92da-27de55088341?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by bodies like the International Criminal Court, none can plausibly claim any legitimacy to stand for human rights. America bears particular responsibility, both because our nation once did so much to establish international human rights before abandoning them to our own leaders, and also because a bipartisan consensus in Washington has done [everything conceivably possible](https://substack.com/redirect/f9dbe0da-27d8-40d7-b0c0-ee9192732958?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to instigate violence from afar.

Paid subscribers can access a poem written by an iconic Black poet whose canonical work reflecting on the Black experience in America carries inescapable parallels with Palestine. While many Americans remain brainwashed about the reality on the ground in the Middle East, poetry offers a way to connect situations across contexts and--hopefully--work around implicit biases.
I'll also throw in a link to one of my original songs addressing the intersection between human rights abuses in Palestine and those in the United States.
Nothing disturbs me more than [America's commitment to militarism](https://substack.com/redirect/8684b733-fa1c-414c-add0-e9625fb3a2d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), except what it portends for the future we all share...

Their failures cascade well beyond their profession. By leaving the public blind to important issues (or by ), journalists ultimately enforce ignorance on the electoral process that, in turn, allows militarism to increasingly threaten democracy--as. It's not as if Muslim journalists are being sidelined by news outlets based on their religion. They're being removed based on their awareness of systemic injustices in which their respective institutional media outlets have been actively complicit for 75 years. When I discovered the depravity of our electoral system's corruption in 2020, I learned that there are many ways to rig an election, and that political parties routinely do so. Stuffing ballot boxes was the traditional technique. Hacking voting machines might be a newer one. A president trying to strong arm election officials is no less outrageous. But throughout, controlling the press is one way that capital in the United States has successfully co-opted both of the major political parties and effectively rigged elections in its favor. The press plays a crucial role enabling corruption that journalists are ethically committed to instead exposing and holding accountable. Voters rely on journalists to make informed decisions, but the willingness of editors to facts to Wall Street and the Pentagon, while every lie they spin on behalf of corporate profits and weapons manufacturers, ensures the ignorance of voters. Crises inevitably result. The mounting global climate catastrophe and the war in Gaza offer two among any number of tragic--and preventable--examples. Efforts to keep the public in the dark range from corporate platforms suppressing content, to Washington prosecuting whistleblowers and publishers under a bipartisan consensus. Want to help spread a little sunlight? Share this post! MSNBC shows its true colors Few examples demonstrate an abdication of responsibility better than MSNBC in the wake of the war in Gaza. A cable content producer prominently featuring opinions alongside reporting, the network's status as a "news outlet" may be debatable. For better or worse, many viewers rely on MSNBC for what they perceive as facts. When I ran for office, I spent years hoping that MSNBC might take note of our campaign, since our efforts offered the chance for progressive rhetoric about any number of issues to find some basis in policy. My platform proposed novel policy solutions to climate chaos, healthcare, labor, education, policing and judicial ethics. But MSNBC is not interested in the issues that concern Democratic Party voters. The network is most interested in propping up the corporate leadership of the Democratic Party. The illusion of inclusion at MSNBC follows a predictable pathway of demographic co-optation on which the Democratic Party largely relies. I've written about how that is : he, better than any other previous presidential candidate, is poised to expose the lie at the root of the Democratic Party's co-optation of Black Americans in the service of supporting white capital. MSNBC choosing to hire Muslim anchors in the first place was significant. to report on current events with greater accuracy than their colleagues is inescapably more significant. Mehdi Hasan, Ali Velshi, and Ayman Mohyeldin have each shown the courage to report the facts from the War in Gaza, in spite of the Washington spin machine dedicated to portraying Palestinians as animals and their resistance to illegal occupation as terrorism. In , MSNBC: did not air a Thursday edition of The Mehdi Hasan Show on its streaming platform, reversed course on its plans to have Ayman Mohyeldin fill in for Joy Reid's 7 o'clock show on Thursday and Friday and intends to have Alicia Menendez replace Ali Velshi this weekend.... More significant than MSNBC hiring them in the first place, or removing them when they did their jobs, is the stunning silence across the rest of the institutional press while observing a demographic--and ideological--purge of its own ranks. Some even came to the defense of MSNBC, accepting claims by NBC that the surprise moves at MSNBC were merely "." It's not as if Muslim journalists are being sidelined by news outlets based on their religion. They're being removed based on their awareness of systemic injustices in which their respective institutional media outlets have been actively complicit for 75 years. Over 22,000 readers subscribe to this newsletter. Under 100 support it. If you'd like to help expand my work and make more frequent publications possible, please consider a paid subscription. Most of my content appears above the paywall to keep it accessible to readers with a free subscription. Nor is this the first time that MSNBC has purged its ranks to stifle dissent from the unrestrained militarism that drives each of the corporate political parties. 20 years ago, MSNBC removed legendary anchor questioning official narratives promoting the war on Iraq that ultimately proved to be lies. Truth is the lifeblood of democracy. It is also the first casualty of war. Americans might think ourselves insulated from international conflicts, but our inability to gain access to independent reporting about global events has already wrought havoc on our own futures. Indefensible policy decisions made possible by widespread ignorance have eroded our nation's international standing, undermined the legitimacy of our own elections, filled our prisons, enabled continuing human rights abuses, placed the future at incalculable risk for ultimately foolish purposes, and driven an accelerating upward transfer of wealth. International relations, and the recurring failures of journalism that poison them, hit much closer to home than most Americans realize. Editors --and elected officials--amplify discredited lies For days, news outlets around the world the claim that Hamas had beheaded Israeli babies. In this case, it's not only journalists who deserve critique and accountability for amplifying orchestrated lies, but also President Joe Biden, who himself those claims, and even claimed to have seen photographs that ultimately did not exist. This is far from the first time that Biden has lied to the public. Before winning the White House in a spectacular display of national amnesia, he had been of several presidential campaigns before by controversy surrounding his about everything from his own record to . Not only did he lie to steal the valor of activists who showed the courage that Biden lacked, but his lies also aim to obscure his work as a senator that the civil rights movement's goals. Biden to have declared a climate emergency, when he has done and-- only fossil fuel extraction the baseline of his predecessor. Biden's long-standing propensity to bend, distort, and manufacture reality bears a close relationship to that of his nominal antagonist in the presidential race, Donald Trump. Their shared attributes are just a few of the reasons why Americans have grown so thoroughly disillusioned with the escalating . It is also another reason why Democrats who rally behind Biden effectively aim to leap from a frying pan into a proverbial fire. One hopes they might relent, if only to avoid dragging the rest of us with them. But don't hold your breath.
